name: National Democratic Training Committee
subject: [Coming Soon] Another HUGE announcement tomorrow….
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
| But for now, take a look at what we’ve announced so far!
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Tv0gRcqIYP_5yiV0O0sFlnN1s4pkoLFeSFDQkmS9xPk)
Peter — There’s been A LOT of news lately about [**Build Blue Week**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..KQ-HFTV6lPp3ACe_XVQin6Qu4L6MnhK8twowBRqpa9k), and we’re _so_ excited to share our next speaker announcement with you. **So keep your eyes on your inbox for that announcement**** _tomorrow afternoon_****.** And while you wait, take a look at some of the guests we’ve announced so far! ⤵️

* * *

[**Panel Discussion: So You Want to Run for Office**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1f7Tg2r4F_ziF_3CO5Jlne0Kp1H37nRPdgGYYT0xI30)
**Monday, September 20, 2:00pm - 3:00pm ET** Running for office? Or even just thinking about it? **_DNC Chair Jaime Harrison_** will open this panel of special guests for our _So You Want to Run for Office_ panel! This discussion gives you the opportunity to tap into the minds of a diverse group of elected officials and party leaders to learn more about running for office. Panelists will share their insights, on-the-ground experiences, and answer any of your burning questions in this interactive session! | [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..pWt_j0WA_0MxrLjUjj1C4obLaUROBpJaXNqDFg8leQg)
---

* * *

[**Uniting Diverse Communities Through Civic Engagement: A Special Interview with Valerie Jarrett**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..n-zXXyK0a0qdgGcX5QWuYz0-wOFq3ZAVhl8bQWH3_Kk)
**Wednesday, September 22, 6:00 - 6:45pm ET**
If you’ve ever tried to mobilize your community for effective civic engagement, you know there’s _a lot_ of things vying for voters' attention. So we thought we’d bring in an expert to help you unite and empower your community through civic engagement.
Join former senior advisor in the Obama administration and current board chair of Civic Nation, **Valerie Jarrett** , for an interactive presentation on uniting your community around a common cause.
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..hbwlUgJ-8hJVfSTPrGNDlTkSQkUi7mhvDILd6QqAW2k)
---
[**Click here for the full lineup of events!**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..a92DBq1nnB1MW2c75qgPwZ-5dInkPMc_MscZe0t1kqc)
— NDTC

body:
I'm going to need some pretty significant assistance if my campaign is going to raise $90,000 in the next 22 days. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=97babd691fdc401680a76f711480b369&_e=PTODIUQc_CqW9PY6D0v1BeoODcThG2IO1TY48PcKQHqH6Z0Dctk25pemBTDE3gRcRhzOeCm5NaR9F0FXf_aM_QKwIrat83K1N3T8M5kDIbDY-3i8qNwoQNHxnFNqcvIkiaztIApn2pfZo69sKCS-f_Gh56jSUaaPZeYizghVbti_P-Uv7fyS1Exq46z0yfCg0E0lqwEFmHKr9EsCsWTLUhBLOQLkqMCW95qrJIufqcXEPsMAYTaoYV_6x6OOy_7_umLR1JeKEIOo_CQjbCeiqL9PhJWxCzgLNhaVYpuLBmAdQ2Sdbt96LZ7z6nx940rrbAw1nE_amGvSgdSGB3DfNB2_5hZsIw_wqOXGAqiPY89IKknN32cq9asPRbN2q2GG8RrcxW0fTSAmRD6APGT8VwA4tkfS76J9QJc-t-6Brmw7WheRKH631L5CoJLaB4dxtLYfwwAwoxoqdBZW_lx5jQ%3D%3D)

Peter,

Have you heard of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s “**Young Gun’s Program?** ” I hadn’t either until my first campaign for Congress last year.

I’d like to give you an explanation as to what the purpose of the program is and **[why I need your financial assistance to gain acceptance.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=97babd691fdc401680a76f711480b369&_e=PTODIUQc_CqW9PY6D0v1BeoODcThG2IO1TY48PcKQHqH6Z0Dctk25pemBTDE3gRcRhzOeCm5NaR9F0FXf_aM_QKwIrat83K1N3T8M5kDIbDY-3i8qNwoQNHxnFNqcvIkiaztIApn2pfZo69sKCS-f_Gh56jSUaaPZeYizghVbti_P-Uv7fyS1Exq46z0yfCg0E0lqwEFmHKr9EsCsWTLUhBLOQLkqMCW95qrJIufqcXEPsMAYTaoYV_6x6OOy_7_JC8_R7NHG829cZnUZKkPwgai3_l9cL2zO2aJ5F0camrMf7ftxgOvUQXaDre3kBR9chnXPbHAFoBfzJIHqWL-LFLR1bu-4pQ570xHXtL8dU9v4ILz5m_QlJz7NfyH8P9NO4iMT6xd8oe-SipZLudU_WmhbKvVdsifF3qHhhOvM2P3kqTV8Qnz3uglZ8fH6HLQdwnhoLBDly-tCHkunlfYtQ%3D%3D) **

The Young Guns program serves to help Republican candidates running in some of the most competitive districts around the country with a playbook on how to vanquish Democrat opposition, along with providing strategic support on everything from polling, fundraising, advertising and grassroots outreach. **Membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C.** – and prove they can WIN.

**[If you’re a frequent flyer, you might equate it to elite-level status. Only the entrance fee for this program isn’t flying hundreds of thousands of miles per year, it’s raising $250,000 in one fundraising quarter.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=97babd691fdc401680a76f711480b369&_e=PTODIUQc_CqW9PY6D0v1BeoODcThG2IO1TY48PcKQHqH6Z0Dctk25pemBTDE3gRcRhzOeCm5NaR9F0FXf_aM_QKwIrat83K1N3T8M5kDIbDY-3i8qNwoQNHxnFNqcvIkiaztIApn2pfZo69sKCS-f_Gh56jSUaaPZeYizghVbti_P-Uv7fyS1Exq46z0yfCg0E0lqwEFmHKr9EsCsWTLUhBLOQLkqMCW95qrJIufqcXEPsMAYTaoYV_6x6OOy_7_RsOR4dfmeSXSm2j9nMQXxIJtjsIvKXOC4WQGosZKQimoX9sjp6LlCd4A_nxq4UO4QndMebyYwaHo-9NLA5Shm_6FUZivP00GY29PeVDrYJrTwzZqkQsJv0gXC2nQpnr5nQEdiAVwVmEyS-jksnRRmuuAacM6Bw9b8PB5sMRHl2thVKSACI_dlOUJQ_hwRV2WOIzALggZ8MWKlOxkDIbM7Q%3D%3D)**

This year, I’m aiming to be one of the first candidates to qualify for the program because with my race expected to be one of the closest in the nation for a second year in a row, **[I sincerely need all of the help I can get. But, with the deadline arriving fast at the end of this month my campaign is still short of hitting the threshold for entry by $91,358](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=97babd691fdc401680a76f711480b369&_e=PTODIUQc_CqW9PY6D0v1BeoODcThG2IO1TY48PcKQHqH6Z0Dctk25pemBTDE3gRcRhzOeCm5NaR9F0FXf_aM_QKwIrat83K1N3T8M5kDIbDY-3i8qNwoQNHxnFNqcvIkiaztIApn2pfZo69sKCS-f_Gh56jSUaaPZeYizghVbti_P-Uv7fyS1Exq46z0yfCg0E0lqwEFmHKr9EsCsWTLUhBLOQLkqMCW95qrJIufqcXEPsMAYTaoYV_6x6OOy_7_lRl-TqWDOiCusDNQCM8E1afSXcZT9mYuQWA9Sz5yt79KYxy7O69hZSdRVDvRkhBlDGwNzxnQ3dB-MnjNktCqw0X0Fm_6qYaN_5wUQ_aiKspn9ooGIYQIFj5OFqQsSZkyywZdxPjv5lifuHZ7noNVJ3e-csO-RSskL0qqB61ikEP8KaHj7WSfdDyfsL-hASMv1DVXZZd3BAaGdIw84mIGKw%3D%3D)**.

If you’re interested in making an investment in flipping the House Republican, you needn’t look further than this email. I’m asking you to help me secure ‘**Young Gun’** status this month with a **[contribution of $4 or more](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=97babd691fdc401680a76f711480b369&_e=PTODIUQc_CqW9PY6D0v1BeoODcThG2IO1TY48PcKQHqH6Z0Dctk25pemBTDE3gRcRhzOeCm5NaR9F0FXf_aM_QKwIrat83K1N3T8M5kDIbDY-3i8qNwoQNHxnFNqcvIkiaztIApn2pfZo69sKCS-f_Gh56jSUaaPZeYizghVbti_P-Uv7fyS1Exq46z0yfCg0E0lqwEFmHKr9EsCsWTLUhBLOQLkqMCW95qrJIufqcXEPsMAYTaoYV_6x6OOy_7_vO7d2Z7WoPKYyJtFxJYd8tO70s9VZFh2v3n_rhic3BjC-2ENjEHDWrjUgbqvtk6ItQlhWDeGnV9Vd0f8Xla64LaT8CYZie3VvdN25P2r_Ius4mIjMCMVDkK5ZLj1dkSB8YEVtCWle6G8RXhyaQOvmSHwa10t56Witixuj-5TGPGY11eN9v2VY2qC5_OkT83sq04z0aSCEbJqUXqz8I6iAQ%3D%3D)** to my campaign right now.

May I please count on your help right now?

clean_body: I'm going to need some pretty significant assistance if my campaign is going to raise $90,000 in the next 22 days. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, Have you heard of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s “Young Gun’s Program? ” I hadn’t either until my first campaign for Congress last year. I’d like to give you an explanation as to what the purpose of the program is and The Young Guns program serves to help Republican candidates running in some of the most competitive districts around the country with a playbook on how to vanquish Democrat opposition, along with providing strategic support on everything from polling, fundraising, advertising and grassroots outreach. Membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C. – and prove they can WIN. This year, I’m aiming to be one of the first candidates to qualify for the program because with my race expected to be one of the closest in the nation for a second year in a row, . If you’re interested in making an investment in flipping the House Republican, you needn’t look further than this email. I’m asking you to help me secure ‘Young Gun’ status this month with a to my campaign right now. May I please count on your help right now? | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | With sincere thanks, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. name: Steve Chabot
subject: Changing the Subject
body:
Watch the other hand! No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Changing the Subject](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-j/)
The withdrawal from Afghanistan was a disaster. Biden's poll numbers have tanked. He'll do anything to change the subject. His friends in the press want to help. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Ending Endless Wars?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-d/)
Joe Biden claims he just got us out of an "endless war." The problem is, one's enemy gets a vote. He also promised he wouldn't pull the troops until all American civilians and our allies were out. He lied. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Should Biden Step Down?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-u/)
Joe Biden is directly responsible for the worst foreign policy blunder in American history. And this is but the latest in a series of critical missteps. Is it time for him to consider stepping aside? Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [A Debacle of Epic Proportions](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-n/)
Although people may disagree on whether or not it was time to exit Afghanistan, very few think this was the way to do it. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-c/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-q/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-a/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-f/) [ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-v/) [ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-trbhhdt-kujkulhluu-e/) [ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-trbhhdt-l-s) | Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. name: PRESIDENT BIDEN ANNOUNCEMENT (via DCCC)
subject: our planet needs YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you SUPPORT bold action to combat climate change and build a sustainable future?
| | | [Do you SUPPORT bold climate action and a sustainable future? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/mPmpcq_)
---

The past year has made it clear as day: **We 're in the midst of a climate crisis.**

_In fact, a recent report just revealed that nearly a THIRD of Americans experienced a weather disaster this summer._

That's why we're so proud to see President Biden tackling climate change with the urgency it demands:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_zQV~)

But Republicans will fight tooth and nail to BLOCK any progress on this crucial issue.

So if we're going to make real change for our children and grandchildren -- _and SAVE our planet_ \-- we'll need this grassroots team behind us every step of the way.

That's why we're asking you to rise up and let us know: **Do you SUPPORT bold action to combat climate change and build a sustainable future?**

---
[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Do you SUPPORT bold action on the climate crisis? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/mPmpcq_)
---

Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45588987&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4MTk3NDkzMgS2&l=13870087&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. clean_body: Do you SUPPORT bold action to combat climate change and build a sustainable future? | | | The past year has made it clear as day: We 're in the midst of a climate crisis. In fact, a recent report just revealed that nearly a THIRD of Americans experienced a weather disaster this summer. That's why we're so proud to see President Biden tackling climate change with the urgency it demands: But Republicans will fight tooth and nail to BLOCK any progress on this crucial issue. So if we're going to make real change for our children and grandchildren -- and SAVE our planet \-- we'll need this grassroots team behind us every step of the way. That's why we're asking you to rise up and let us know: Do you SUPPORT bold action to combat climate change and build a sustainable future? Thanks, DCCC Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Fellow American,

By now, you may have heard the news that President Trump has formally endorsed my campaign for the United States Senate! I've known the President for a long time, and I'm proud to call him my friend.

In case you missed my email announcing the President's support, let me quickly recap for you what he had to say in his endorsement release:

| _"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."_ - President Donald J. Trump
---

Now, while I'm very grateful for President Trump's support of my campaign, the truth of the matter is that I won't get anywhere on my own. I'm a team player - always have been - and I need you on my team. _**[So, I'm asking you to join my team today by offering your personal endorsement of my campaign.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b1dbf97c122d4808b3a03ffcd777d005&_e=TY6lfT4nMwCE5DAguO5juo9B8IyJq4dKU7Qy5k7Hdvci4-RTEk2M6yLWD_eXubzWObU4NkK5sVHQwFLhiqxsa7IWFFNTS_DAitlhaTisopOO09mDJstwPGZ7BOrtBHEgxAiAGHh-pMAwQ1sdrU-9-R2-eVpyaHSS_8e0d_TW9OgcR24WfjTjyEigiR7Cs526eN2SVUX-RNkmLgrB0VxZdQ-RwyZri0Ro2SlgyaBL7tH2QTzek05hCiPLqe0Z3z3rq-5AR8SU-vQlkyueUeAbE2y3Z4Ju668dKguLwV_TZbNDjEDDMwOLEYQHmwe640lx2xXUS5JMdGXUioDby-QNXlBROKvJn9Rvhswo3-0KH2Edcejeqb3gTcuJ5vjCPgR0YMHxnAOE3edUBY3Fs61CUaSMeRsUZEKos1hruSRLkZsYCMbRdhPHlPwokxS2TAmswBzvghG-eidO4KE8OTEqZjHI2Ukx2IHIhjGqDhrch628F8-8B6TiaDc-Vz-R_cfhtpaJ3HRv-WUDi1iFrECdzxG_MM-DmZfU3KJamBFEqViY9hzRMhmyrAXFkhXbPa-5)**_

name: Kim Travis, Campaign Director
subject: We Need Affordable Energy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, We can’t believe the Biden administration would allow this to happen and carry on. Then again, maybe we can.
Peter,**Gas prices have skyrocketed across Wisconsin and the rest of the United States because of the Biden administration 's policies. **Democrats have consistently shown that they would rather play partisan games and force us to depend on foreign countries for our energy than give Americans access to low-cost fuel for our vehicles and homes.**Democrats ignored the Keystone XL Pipeline, which would have increased our oil reserves, made us less reliant on foreign energy, brought thousands of high-paying jobs to the United States, and strengthened our relationship with Canada.** We need to be pro-growth and pro-energy independent to revitalize our economy and lower costs. [**Please contribute to our campaign to help us fight for common-sense, pro-growth policies in Washington. We need your help to take back the House of Representatives in 2022.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkilyg-idtjvlhlh-r/) Kim
--
**Kim Travis**
Campaign Director [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkilyg-idtjvlhlh-y/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkilyg-idtjvlhlh-j/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkilyg-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkilyg-idtjvlhlh-i/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-fkilyg-l-h) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

Donald J. Trump September 8th, 2021
Just watched as a massive crane took down the magnificent and very famous statue of “Robert E. Lee On His Horse” in Richmond, Virginia. It has long been recognized as a beautiful piece of bronze sculpture. To add insult to injury, those who support this “taking” now plan to cut it into three pieces, and throw this work of art into storage prior to its complete desecration.

Robert E. Lee is considered by many Generals to be the greatest strategist of them all. President Lincoln wanted him to command the North, in which case the war would have been over in one day. Robert E. Lee instead chose the other side because of his great love of Virginia, and except for Gettysburg, would have won the war. He should be remembered as perhaps the greatest unifying force after the war was over, ardent in his resolve to bring the North and South together through many means of reconciliation and imploring his soldiers to do their duty in becoming good citizens of this Country.

Our culture is being destroyed and our history and heritage, both good and bad, are being extinguished by the Radical Left, and we can’t let that happen! If only we had Robert E. Lee to command our troops in Afghanistan, that disaster would have ended in a complete and total victory many years ago. What an embarrassment we are suffering because we don’t have the genius of a Robert E. Lee!

clean_body: Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | ---|---|--- | | | | | ---|---|--- Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump September 8th, 2021 Just watched as a massive crane took down the magnificent and very famous statue of “Robert E. Lee On His Horse” in Richmond, Virginia. It has long been recognized as a beautiful piece of bronze sculpture. To add insult to injury, those who support this “taking” now plan to cut it into three pieces, and throw this work of art into storage prior to its complete desecration. Robert E. Lee is considered by many Generals to be the greatest strategist of them all. President Lincoln wanted him to command the North, in which case the war would have been over in one day. Robert E. Lee instead chose the other side because of his great love of Virginia, and except for Gettysburg, would have won the war. He should be remembered as perhaps the greatest unifying force after the war was over, ardent in his resolve to bring the North and South together through many means of reconciliation and imploring his soldiers to do their duty in becoming good citizens of this Country. Our culture is being destroyed and our history and heritage, both good and bad, are being extinguished by the Radical Left, and we can’t let that happen! If only we had Robert E. Lee to command our troops in Afghanistan, that disaster would have ended in a complete and total victory many years ago. What an embarrassment we are suffering because we don’t have the genius of a Robert E. Lee! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump September 8th, 2021 Thank you, Kathy. America feels your loss and fully understands your pain. Rylee will never be forgotten. Message from Kathy McCollum, Mother of Lance Cpl. Rylee McCollum, USMC: “Thank you. Just want the family to know I support them. We need the corrupt pseudo president gone. President Trump has to run. My son should not be gone. President Trump would never allowed this to happen. We need him back in office to save this country. Just like he said years ago on Oprah. He would run when our country needed him. We need him. I can't live with knowing my son’s life was taken for nothing. So Biden could repay his debt to China. They will now have full control of Afghanistan and my son will be a sacrificial lamb. My son was murdered for Biden optics. I will become more vocal soon. Grieving and not sure I can control my mouth. But watched Biden disrespect my son while I was standing across from him and he was checking his watch, and then Pelosi denying my son recognition and turning her back. Just as she tore up Donald’s speech. We cannot give up our country. So even if no one gets back with me. I will always fight for the Trump administration just as my son did.” | ---|--- Donald J. name: Rep. Vincent Dixie
subject: Have you heard about TN’s special election next week?

body:
We have a chance to win back a legislative seat.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35460640/305130694/-361920907?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzliNmZhMy02YzExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dhZCtXVnZADsLoAAEBT6t81yM8lDvlSRrkj0UIyKFRc=#)
Dear Peter,
A few weeks ago, we sent you an email about DeAngelo Jelks and the special election for TN House District 29. DeAngelo has served his country in the Army and Army Reserves, and is ready to serve again in the Tennessee State House.
**I need to be honest with you, we rarely find candidates like DeAngelo, and we need to push hard to support his outreach.**
Early voting has begun and voters will head to the polls next week. In the meantime, we must mobilize voters.
**[Can you make a contribution today to help fund voter contact and mobilization efforts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35460641/305130695/6437213?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzliNmZhMy02YzExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dhZCtXVnZADsLoAAEBT6t81yM8lDvlSRrkj0UIyKFRc=#)**
Let's take back the house,
Chairman Vincent Dixie
State Representative, District 54
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus Chairman
PS- If you live in TN House District 29, early voting ends September 9th. Election Day is September 14th. MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE.

In the meantime, we must mobilize voters. =# Let's take back the house, Chairman Vincent Dixie State Representative, District 54 Tennessee House Democratic Caucus Chairman PS- If you live in TN House District 29, early voting ends September 9th. Election Day is September 14th. MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE. =# Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Jesse Chism Treasurer Tennessee House Democratic Caucus P. O. Box 198082 Nashville, TN 37219 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: No Prayer on 9/11?!
body:
Dear Peter, Liberal hypocrisy in Washington D.C. is at an all time high. Local D.C. Pastor, Reverend Pat Mahoney, wants to gather a prayer vigil on the lawn outside of the U.S. Capitol pray for peace and the protection of our country on the 20th anniversary of September 11th. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58290227:JMKc2r2NQ:m:1:3253819041:21597981C9413F38CF478F5225F0849F:r) **But unelected government bureaucrats and the U.S. Capitol Police Board****won 't let him.** And while Rev. Mahoney isn't allowed to exercise his God-given First Amendment right to pray for our nation... ...radical left-wing politicians and activists get a free pass to loudly and obnoxiously do whatever they want. That's why we're suing the U.S. Capitol Police Board for discriminately DENYING Rev. Mahoney's First Amendment right to peacefully assemble and exercise his faith. [**Will you help us take on the Capitol Police Board for its blatant attack on religious liberty?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58290227:JMKc2r2NQ:m:1:3253819041:21597981C9413F38CF478F5225F0849F:r) Let me explain... With the 20th Anniversary of September 11th right around the corner, Rev. Pat Mahoney filed a permit to gather a prayer vigil on the grounds of the U.S. Capitol. But there was one thing standing in his way... In order to hold the prayer vigil, the U.S. Capitol Police Board required Rev. Mahoney to obtain a permit. _ _ **A few days later, Rev. Mahoney learned that the Capitol Police Board DENIED his request.** When Rev. Mahoney asked why he wasn't allowed to pray outside of the Capitol - especially for something as important as the 20th Anniversary of 9/11 - the Capitol Police Board told him the area is "restricted" and that permit applications cannot be processed. But that just isn't true. Just recently, leftist Congresswoman Cori Bush and a handful of her left-wing activist friends slept on the Capitol steps for days in protesting one of their radical social justice policies--demanding an extension of the eviction moratorium. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58290227:JMKc2r2NQ:m:1:3253819041:21597981C9413F38CF478F5225F0849F:r) Another group recently got a permit to protest on the lawn outside the Capitol too. In other words, Rev. Mahoney wasn't denied because the area was actually "restricted" or closed. **He was denied the right to exercise his First Amendment freedoms because the U.S. Capitol Police Board thinks it has unfettered discretion to pick winners and losers with respect to constitutional rights.** [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit against the U.S. Capitol Police Board by sending a generous tax-deductible contribution of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58290227:JMKc2r2NQ:m:1:3253819041:21597981C9413F38CF478F5225F0849F:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a leading constitutional rights attorney and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may have heard about the Center for American Liberty before. We're a nationwide network of patriotic, Constitution-loving attorneys who fight for individual liberty. And since 2019, we've successfully taken on "Big Tech," radical politicians, Antifa, and others who have tried to cancel our constitutionally guaranteed civil liberties for their own personal gain. **Now, we 're suing the U.S Capitol Police Board for denying Rev. Mahoney the right to gather and pray on this upcoming anniversary of September 11th. ** As a non-profit organization, the only way we can do that is with the generous financial support of patriotic Americans like you. [**That 's why I'm asking you to chip in $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty so we can fund this critical First Amendment lawsuit. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58290227:JMKc2r2NQ:m:1:3253819041:21597981C9413F38CF478F5225F0849F:r) This isn't the first time Nancy Pelosi and/or the U.S. Capitol Police Board censored Rev. Mahoney's prayers. Earlier this year, Nancy Pelosi denied Rev. Mahoney the right to pray for our nation lower western terrace of the U.S. Capitol on Good Friday. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58290227:JMKc2r2NQ:m:1:3253819041:21597981C9413F38CF478F5225F0849F:r) Earlier this year, Nancy Pelosi denied Rev. Mahoney the right to pray for our nation lower western terrace of the U.S. Capitol on Good Friday. **A nd just recently, the Capitol Police ARRESTED Rev. Mahoney within 10 minutes for peacefully expressing his pro-life beliefs on the steps of the U.S. Capitol--the same spot where Rep. Bush and her friends were allowed to protest with impunity for DAYS.** It's plain as day that this is a coordinated attempt to silence a pastor simply because certain Washington elites don't agree with his message. **Denying a pastor the fundamental right to pray for the victims and families of 9/11 is sickening enough ...** But the fact that they won't let Rev. Mahoney gather to pray while other non-religious activities can go on at the EXACT same location is a gross violation of the First Amendment. [**Can I count on you to support our lawsuit against the U.S. Capitol Police Board by sending a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58290227:JMKc2r2NQ:m:1:3253819041:21597981C9413F38CF478F5225F0849F:r) I look forward to hearing back from you right away. And thank you in advance for your kind support. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58290227:JMKc2r2NQ:m:1:3253819041:21597981C9413F38CF478F5225F0849F:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58290227:JMKc2r2NQ:m:1:3253819041:21597981C9413F38CF478F5225F0849F:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58290227:JMKc2r2NQ:m:1:3253819041:21597981C9413F38CF478F5225F0849F:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58290228:JMKc2r2NQ:m:1:3253819041:21597981C9413F38CF478F5225F0849F:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

name: Team Greitens
subject: ICYMI: AZ Senator Wendy Rogers Joins Former Governor Eric Greitens in Missouri for Election Integrity Media Tour
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| ICYMI: AZ Senator Wendy Rogers Joins Former Governor Eric Greitens in Missouri for Election Integrity Media Tour
---
| On Tuesday, Arizona State Senator Wendy Rogers joined former Missouri Governor & 2022 US Senate candidate Eric Greitens in Missouri for an Election Integrity media tour.
The tour consisted of a slate of interviews on conservative talk radio and national television programs including The Marc Cox Morning Show on 97.1 Talk FM, Allman in the Morning on 104.9 The Patriot, King's Court Radio Show with Kevin Slaten, and Steve Bannon's War Room.
On Steve Bannon's War Room, Greitens and Rogers gave an update on the Arizona Audit & spoke to the importance of securing our elections not only in states where President Trump ostensibly "lost" but also the states he won, like Missouri.
WATCH:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I85PyGSk0bKx5NGUSu-Ej3yEWvo-OqrcQQ8UODWaHGfsZ2C5iIqoa_KsWn8PNrxu1cszJxE1ZCdVZzIOy_zcyw9-jT0EwFM1hcp0Dd8kNmW9ckFv_sZvRrmjPXU3XlZxyGXFlMq2-5_ksPZcQnf6NPkYxAJvVz5nNbhqw3wfxEXky1gMOaIJVXDil32D0fkdPL9rVMGDIt-b-civznxyBash8kD782RUpKcOt4l9F5Y=&c=aJ1AyVKwljy4W0yUJFd2m1EhgopMqc1ccph5SyLcTOMq-3iujFPdjA==&ch=1-DaQc59UPk8yPGB9OT7ogxgqOCDFk-e83oi0CYp2p3fJUJMI457KQ==)
---
| On 97.1 Talk FM, Rogers-- one of few senators who received the praise of President Donald Trump for her commitment for ensuring election integrity-- called Greitens a "real patriot."
"All Missourians should be proud of Eric Greitens because he has really leaned forward into election integrity," Rogers told radio host Marc Cox.
While in Missouri, Senator Rogers & Governor Greitens met with other conservative leaders & [held an event with grassroots supporters in St. Charles County](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I85PyGSk0bKx5NGUSu-Ej3yEWvo-OqrcQQ8UODWaHGfsZ2C5iIqoa_KsWn8PNrxuh8eUPcbyiUevUEK_uNSRnngYBJ6hMOqrHD9iqtiE4AfC5YaNTv4jNrDvsn5vCYOCeKIDNJahD50lHeDKwxBxnN8RiNKsnVYBshy5AcAmiDTgADQfusvq2rVVjs-Yftl8QJ-xvHFv_mkfScTNjUTn9Q==&c=aJ1AyVKwljy4W0yUJFd2m1EhgopMqc1ccph5SyLcTOMq-3iujFPdjA==&ch=1-DaQc59UPk8yPGB9OT7ogxgqOCDFk-e83oi0CYp2p3fJUJMI457KQ==).
[READ from The Gateway Pundit: AZ State Senator Wendy Rogers and U.S. Senate Candidate Eric Greitens Meeting In St. Louis Today for Media Tour](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I85PyGSk0bKx5NGUSu-Ej3yEWvo-OqrcQQ8UODWaHGfsZ2C5iIqoa_KsWn8PNrxuNLCZGoMnkZcfrTfTVOppnbnCKBjtAADXfLlC-ki3d5kDhHpNLW9j1yTHxkprUJ6bSBp9LxrXc3uJrdFwATcPsuzyetiylV4b1EWUDYlHf_oWXQoSYabXHrYgotpCBGu5e9RvWbjAFq9o1VYGCpgN-2JYBijAkqm7LGGiRCnH9D0tPXeumysbRy5RSEV9dH65UeWIbeFjGwYIj03VmgYZsul_VLvPwPki4i6Uuy8-l-uuzyLcVUxS_sPId9IME3Rb9oBVms6nPeJzS81DbTHJZXw6ZH6bVZZWS1jwxigKscw=&c=aJ1AyVKwljy4W0yUJFd2m1EhgopMqc1ccph5SyLcTOMq-3iujFPdjA==&ch=1-DaQc59UPk8yPGB9OT7ogxgqOCDFk-e83oi0CYp2p3fJUJMI457KQ==)

clean_body: | | | | | | | ICYMI: AZ Senator Wendy Rogers Joins Former Governor Eric Greitens in Missouri for Election Integrity Media Tour | On Tuesday, Arizona State Senator Wendy Rogers joined former Missouri Governor & 2022 US Senate candidate Eric Greitens in Missouri for an Election Integrity media tour. The tour consisted of a slate of interviews on conservative talk radio and national television programs including The Marc Cox Morning Show on 97.1 Talk FM, Allman in the Morning on 104.9 The Patriot, King's Court Radio Show with Kevin Slaten, and Steve Bannon's War Room. On Steve Bannon's War Room, Greitens and Rogers gave an update on the Arizona Audit & spoke to the importance of securing our elections not only in states where President Trump ostensibly "lost" but also the states he won, like Missouri. WATCH: | == | On 97.1 Talk FM, Rogers-- one of few senators who received the praise of President Donald Trump for her commitment for ensuring election integrity-- called Greitens a "real patriot." "All Missourians should be proud of Eric Greitens because he has really leaned forward into election integrity," Rogers told radio host Marc Cox. While in Missouri, Senator Rogers & Governor Greitens met with other conservative leaders & ==. == | | | | FOLLOW US == == == == | | | | Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate | PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 | | | Sent by mailto:press@ericgreitens.com powered by

Friends,
On behalf of Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization (Be The Solution), we would like to thank all of our volunteers who have helped to support our senior phone banking events to ensure that our low-income seniors are not left behind. We would also like to extend our special thanks to those individuals who signed up to help rebuild 85 year-old Mr. Brown's home. We are so grateful for the outpouring of support for our seniors!
REGISTER TODAY: The Empowered You: Texas Senior Citizens Conference is Back!
As promised, The Empowered You: Texas Senior Citizens Conference is back! This year, we will host both a virtual and tele-townhall event on Thursday, October 14th from 10am - 1:30pm for our seniors to ensure that they are able to thrive in this season in their lives. We will host inspirational speakers and informative classes. Due to pandemic safety considerations, we will NOT host an in person event this year, but will supply the first 250 seniors to register with lunch, a t-shirt and more! To learn more about this year's event, click [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hu0JU6KnvY_g4Y_XSskVUUZdgCTGW3uE-jk3qNWp3Bo9iyrimd1kq5duCFVmITS9ZrS-xOw4Ot0sZaSf9VpA83tpQDTwaAutmhPifK959-wShKWj19648YBTnlhQCfWoerjirDfnAYmTy6lFp2YAC4OTd8Uih7JPHf3Zw0UZ1No=&c=BEk4rvj6m50-rECdMOpCp2h6fQI0yoBq33L-AnpjeHqhBrJgg_rFkA==&ch=2Q5_Enp_mW6Mz4TECioNZunIpDdAduZZV-56JU2n18lN350dU6EXoQ==). Registration is open until September 17th so please do not miss your chance to attend this one-stop-shop for seniors!

clean_body: | | | Derek, I just wanted to make sure you saw Andrew’s email. We just got out of our morning fundraising meeting and we’re now less than $12,000 away from meeting the $28,000 fundraising goal Andrew set to make sure we can fully fund our mobilization efforts. There’s so much at stake in this election and with the Republican National Committee building an army of field staffers to put Glenn Youngkin in the Governor’s mansion, we need your help. Can I count on you to chip in $10 or $25 to keep us on track to meet our $28,000 fundraising goal by Sunday night? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = Thanks, Randy Sprinkle \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Andrew Whitley <info@vademocrats.org> Date: Tue, Sep 7, 2021 Subject: voting starts in 10 days! To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Hey Derek, In just 10 short days, Virginians will start casting their ballots across the commonwealth. This year, it isn’t just the elected officials that folks are voting for, it’s the future of our commonwealth. Abortion access is on the ballot. Climate change is on the ballot. Criminal justice reform is on the ballot. A living wage is on the ballot. The Republican National Committee is sending an army of field staffers to Virginia so we need to make sure our mobilization efforts are bigger and bolder in order to keep Glenn Youngkin out of the Governor’s mansion and protect the progress we’ve made over the last few years. I just checked our fundraising numbers and we’re currently still $16,327 away from our $28,000 goal to stop Glenn Youngkin’s army of field staffers and his right-wing, Trump loyalist agenda. Can I count on you to chip in $10 or $25 to help put us over the finish line? Glenn Youngkin might have the financial support of National Republicans — and $75 million from his personal fortune — but your grassroots contribution can have an even greater impact. I wouldn’t have set such a large goal if I didn’t believe in the power of our grassroots donors.= = = = = = Thank you for the support in these final 10 days leading up to early voting. | | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gIynrVDKKhbdIohP_jNND-zilFwYvnfY2Vs00tgZ33XxmSqx6ut7rdbUfjENF4EE_BTYXvNmKfATA_7Gj3cAA1QfgcTpUbXJiyVgn1t6mo5M0xGAgAzozUr_EKQ_9Qo-BBhqagCRhyMBoEsRkYmfsRbdGAFy-pyR6xmvBbH2IH4X3BeJpQZlsQ==&c=-qLK_GFN5yfq0RMYn33KdzOjd6n8z5km9n3tRW9BkD723p_UGnWMNg==&ch=hR5otpwYCQF3HOHwh_R77ARgR1ZSW3BkE_3T7gsf77_Npml6orGAhA==)
---
| Peter,
In case you missed it, the [Cincinnati Enquirer](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gIynrVDKKhbdIohP_jNND-zilFwYvnfY2Vs00tgZ33XxmSqx6ut7rUI9Xqvpd1w53YR5734asCpGjq879mJ_5cMUsWlRSls5XpAjFLUmcc5RSWK84Uw7Ff9qdXTURCEunhhgY6HFlcCK1zo25ZMvNeXSXmhrNC9Z5nKIFQwnlnil4wBSQxOvvy1nfveQbuvwt9CiscNU6NTgtAABvGSbrRZs8-vKEIG80D2sqbPUa0rzdxQSPsEWi_OU5k2069fJjGUth_HjlxxrzSXgz1nHSuIy3T0l0URn&c=-qLK_GFN5yfq0RMYn33KdzOjd6n8z5km9n3tRW9BkD723p_UGnWMNg==&ch=hR5otpwYCQF3HOHwh_R77ARgR1ZSW3BkE_3T7gsf77_Npml6orGAhA==) recently ran my Op-Ed on why I am running to be Ohio's next U.S. Senator:

America's strength comes from people, not Washington [Cincinnati Enquirer](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gIynrVDKKhbdIohP_jNND-zilFwYvnfY2Vs00tgZ33XxmSqx6ut7rUI9Xqvpd1w53YR5734asCpGjq879mJ_5cMUsWlRSls5XpAjFLUmcc5RSWK84Uw7Ff9qdXTURCEunhhgY6HFlcCK1zo25ZMvNeXSXmhrNC9Z5nKIFQwnlnil4wBSQxOvvy1nfveQbuvwt9CiscNU6NTgtAABvGSbrRZs8-vKEIG80D2sqbPUa0rzdxQSPsEWi_OU5k2069fJjGUth_HjlxxrzSXgz1nHSuIy3T0l0URn&c=-qLK_GFN5yfq0RMYn33KdzOjd6n8z5km9n3tRW9BkD723p_UGnWMNg==&ch=hR5otpwYCQF3HOHwh_R77ARgR1ZSW3BkE_3T7gsf77_Npml6orGAhA==)

Washington is broken, and the career politicians and party insiders have failed us.
I am running for the United States Senate because Ohio needs a new conservative voice, someone with real-world business experience, someone who is blunt, bold, and unafraid to stand up for what's right.
I grew up in Parma, a working-class suburb of Cleveland. My father was a high school teacher and a wrestling coach. My grandfather was president of the laborers' union.
I went to work at an early age. I worked a bandsaw on the factory floor. I poured concrete. I started my own company at the age of 37, working alone with a desk and a phone in a small space above a dentist's office.
Today, I've achieved success beyond my wildest imagination. I've achieved my American dream and I want to help more people achieve their American dream.
Elections are about asking voters to hire someone. When I hire someone in business, I look at their resume. Have they been successful? Have they given back? But it's even more important to find out who they are and what they believe. What are their values?
Well, I want to take a moment to tell you what I believe. I believe that America is the greatest country in the history of the world. I believe our rights come from God Almighty, not government. I believe in the rule of law, the power of the individual, and the sanctity of all human life.
I believe that politicians don't create jobs, businesses do. I know, because I've done it. I believe it's your money, not the government's, and you know better how to spend it than they do.
I believe that our right to keep and bear arms shall not be infringed. I believe that families matter, churches matter, and neighborhoods and small towns matter.
I believe that we must reject those who categorize us and divide us by race, class, education, or religion.
And this may surprise you, but I truly believe our best days are still ahead of us. However, only if we recognize what we're up against, tell the truth, and fight for what we believe.
Lockdowns have crippled our economy. The Democrats are proposing new, job-killing taxes. Spending is out of control. The left is trying to eliminate voter ID and make ballot harvesting national law. China is emerging as a corrupt new super power, and many in both parties are enabling them. AOC (Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez) is getting her "Green New Deal" in the form of the so-called "infrastructure" package. We have a new crisis at the border. Democrats are trying to strip our Second Amendment rights. Cops are being attacked, our cities are falling apart, and criminals are being released back into the streets.
That's what we're up against.
I know things look bleak right now. I'm worried about our country, and I know you are too. But I am still optimistic about our nation's future.
Our country was founded by those who set out in rickety wooden ships across an ocean in search of freedom, religious liberty, opportunity and a better life.
The early frontiersmen who explored the Ohio valley faced down death, and the families who settled our state in search of a better life were guided by faith. Generation after generation worked hard, raised families and built towns, schools, churches and businesses. They looked out for one another. They risked everything. They built our state and our great nation.
We stand on the shoulders of giants. While the left attacks them, I stand in awe of them. Ohio has been through tough times before, and so has our country, but we've always come back. We've always overcome. We've prospered - and we'll prosper once again - because we understand the stakes. We believe in America and we believe in the American dream.
I want you to think about your own families, your own neighborhoods and communities, your own churches and businesses and schools. That's where we will win.
Our strength as America doesn't begin in Washington. It begins with each of us.
Mike Gibbons is a businessman from Cleveland and running as a Republican for the U.S. Senate.

---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I have a very important ask

body:

This is Rep. Adam Schiff, team. I have a lot to say. But first I have an important ask for you:

**[Will you split a contribution right now between Common Good VA and Charlie Crist’s campaign to defeat Ron DeSantis?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruQOzwPtL15Pd5VR9pyq3L5GS8c5PHQZVyxBJVxlHNRZsi22hiuJkewk-a0-Q6KbS04z0QqLVg8sKRQRKgmEBtE7UqO0ZiSkIYm2909XKFR_WDpZtsWv0zSNZo3xPjZvEY_H319fp_1YYE5uOpUK5DGPCkwKcTEHKgnERylINK6Y1z6Wjk8rENMoXEc1xRIykmZBDN4mLpmmwzQ_CMm0rHwbqKymRffVkYiQhLNDIvMzq30tHO1aEo1ux2fVelpGa9p2aYoDz_V7UgKu87vpunULkXLHa_QJTZigwX618ZqDi/3f6/zlk--EsERZyvEXwJjKt6ZQ/h1/6jmB-e4X4fZ1xC6hQaYmbIihzma1eoc5FjvR_oXdHq4) Every dollar is critical to helping defeat Florida Governor Ron DeSantis and helping my friend Charlie raise $15,000 before his fundraising deadline.**

I’ve known Charlie for a long time. We’ve served together in Congress and worked together on critical legislation to help families across America. He and I worked side by side to pass the COVID-19 relief packages and legislation to protect voting rights. I know his character. I’ve seen his work ethic. And he would fight for Floridians in the Governor’s mansion just as he has for years in Congress.

On the flip side, I know a lot about Ron DeSantis, too. Not through working together – but by seeing him stand side by side with the most dangerous president in history. Seeing him grin while signing voter suppression bills in Florida. **And by watching him jockey to use his platform to be the successor to Donald Trump in 2024.**

Things haven’t gotten much better since DeSantis left the House to become Governor of Florida. He’s put more attention into building his profile and trying to disenfranchise voters in his state than trying to help the people of Florida recover from the worst pandemic any of us have ever endured.

**It’s absolutely critical that we defeat DeSantis.** And I believe my friend Charlie is the one to beat him next year. But knowing the modern-day Republican Party, they are going to do everything they can to keep DeSantis in office and tear down Charlie as he seeks to represent the people of Florida.

**So right now, your contribution is critical. Charlie is ready to set the tone for the race and he needs your help to do it.[Please split a donation between Charlie’s campaign and Common Good VA today to help them hit their $15,000 goal.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruQOzwPtL15Pd5VR9pyq3L5F6jChJhGPJPZ7Jqf4n7nntN9elD6WNade1uwuBrsgvhNCsfWIatAO1SzAiULCjUkkMHmvAlA08iAHsTTFcC6Oyubk6QwROK_EXXKVGxOs2H9ZRKXSTEUDYjqdyu6s5mwvBM1PRqBXC6LQfZszY9a0vcXGt5jxgHBuBcD3dhJEPYilqW4PtTjpnbmp2YQ1EcO5A0IUYD6xOImaYmRO23vfGhdAenLfnw9Hcw2s0EaqF91WIV8seSvZtYK15EbgTym9ycxWVnETgtLbXZLJfVQrR/3f6/zlk--EsERZyvEXwJjKt6ZQ/h2/9QR0wkfriaGNO9UlktAZOo23VItHbKJZLe4-j5uUS3I)**

We need to flip Florida blue once again. And you can play a role in that today. Thank you for all you do.

\-- Adam Schiff

While state legislatures are hard at work stripping us of our voting rights, want to know how Mike Garcia has spent his last few weeks? Voting _against_ the John Lewis Voting Rights Act -- legislation that would protect the right to vote for millions of Americans.

Mike doesn't seem to have a problem with making it harder for people to vote. He doesn't feel the need to protect early voting, or voting by mail, or making voting more accessible for people with disabilities.

The truth is, Mike has no problem ignoring the will of his constituents entirely, just to consolidate Republican power.

It's time to get rid of his toxic leadership once and for all.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Now that I have Trump’s endorsement, may I have yours?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I have President Trump’s endorsement, but I want to know: do I have yours? I have President Trump's endorsement, but I want to know: do I have yours? |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=27cfe56120c14e8eb4263298c8c6c730&_e=PRXMs3N0KedzSsJDgwfgUhQvJYhiqjtHLnuTCeFtKK1j7cK7UIsaJj6y3NsBA-SNg5S93UrUy3ZQK1eyicQ5YyInxGrCnlOdLixaves99S2PhQg26XEj6JNJB8YLNCws11VBjds97ApxeQu2PahkUdumQyUCRzdVTMyb4bbyGPghK_VaPQdkuaimakF61V6zF4WM72iubjwf9ou61KVJnFe6-qXg0lAC9Lgwkh--ypRyrvtIphvn7c-9akvFSS1pr4e8K-TFQgbEcPzrVmbTzNfEhJf6cM5xAh9fIkPXxSYHZxt1HidnTy4W9zxbDy_tSUrsHcAlEtQ6JPIL4CqytNzdk_E7iDIxkym2FOKOnhZsfvGrxApLgI5zpWD4ak6TNKuFTqKGS02ztuTMe7H9y8xJlBtOXuCz8uqJGwnHVyxq59lBz2E9V8KlPYL9_03kU7TAK2RgA84EEjAY-7nN-N9wDN8znKMqjs4Cn3w6B9kDTi3grQzPhUnVBtlxXH4Nvyj6v59-Nz3odhx-XMgGO4s5Zyg7kVD_6Hoxyx-8cdpUnybFEYp6tmvBKcV2n9re)

---
Peter,

By now, you may have heard the news that President Trump has formally endorsed my campaign for the United States Senate! I've known the President for a long time, and I'm proud to call him my friend.

In case you missed my email announcing the President's support, let me quickly recap for you what he had to say in his endorsement release:

| _"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."_ - President Donald J. Trump
---

Now, while I'm very grateful for President Trump's support of my campaign, the truth of the matter is that I won't get anywhere on my own. I'm a team player - always have been - and I need you on my team. _**[So, I'm asking you to join my team today by offering your personal endorsement of my campaign.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=27cfe56120c14e8eb4263298c8c6c730&_e=PRXMs3N0KedzSsJDgwfgUhQvJYhiqjtHLnuTCeFtKK1j7cK7UIsaJj6y3NsBA-SNg5S93UrUy3ZQK1eyicQ5YyInxGrCnlOdLixaves99S2PhQg26XEj6JNJB8YLNCws11VBjds97ApxeQu2PahkUdumQyUCRzdVTMyb4bbyGPghK_VaPQdkuaimakF61V6zF4WM72iubjwf9ou61KVJnFe6-qXg0lAC9Lgwkh--ypRyrvtIphvn7c-9akvFSS1pr4e8K-TFQgbEcPzrVmbTzNfEhJf6cM5xAh9fIkPXxSYHZxt1HidnTy4W9zxbDy_tSUrsHcAlEtQ6JPIL4CqytNzdk_E7iDIxkym2FOKOnhbMKF8vlp7Fbple3JgQPODjYO3OWrPbgCA9N0FNWf6HVptRnNGeRo35ZGkIKZkRGTLt2W21Dcb9v4QiO0P01n10DSRUrKOcjdrf6ZjNRd5Xz0a7fYA7AA0cBurhyzERY_bPxL0LJIoMkD5X1ycYDrjPurxKI6mbsVe4dqNG5JuIw_LmhaWd4ul3Yp8Kond7UC-izHi8vAEhDPBkyfFd5H-h)**_

I have President Trump's endorsement, but I want to know: do I have yours? | Peter, By now, you may have heard the news that President Trump has formally endorsed my campaign for the United States Senate! In case you missed my email announcing the President's support, let me quickly recap for you what he had to say in his endorsement release: | "Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down." - President Donald J. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Don't Miss Out
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=win_king_walz_retarget&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **Don't miss out! There's still time left today if you would like to be the owner of the forbidden 'King Walz' sign from our State Fair booth?!** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/king_walz_sign_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=win_king_walz_retarget&n=2) When the [State Fair told us to take down the sign](https://www.action4liberty.com/king_walz_sign_goes_back_up_on_state_fair_booth?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=win_king_walz_retarget&n=3) because it was disrespectful to the Governor, we refused to be silenced. After all, it was Walz who infringed on our liberties by locking us in our homes, shutting down our businesses, forcing us to wear a mask and mandating vaccines. He deserves no respect! After I informed the State Fair of our decision to keep the signs up, they stole them from our booth in the middle of the night. But we didn't back down. Our lawyer sent them a letter and we made new ones that went right back up. Now you can be the owner of one of those forbidden 'King Walz' signs. **Everyone who donates at least $25 to our field operations by 7PM TONIGHT has a chance to be selected as the new owner of the 'King Walz' sign.** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/king_walz_sign_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=win_king_walz_retarget&n=4) Your donation doesn't only give you a chance to own the infamous 'King Walz' sign, but you are also supporting the one group in Minnesota that does not back down to the political class or radical leftists who want to destroy America! **We're growing everyday with more field operatives and volunteers. Your financial support keeps the engine running. It's what keeps the pressure on politicians who want to take away our freedoms through lockdowns and government mandates.** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/king_walz_sign_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=win_king_walz_retarget&n=5) And as you probably know, the battle for our freedoms are ramping up. Hospitals and businesses are threatening to FIRE workers who refuse to get the experimental vaccine. That's why I instructed our team to travel around the state. We need freedom fighters on the ground bringing heat to the political class, while standing up for your liberty. If we lose this battle to protect your right to choose what goes in your body, then I'm afraid we are on the course to lose this great country. Personal health freedom is one of the most fundamental freedoms that exists. But we don't have to lose this battle. Action 4 Liberty is organized and growing by thousands every week. Unfortunately, that will all stop if we don't get funded by supporters like you. [**So please pitch in $25 to help our field team grow. And you just might be the lucky one who becomes the owner of the 'King Walz' sign.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/king_walz_sign_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=win_king_walz_retarget&n=6) **In Liberty,** **** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=win_king_walz_retarget&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=win_king_walz_retarget&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=win_king_walz_retarget&n=9), software for leaders.

| Peter -
While our country is suffering the consequences of Joe Biden's disastrous presidency, another country is reaping the benefits of Joe's policies: China.
Joe Biden wants to destroy America's energy industry. Who will benefit from this? China.
Joe Biden has destroyed America's economy and American manufacturing. Who will benefit from this? China.
And who will benefit from Biden's botched withdrawal from Afghanistan? You guessed it: China.

| The Taliban is already cheering China's new influence in Afghanistan after Joe's exit. "China is our most important partner and represents a fundamental and extraordinary opportunity for us," a Taliban spokesperson said. "China is our pass to markets all over the world."
When Taliban terrorists are celebrating America's exit because it will make communists in China stronger, you know you've made a mistake.
Why does it seem like every decision Joe makes HURTS AMERICA and HELPS CHINA? We need to make our voices heard.
I'm going on offense to tell Joe to stop his America Last, China First agenda. [Will you help me?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EFo13CuLDJuCqf2F5VlyztacbJbE-C26Jjt0L6IaSS8vlhVR9zujB40ZFuA9byLao9lM9nJlueQW0z-G0IvYJzDQx1KU8JiOxzo-QsEPnlf6yhckV3FcT6EIsax5xuVnxWLOfp1cNSxwJTXOUQuTjrIXdNsdaxI52FVeW92phb-1-JDfughLtFQsrCZSoJLBoJGvNGZnryfy71LbnJPnGb-wWXlq0OQllfJmrsdkRzmFT3QyJwPXZsj3cMgdAgpcy2d2RjTGlyFSJ6XlWrms_15U_mWrKhuRteptriG-imESfTqPegoajQ9X5gcruMqBQp3IjCy_gzd9AHW8ndBuow==&c=7N0yPqW5VBlxzO8go3RC0eUTdwmNFiT7_1LGWlN4DahPwRyMPtCjcA==&ch=YTolusK0p5rjoCPdClHiR4k7Z9i11NN9M1oNMDqseDXEVOtFFS6GAw==)

name: Beth Kloser
subject: Tell the Senate: Pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act
body:
| | Hi Friend, **My name is Beth Kloser, NextGen’s Texas State Director, and I’d like to tell you about the voting rights crisis that is happening in my state.** This summer, Texas House Democrats brought national attention to the ongoing assault on our democracy that’s been waged by our Republican lawmakers. By walking out of a special legislative session, House Democrats temporarily blocked passage of a slew of new voter-suppression laws. **In response to this act of protest, the GOP-controlled Texas legislature moved aggressively to pass racist, anti-youth, and undemocratic voting measures in Senate Bill 1.** Earlier this week, Governor Greg Abbott signed this shameful bill into law, adding to the laundry list of voter-suppression tactics he’s so flagrantly supported throughout his tenure. SB 1 bans 24-hour voting and drive-thru voting, both of which were crucial during the pandemic. It severely restricts voting by mail, denying the option entirely for young voters. Further, SB 1 increases protection and autonomy for partisan poll watchers who will inevitably use their newfound authority to intimidate voters. **These actions by Republican politicians present a real and urgent threat to our voting rights.** However, the most alarming fact about this voting rights crisis is that Texas is not the only target. [**Fight back: Urge your senators to abolish the filibuster and finally pass national voting protections with the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35479496/305202110/-918552851?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTJmY2Q3YS05MTExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UviAgBIuM1vFHego-flh99LSwpvbMuv5gLnJbSFAJx4=&emci=16f6b074-0210-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=952fcd7a-9111-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172) If passed, this transformative bill would require states with a history of racist voting rights violations to submit their electoral rules for federal approval before roll out — effectively stopping targeted voter suppression efforts before they even start. The John Lewis Voting Rights Act would also reverse a number of Supreme Court rulings that uphold discriminatory disenfranchisement practices. This is a crucial opportunity for Senate Democrats to cement necessary voter protections at the federal level, but it won’t happen without first abolishing the arbitrary, obstructive filibuster rule. **Right now, Senate Democrats have the votes to reform the filibuster and pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act — the question is, do they have the courage?** [**Urge your senators to meet the moment, heed the calls from voting rights advocates in Texas and beyond, and finally pass federal voting protections.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35479497/305202113/1810330504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTJmY2Q3YS05MTExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UviAgBIuM1vFHego-flh99LSwpvbMuv5gLnJbSFAJx4=&emci=16f6b074-0210-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=952fcd7a-9111-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172) **** | [Send a message](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35479498/305202114/244246563?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTJmY2Q3YS05MTExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UviAgBIuM1vFHego-flh99LSwpvbMuv5gLnJbSFAJx4=&emci=16f6b074-0210-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=952fcd7a-9111-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172 "Sign up to text")

clean_body: | | Hi Friend, My name is Beth Kloser, NextGen’s Texas State Director, and I’d like to tell you about the voting rights crisis that is happening in my state. This summer, Texas House Democrats brought national attention to the ongoing assault on our democracy that’s been waged by our Republican lawmakers. By walking out of a special legislative session, House Democrats temporarily blocked passage of a slew of new voter-suppression laws. In response to this act of protest, the GOP-controlled Texas legislature moved aggressively to pass racist, anti-youth, and undemocratic voting measures in Senate Bill 1. Earlier this week, Governor Greg Abbott signed this shameful bill into law, adding to the laundry list of voter-suppression tactics he’s so flagrantly supported throughout his tenure. SB 1 bans 24-hour voting and drive-thru voting, both of which were crucial during the pandemic. It severely restricts voting by mail, denying the option entirely for young voters. Further, SB 1 increases protection and autonomy for partisan poll watchers who will inevitably use their newfound authority to intimidate voters. These actions by Republican politicians present a real and urgent threat to our voting rights. However, the most alarming fact about this voting rights crisis is that Texas is not the only target. If passed, this transformative bill would require states with a history of racist voting rights violations to submit their electoral rules for federal approval before roll out — effectively stopping targeted voter suppression efforts before they even start. The John Lewis Voting Rights Act would also reverse a number of Supreme Court rulings that uphold discriminatory disenfranchisement practices. This is a crucial opportunity for Senate Democrats to cement necessary voter protections at the federal level, but it won’t happen without first abolishing the arbitrary, obstructive filibuster rule. Right now, Senate Democrats have the votes to reform the filibuster and pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act — the question is, do they have the courage? ** | "Sign up to text" Thanks for your time, Beth Kloser Texas State Director NextGen America | NextGen America** 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

subject: Nancy Pelosi wants this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Peter -- IMPEACH. CONVICT. REMOVE.

I've been beating these drums since the day
Joe Biden took office.
And now, Nancy Pelosi's Democrats and Liz
Cheney are demanding I hand over my phone records to their
January 6 Witch Hunt Committee.

STAND WITH MTG
DONATE 17.76 RIGHT AWAY
Why?

Because members like me stood up for
President Trump and against the Democrat takeover of our
elections.
Make no mistake: this is nothing more than an
attempt to hide China Joe's impeachable activity like the
Afghanistan debacle.
But I'm not backing down!

I'm impeaching Joe Biden.

I've filed a lawsuit to Sue Pelosi for mask
and vaccine mandates.

I'm fighting to Fire Fauci for lying to the
American people.
I'm fighting against the Democrat takeover of
our elections and demanding FULL AUDITS.
So now, the left has painted a huge red
target on my back.
I'm asking for your help.
If you stand with me and want to join the
fight, please chip in a generous contribution right away.
The Democrats would love nothing more than to
expel me for fighting back. But I will never back down with you
in my corner.
For America,

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

body:
You need to see this critical information immediately.

| [ ](https://www.electrepublicans.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYkhf8Ah1OEOdLEYEQfbD4X2WbNwdk9qUIYL8cXqmQBsXiRqXkDmSr1PDUmguH2nxadW0mlkrR6aS78hcdD9frEJSF9rg1JkxFr6GjiF7SVXeEeRTVcubwrXAEy0nA8elKXH_Zh8XawkkPfBMDUktqPHfhBen9FifKt_MCMF7CP-Ph11ArGJIxxR9TzEQ8M77rym6iUphshT40bdAOWqXHuBoiI-ZaTVyrrUiRF1Yvt-XMTZXWB86bqgHUrU1XB_uTYmh5Ex3-YedXukV2pZ4Kmzphd_Q-3D38HKoRMeX2Vfm8MWp7AeUYL0Weop0Pw8vgwmIm8KWzexSVqoZND0ly4omjCwCnxmoOLDl9jEGaeZPdcZvY7mGTpP7lsrv6wNrhA&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=052774008252658996_p&n=1) _Peter -- you need to hear this _right away_._ **[Republicans are falling dangerously behind the Democrats in the critically important fundraising race... by _millions_ of dollars.](https://www.electrepublicans.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYkhf8Ah1OEOdLEYEQfbD4X2WbNwdk9qUIYL8cXqmQBsXiRqXkDmSr1PDUmguH2nxaZ65zEjqENeQB1geGPC2S1meclJGhWZNIEHRBCyUuixDSYbEe5MB-qhAiH6ozNkTGUr-p9-xLkTGP1GvPLZadNoPypvRip_hjHQ_TlcTpoLV-SUZ_nORMZgrT93IKbSdW7eVc81u9NCB4NsYzb5swU1kEFhedIf6MbeTEdVaw_Xb5GrSh1ggsHXoPRIttX-jCkbY0ox0oguc_6kY-6E6I-TSgonANq2rA_ZxEkRr-Q90m6sOpx79n58iB5RqTfZrg4aKml1si6dVdGBLWcfqj7Uke6pvU1r6UYP6ZWPuj7bQdb0hQ9WqFqsH7qYzDMT9AQ&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=052774008252658996_p&n=2)** We’re at risk of losing **EVERYTHING**. clean_body: I’m officially running for governor. | Friend, Your name was at the top of my list of people to reach out to today because of your steadfast support of strong, conservative values, and leadership in Wisconsin. For that I want to say thank you and to make sure you hear the news first... I’m officially announcing my campaign to be Wisconsin’s next governor. With our race already a 50-50 TOSS-UP , we can’t waste a single moment in marshaling the resources to FIRE radical liberal Tony Evers. I’m counting on grassroots conservatives like YOU to help our campaign lay the early foundations for VICTORY. This race isn’t just about taking back one state from the radical Left, it’s about determining the electoral landscape of the entire country for years to come. Winning this race in such an important swing state would strike a major blow to the Left’s chances in 2024. And with our race already a toss-up, your support right now as a Founding Member could truly make all the difference by helping us TAKE THE LEAD right out of the gate. Governors like Tony Evers are the perfect puppets for the Left’s radical agenda, Friend. He instituted lockdowns to curtail your freedoms, all the while VETOING commonsense election security laws... It’s telling that safety and security only matter to radical liberals like Evers when it fits their agenda. We cannot waste one more minute in FIRING Tony Evers. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Karen Bass
subject: The Texas voting law is official.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team --

This week, Governor Greg Abbott officially signed Texas' egregious new voting bill into law. Among other atrocities that will make voting exceedingly difficult for some, the law bans drive-thru voting, 24-hour polling locations, and drop boxes for mail ballots.

Texas is just the latest state to make it harder for people to vote -- especially Black and brown voters. As of September 1, at least 18 states have enacted 30 laws restricting voting rights, impacting over 55 million voters.

Passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act has become a moral imperative, team. We need to restore the Voting Rights Act of 1965 to put a stop to un-democratic voter restrictions and racial discrimination in the election process.

**[I was proud to vote for the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act in the House last month, and now, we need to put pressure on the Senate to bring it to a vote. Sign the petition now to demand the Senate defend our voting rights»](https://act.myngp.com/el/haRX-k3081mYk24HthxvrwS61jxxa2Ew5HtPDQMj0Ho=/2iICSGLlZpjQ8iopmFJrJ3lGvaIJ4xLgSVoBaDkjDXk=?gpsid=39_132_20392&ms=em21_210909_vraa_adv_gq_act_sl2_kb_ettx&refcode=em21_210909_vraa_adv_gq_act_sl2_kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210909_vraa_adv_gq_act_sl2_kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

The right to vote is the foundation of all our other legal rights in America. Trump's Big Lie that the 2020 election was "stolen" will continue to chip away at our democracy unless the Senate acts.

We secured a slim majority in the Senate for moments like this. I am calling on Democratic leaders to step up and vote for the John Lewis VRAA without delay. The voting rights of 55 million Americans and counting depend on it.

**[Please join me in calling on the Senate to put a stop to these attacks on voting rights. Add your name next to mine.](https://act.myngp.com/el/haRX-k3081mYk24HthxvrwS61jxxa2Ew5HtPDQMj0Ho=/2iICSGLlZpjQ8iopmFJrJ3lGvaIJ4xLgSVoBaDkjDXk=?gpsid=39_132_20392&ms=em21_210909_vraa_adv_gq_act_sl2_kb_ettx&refcode=em21_210909_vraa_adv_gq_act_sl2_kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210909_vraa_adv_gq_act_sl2_kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

In solidarity,

Karen Bass

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/haRX-k3081mYk24HthxvrwS61jxxa2Ew5HtPDQMj0Ho=/HXMz2_t3fdkiJGz5THmtmuvy9wTX97_2lyYAWVwDcNo=?gpsid=39_132_20142&refcode=em21_210909_vraa_adv_gq_act_sl2_kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210909_vraa_adv_gq_act_sl2_kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)

Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Will you endorse me for U.S. Senate?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I have President Trump’s endorsement, but I want to know: do I have yours? I have President Trump's endorsement, but I want to know: do I have yours? |
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ee6a7bbb6099451d89a3cdf976481001&_e=7sCkwHRbjca7Pzof-ff3kf-vnw5XrrEfgspaT3pDstChCOdoAZYVytHJc1tfg8sZWifVXUOspIpI50uh0pp-8LQbI8wd1g85wAsHJJ3vVAOmahZCaKHJCtSfXH5IZnXj1bO2igcakElqqZvW0y_RPSZ28_2tB1M7-qQDRqu5j03JT8uMc3yDn_Lm-VHEKQ6ZuWghAFmDwdLPzieahjY-mnIsxA1fPYgND0X_rqVbEBiDnhFZL2DzByUwFHjhRallXDTdx5QkZxPA6vquBxOpLHv6_FMz71SS1k2-vPLxLftnTD84uWMHWaAxjg-Cvqy_VVGYFE3urz8rM_O9expupsuH2Xzc4G2dwb1XtbLHbd_nji3m2nuBywftF536hb31MYHl2pB6Sb6Ss8nAYFAAw0cTZxRr1-cV_HB5ewpmx0ezcne7hOqR74TnKPuqbILwrQuI5TM8J7v4w5zj0FnI5xJ0tCTsivFIsk-nHlaSsdgbmU-cwZoyGjl6qsqo_I1GhK2CNKsnBwZVcFHWSJMO0t1vyH0WcAxE-yWspSdop5rOzaHDIi9w8MvjTSPuMiIl)

---
Fellow American,

By now, you may have heard the news that President Trump has formally endorsed my campaign for the United States Senate! I've known the President for a long time, and I'm proud to call him my friend.

In case you missed my email announcing the President's support, let me quickly recap for you what he had to say in his endorsement release:

| _"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."_ - President Donald J. Trump
---

Now, while I'm very grateful for President Trump's support of my campaign, the truth of the matter is that I won't get anywhere on my own. I'm a team player - always have been - and I need you on my team. _**[So, I'm asking you to join my team today by offering your personal endorsement of my campaign.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ee6a7bbb6099451d89a3cdf976481001&_e=7sCkwHRbjca7Pzof-ff3kf-vnw5XrrEfgspaT3pDstChCOdoAZYVytHJc1tfg8sZWifVXUOspIpI50uh0pp-8LQbI8wd1g85wAsHJJ3vVAOmahZCaKHJCtSfXH5IZnXj1bO2igcakElqqZvW0y_RPSZ28_2tB1M7-qQDRqu5j03JT8uMc3yDn_Lm-VHEKQ6ZuWghAFmDwdLPzieahjY-mnIsxA1fPYgND0X_rqVbEBiDnhFZL2DzByUwFHjhRallXDTdx5QkZxPA6vquBxOpLHv6_FMz71SS1k2-vPLxLftnTD84uWMHWaAxjg-Cvqy_VVGYFE3urz8rM_O9expupsuH2Xzc4G2dwb1XtbLHbd8U7VrELfYSm70zCK6-45ArAA0gOUfz3jbyVKtxLZBrEkgVQ71CFqrgJ9stHwcxgqrrpMkq6lQ4LVE7yzvrxMbgokvl7AsyTXEw3g_ABtV1Vx4Ew98eO0yDqv2Xh9iFmo1esqCREEUAweiZxwtsI0En1i3pYc9Y2hwsvuFNM1wARo8F69bGR-Z8_JsHXVYVRRHme1t5q2ZvtUjcEF0hbuHB)**_

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ee6a7bbb6099451d89a3cdf976481001&_e=7sCkwHRbjca7Pzof-ff3kf-vnw5XrrEfgspaT3pDstChCOdoAZYVytHJc1tfg8sZWifVXUOspIpI50uh0pp-8LQbI8wd1g85wAsHJJ3vVAOmahZCaKHJCtSfXH5IZnXj1bO2igcakElqqZvW0y_RPSZ28_2tB1M7-qQDRqu5j03JT8uMc3yDn_Lm-VHEKQ6ZuWghAFmDwdLPzieahjY-mnIsxA1fPYgND0X_rqVbEBiDnhFZL2DzByUwFHjhRallXDTdx5QkZxPA6vquBxOpLHv6_FMz71SS1k2-vPLxLftnTD84uWMHWaAxjg-Cvqy_VVGYFE3urz8rM_O9expupsuH2Xzc4G2dwb1XtbLHbd-baeqQF3p356iOuqj-BAyVkfyotipeW-6uDTGs28Gz1mC8JcehZa6tIr6FYw50fDsk8Gg2zVuzfnTDCaVL8T0nnmEOvaVWORVk1s1ZeNxIEq_c5tZe-EmtBJ2X2VZP5t7HqRgGT-aZyGRKDVXYQ118MncoTbATv9MU4SRBU1hmFtPVGZ6v3D7uz0uBccFQyFWTy1bpH2n408t86d78jDgG)
President Trump is right: **I will never let you down.** I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure EVERY AMERICAN - regardless of income level, race, or religion, has the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

Democrats know that I'm the biggest threat to their Senate majority and are already raising massive sums of money in an attempt to blunt my campaign before we really get rolling. **[This is why it's crucial that you join Team Herschel today.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ee6a7bbb6099451d89a3cdf976481001&_e=7sCkwHRbjca7Pzof-ff3kf-vnw5XrrEfgspaT3pDstChCOdoAZYVytHJc1tfg8sZWifVXUOspIpI50uh0pp-8LQbI8wd1g85wAsHJJ3vVAOmahZCaKHJCtSfXH5IZnXj1bO2igcakElqqZvW0y_RPSZ28_2tB1M7-qQDRqu5j03JT8uMc3yDn_Lm-VHEKQ6ZuWghAFmDwdLPzieahjY-mnIsxA1fPYgND0X_rqVbEBiDnhFZL2DzByUwFHjhRallXDTdx5QkZxPA6vquBxOpLHv6_FMz71SS1k2-vPLxLftnTD84uWMHWaAxjg-Cvqy_VVGYFE3urz8rM_O9expupsuH2Xzc4G2dwb1XtbLHbd-LZ5GF__eeQdZrqeN5RQTVvEOmBt4WWXUQNuxcIA9lKqkW1iGebhhIf4YbgdUHmsFyIcKi8bbHy96jLcXINftBm0S6Y8KcoPkkJfMBCH5iY4Ogxg-Ayw_Zw3prg-aXFZ7wvfoWLXhfBl_e-EHcRXGY0JRF-VxxK-gV6mfFC5Mw5aSgBCvKXhsBg1ToIHPMLhzMht7t4T6jItVAhhhPfrSj)**

The number one threat to our prosperity as a nation is the unified Democrat control of Washington. I've chosen not to sit on the sidelines and watch President Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Raphael Warnock wreck our great country. **[You have to make a choice to not sit on the sidelines, either.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ee6a7bbb6099451d89a3cdf976481001&_e=7sCkwHRbjca7Pzof-ff3kf-vnw5XrrEfgspaT3pDstChCOdoAZYVytHJc1tfg8sZWifVXUOspIpI50uh0pp-8LQbI8wd1g85wAsHJJ3vVAOmahZCaKHJCtSfXH5IZnXj1bO2igcakElqqZvW0y_RPSZ28_2tB1M7-qQDRqu5j03JT8uMc3yDn_Lm-VHEKQ6ZuWghAFmDwdLPzieahjY-mnIsxA1fPYgND0X_rqVbEBiDnhFZL2DzByUwFHjhRallXDTdx5QkZxPA6vquBxOpLHv6_FMz71SS1k2-vPLxLftnTD84uWMHWaAxjg-Cvqy_VVGYFE3urz8rM_O9expupsuH2Xzc4G2dwb1XtbLHbd_hivH-JGZizX0kayMyO9UiT21HoViU1sG3K_p6ylAjaCPQ1uBxZiaWf4PQfIUzZH3rb4RWpcLOt5EZrN9gZ7jhJw1kvLV8fS9_SEOHy1mleR3enlYdSEN_0XIh07-KwXcpuqdl2N0mbIdLfohw6_RdAvLkn6aHDXcxurKLYlBggTmPCxIpTnDnibDKdOfkkgQNK7wIry2wWTZEjAXuSS1U)** The stakes are too high.

**[Your endorsement today](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ee6a7bbb6099451d89a3cdf976481001&_e=7sCkwHRbjca7Pzof-ff3kf-vnw5XrrEfgspaT3pDstChCOdoAZYVytHJc1tfg8sZWifVXUOspIpI50uh0pp-8LQbI8wd1g85wAsHJJ3vVAOmahZCaKHJCtSfXH5IZnXj1bO2igcakElqqZvW0y_RPSZ28_2tB1M7-qQDRqu5j03JT8uMc3yDn_Lm-VHEKQ6ZuWghAFmDwdLPzieahjY-mnIsxA1fPYgND0X_rqVbEBiDnhFZL2DzByUwFHjhRallXDTdx5QkZxPA6vquBxOpLHv6_FMz71SS1k2-vPLxLftnTD84uWMHWaAxjg-Cvqy_VVGYFE3urz8rM_O9expupsuH2Xzc4G2dwb1XtbLHbd-e1B4qIYOG2jhJtYABGS33_CBz1U6tleQKZpf0xtEg-NvguiayC2Z3CoiaI0qSMAlCjj-1vzfRt69KHhXP3tZjzMLTfvgsgmEHoaLwzB7QClK6dIhTczpoiquKPqb_X-WTqi-A_pUWlU5UUuQGOzb67qAXYTDLo5nIA5LWCLNgMHj-dx-pbss0FlPu0szJpZxOQ_QOIWqGu9hzn3avmaXa)** will benefit my campaign immediately and serve me and my team well as we work to flip Georgia's Senate seat RED and restore some sanity to Washington, DC.

Thank you very much,

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ee6a7bbb6099451d89a3cdf976481001&_e=7sCkwHRbjca7Pzof-ff3kf-vnw5XrrEfgspaT3pDstChCOdoAZYVytHJc1tfg8sZWifVXUOspIpI50uh0pp-8LQbI8wd1g85wAsHJJ3vVAOmahZCaKHJCtSfXH5IZnXj1bO2igcakElqqZvW0y_RPSZ28_2tB1M7-qQDRqu5j03JT8uMc3yDn_Lm-VHEKQ6ZuWghAFmDwdLPzieahjY-mnIsxA1fPYgND0X_rqVbEBiDnhFZL2DzByUwFHjhRallXDTdx5QkZxPA6vquBxOpLHv6_FMz71SS1k2-vPLxLftnTD84uWMHWaAxjg-Cvqy_VVGYFE3urz8rM_O9expupsuH2Xzc4G2dwb1XtbLHbd_--frOkQqU0zSZD25T2Q2_EYe2gViyn1BZXRBUFpQh4hF_qDiOeyMmMnWyqJkZkq28iYSjm4LQ806T7ZrlYEUjSRjXr32K14sOdbVtEmqQVqVtqjDCMVB4LKX15jGCqxsJEAWUHIx31U3PEUE04DA5iE91NJIJhMll7ZF3XBWjZSlxuFCUvM0WdMaTLXMBAhpCCINw9oSLVVC3qpj1tiCu)
