clean_body: I have President Trump’s endorsement, but I want to know: do I have yours? I have President Trump's endorsement, but I want to know: do I have yours? | Fellow American, By now, you may have heard the news that President Trump has formally endorsed my campaign for the United States Senate! I've known the President for a long time, and I'm proud to call him my friend. In case you missed my email announcing the President's support, let me quickly recap for you what he had to say in his endorsement release: | "Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down." - President Donald J. Trump Now, while I'm very grateful for President Trump's support of my campaign, the truth of the matter is that I won't get anywhere on my own. I'm a team player - always have been - and I need you on my team. President Trump is right: I will never let you down. I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure EVERY AMERICAN - regardless of income level, race, or religion, has the opportunity to pursue their dreams. Democrats know that I'm the biggest threat to their Senate majority and are already raising massive sums of money in an attempt to blunt my campaign before we really get rolling. The number one threat to our prosperity as a nation is the unified Democrat control of Washington. I've chosen not to sit on the sidelines and watch President Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Raphael Warnock wreck our great country. The stakes are too high. will benefit my campaign immediately and serve me and my team well as we work to flip Georgia's Senate seat RED and restore some sanity to Washington, DC. Thank you very much, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

subject: re: California recall

body:

#
Derek — In just a moment, and for the last time, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to help me defeat this Republican-led recall attempt in California. Please give me a chance to explain why this request – especially today – is so important. Here is the truth: 5 days from now this recall will be over, but we still have a lot of work to do. Our job over the course of the next 5 days is to make sure that everyone who wants to **vote no** on this recall does so before it's too late. That takes financial resources. So we are hoping for as many donations as we can possibly get between now and midnight, which is the last chance for us to put our money to work over the final weekend and through Election Day. So here is the part where I ask...for the last time: **Can I count on you to make a contribution to our campaigns to help defeat this partisan, Republican-led recall before it is too late? name: Jerrod Sessler for Congress
subject: Announcing Sessler Session LIVE! We want you on our show!!
body:
Consider yourself informed
| | | | |
---
| Announcing Sessler Session LIVE! We want you on our show!!
---
Greetings!
The past couple of weeks have been horrifying for anyone who loves this country and what it stands for. As a military vet, I am ashamed and embarrassed at the humiliating way our troops were ordered to leave Afghanistan, leaving behind American citizens, a thing that would have seemed unheard of until now.
This administration has failed us in ways that no one could have imagined. We have turned tail and left in defeat while the Taliban strut around in victory in our fatigues, with our guns, driving our humvees, hanging Christians from our helicopters, and without doubt, planning another attack on our soil.
This week, I am starting a weekly show where we discuss issues the mainstream media is either too afraid or too brainwashed to talk about.
---
|
---
| You can find out more about the show [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-JaUj31J512S9TRHHtqF4DZPqFUwUMIMUqBf9CFILGhwD8hDtuRFOMVrqJBJsXmFwF2T3qO9N1K4U8uMMRu4KTZCeHPTY9YDDbJpXpB3OY_biCZeaLGxOCDompwGNO5BN7rnuU34MqoH8JfrClgLCA==&c=8YuRXAWB4u4Rw8l3D-D26xbTMXZy-Bau5QqvqkefM_t0gI0z6CKPdA==&ch=KVWw873Udih2ctF2Sk7YlSaGMIfaqi5YG-_4-CAccj4WwX448euMew==). clean_body: Consider yourself informed | | | | | | Announcing Sessler Session LIVE! We want you on our show!! Greetings! The past couple of weeks have been horrifying for anyone who loves this country and what it stands for. As a military vet, I am ashamed and embarrassed at the humiliating way our troops were ordered to leave Afghanistan, leaving behind American citizens, a thing that would have seemed unheard of until now. This administration has failed us in ways that no one could have imagined. We have turned tail and left in defeat while the Taliban strut around in victory in our fatigues, with our guns, driving our humvees, hanging Christians from our helicopters, and without doubt, planning another attack on our soil. This week, I am starting a weekly show where we discuss issues the mainstream media is either too afraid or too brainwashed to talk about. | | You can find out more about the show ==. Please join me, send in your comments, and questions and let's make history together! body:
Never underestimate it. As a veteran of the Afghanistan conflict three times over -- I’m am DISGUSTED. For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=b2e564bab9e54941a4d270104f3cd313&_t=-KYBLbTiK7_pObshNvf80uuvtDBx4OJC-ljHLZCpYgBXVKMtdnthRrWUVraCfl4mtPQOjZnM7Ot1GpjE5Zy0jK8dzis20b98siSRqC_nrjKkdMswOi-z5yxJvIxluhh7CBHFjx9xdnmUFCEsxptKzrDeN_isj9HGLyCCJdqCXVE%3D) | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=b2e564bab9e54941a4d270104f3cd313&_e=Cf7BlArb39QU5uyc4o_ojmaAfuKpqwWa6Ee1p7eztLrqBy9L2oS80SEVUm8TlE7O7dR5XmC06mutrlEJn-02UONliQWe61vByW0eyJrZY86cXCRS41qh1WKLdD9ha_szeXJgOswT-BuSO_uQSrYCwtrR8T80x4tfNKBjfwCQV7a2QEinQ52ehJS1N8vExLdITtZUq29QsAVACH-fLrKZwHQISN1jT8i2v7nLsrWHfhltJiePp2H9x7ym9olNhGz4LXSXgqa-P9UtUp9tA9SwOZlADiq1N7UdtIT9PEFuBp4KPCmp0U-cdhEa9e1ecU4DpfZyAzjaMLSaJgxw7S7775LRKSaH0LdlOSqarhZlvOzdM3G4VqfKg3vKZux_X3lxZTtj5a3XQt9VOo9T7uRxTJRMmBYNPWsE5Cd8bVPQD5LuHjDrQ4sdlrFstIqE5-r35IiikznY6-cXGTMCEduk8K_4949vJO6zzI5LNAxTOz8%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

With the 20th anniversary of 9/11 right around the corner, I’m reflecting on everything that’s happened in the 20 years between the terror attacks of that September IN 2001 and the September day in which we’re currently living.

I’m reflecting on the 2,977 souls that were lost 20 years ago who never knew that a proud, yet wounded nation, went to war to avenge their deaths; 2,977 Americans who would never know the term “social media” or have a Facebook account, or an iPhone.

**September 11th is without doubt the main reason that both my wife and I enlisted to serve our nation in the armed forces**. Now, I’m running for Congress. Which makes a lot of folks ask “why?”

Because after 20 years of further death and heartache throughout the War on Terror, we have a Democrat controlled Congress - led by a Democrat president - hellbent on ending a war against Islamic extremists, for no other apparent reason than that it plays well with the liberal base.

As a veteran of the Afghanistan conflict t**hree times** over - I**’m am DISGUSTED.**

| [**Are you DISGUSTED? SEND AN AFGHAN VET TO CONGRESS ->** ](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=b2e564bab9e54941a4d270104f3cd313&_e=Cf7BlArb39QU5uyc4o_ojmaAfuKpqwWa6Ee1p7eztLrqBy9L2oS80SEVUm8TlE7O7dR5XmC06mutrlEJn-02UONliQWe61vByW0eyJrZY86cXCRS41qh1WKLdD9ha_szeXJgOswT-BuSO_uQSrYCwtrR8T80x4tfNKBjfwCQV7a2QEinQ52ehJS1N8vExLdITtZUq29QsAVACH-fLrKZwHQISN1jT8i2v7nLsrWHfhltJiePp2H9x7ym9olNhGz4LXSXgqa-P9UtUp9tA9SwOfAo55emfzZh3-5e7B8bcAnNEfQjOJe_pisgj-V5bkXFnfuXFNNaNIRg-xsg-BDe49nrGXYwNB_J13VOBiNh37Ip4BwHhFi-Db3wn66Vg05kqiOhiXLFg58T5EasKg3nYtAqAicDIBq-tXbDxcBjCf1axaznYFT17Pda1igzzqz_MJFzwSKNh6k6J9UwytaSlJTY1gj9RyAWV7GmF7CY-rE%3D)
---

But wait, what about all of the so called “ _**moderate**_ ” Democrats in Congress, some might ask? Aren’t _they_ supposed to hold the President and the far-left accountable when they swerve too far to the left?

Apparently not. **They hide**. **They give no interviews**. Their playbook is to lay low for a couple of news cycles and hope that Americans forget that their leadership is deplorable.

If you’re disgusted by the humiliation our country has endured thanks to Biden and Congressional Democrats over the past month,**[I’m asking you to make a donation to my campaign today](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=b2e564bab9e54941a4d270104f3cd313&_e=Cf7BlArb39QU5uyc4o_ojmaAfuKpqwWa6Ee1p7eztLrqBy9L2oS80SEVUm8TlE7O7dR5XmC06mutrlEJn-02UONliQWe61vByW0eyJrZY86cXCRS41qh1WKLdD9ha_szeXJgOswT-BuSO_uQSrYCwtrR8T80x4tfNKBjfwCQV7a2QEinQ52ehJS1N8vExLdITtZUq29QsAVACH-fLrKZwHQISN1jT8i2v7nLsrWHfhltJiePp2H9x7ym9olNhGz4LXSXgqa-P9UtUp9tA9SwOahxVUOFMrPYjaHAc86P3B_QcwBFQCiRZo15imbXmOqszbAEhMQXVAR9xxwrZTWKkyQn5ZNpZtx3tSfseRBr4q4mZEM0fwsseerH9GgdTbfCuZ-8W7QiZ4pGflnUH3QrEUwC1ZYK1cFYgx4CFeo_HBLd1l26S8YA3EJq9artfsYHdZIa4wu7sa-rwdz2X6BnkIy0qGWjFlNiuBMlRxgn7HQ%3D)** , which I'll use to wage a serious campaign against one of the so called "moderates."

**Should I make it to Congress, I can GUARANTEE you that I’ll stand up to any president, Republican or Democrat, if they’re acting against the interests of the United States.**

[**SEND AN AFGHAN VET TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ->** ](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=b2e564bab9e54941a4d270104f3cd313&_e=Cf7BlArb39QU5uyc4o_ojmaAfuKpqwWa6Ee1p7eztLrqBy9L2oS80SEVUm8TlE7O7dR5XmC06mutrlEJn-02UONliQWe61vByW0eyJrZY86cXCRS41qh1WKLdD9ha_szeXJgOswT-BuSO_uQSrYCwtrR8T80x4tfNKBjfwCQV7a2QEinQ52ehJS1N8vExLdITtZUq29QsAVACH-fLrKZwHQISN1jT8i2v7nLsrWHfhltJiePp2H9x7ym9olNhGz4LXSXgqa-P9UtUp9tA9SwOU1Hhdvw7597AqmVCjWJ0F6TiH2h5qaUGTndX056nlIzYporyRklFV_GZJvjjSrIFDa2PQ2l4bhnoAI8HF4R2uG6unvunXwhAS7XVthqcyJNdE3GIcvMoHrJNIZJ_wZriMNifwr99znTZHvtDnwuyKL5PHRb4dHXiohdMSzR-XfZoZ6UxWf5q1Saurvf24d5bHmF5pc3a9caOiKOmmQrI9g%3D)
---

Under President Biden and the Democrat majority's leadership we continue to allow the Taliban, a declared Foreign Terrorist Organization to dictate what we, the United States of America do.

**UNBELIEVABLE!!**

**Despite what Democrats may say, the truth of the matter is that** President Biden has the ability to send 850-1200 Special Operators from our Special Mission Units (SMUs) that will **literally send the Taliban running back into Pakistan with their tails tucked between their legs**.

**Trust me, I know. I spent six years covertly tracking the Islamic extremists who attacked our outpost in Benghazi across the Sahara Desert**.

Some will say that “the war on terror has been successful in achieving its primary objective: **preventing terrorist attacks in the U.S**.” Don’t count on the United States remaining safe for long. The “ _New_ ” Taliban will give safe haven to terror groups just as they did the last time they were in power. **It’s only a matter of time before we’re hit at home again if we don’t do anything to stop terror from taking root in and around Afghanistan**.

We’ve got to act now, which is why**[I’m asking you to chip in whatever you can right now to help send me to Congress](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=b2e564bab9e54941a4d270104f3cd313&_e=Cf7BlArb39QU5uyc4o_ojmaAfuKpqwWa6Ee1p7eztLrqBy9L2oS80SEVUm8TlE7O7dR5XmC06mutrlEJn-02UONliQWe61vByW0eyJrZY86cXCRS41qh1WKLdD9ha_szeXJgOswT-BuSO_uQSrYCwtrR8T80x4tfNKBjfwCQV7a2QEinQ52ehJS1N8vExLdITtZUq29QsAVACH-fLrKZwHQISN1jT8i2v7nLsrWHfhltJiePp2H9x7ym9olNhGz4LXSXgqa-P9UtUp9tA9SwOQ4FfMeS_MEFc8lv1GjQIVQYEyoC14SrU0NKyUhvBmDGvSJoW1Zm73lVj-JpipJkpQNXXoJ_jKr27nWiXzm80H4fpeDIi03FMGWTZ5J4AErO5FsXsreZ0sSvTFwYvYWtqZ1uZapw7KMfGNSx1RsPZxwkM6vn-ZOEJT2N4YV890lH_MK9d5KG2mhTPpQKLZY_tyJYtDzC6RtlI8RGZEF8Xrc%3D)**. Unlike my “moderate” Democrat opponent, I won’t be quiet when the going gets tough. I’ve fought for this country on battlefields from Libya to Iraq to Afghanistan – and I promise to take the fight to floor of the U.S. House.

[**SEND AN AFGHAN VET TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ->** ](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=b2e564bab9e54941a4d270104f3cd313&_e=Cf7BlArb39QU5uyc4o_ojmaAfuKpqwWa6Ee1p7eztLrqBy9L2oS80SEVUm8TlE7O7dR5XmC06mutrlEJn-02UONliQWe61vByW0eyJrZY86cXCRS41qh1WKLdD9ha_szeXJgOswT-BuSO_uQSrYCwtrR8T80x4tfNKBjfwCQV7a2QEinQ52ehJS1N8vExLdITtZUq29QsAVACH-fLrKZwHQISN1jT8i2v7nLsrWHfhltJiePp2H9x7ym9olNhGz4LXSXgqa-P9UtUp9tA9SwOdHuts-Rur_vY7-nEVN5Zrq3ZdQTZX9xxlTjFIOp8HuMCy3vBiosE07P13Gq2wtsn_YZgImiHu1-LMG4wgTh7ncZ0uhydTK36aN19kb6UzWMjsybd419eiC6qYloPGURxwieiRvmX7sINI8FYkqWJw16oqzx-BJIFDiPrysZXa0kHRzSZFmg0LHU2Dv34wGQZSLb7k98BMq9H7m_5uuL1U0%3D)
---

**If we do not come together for and elect a Republican Congress in 2022, we are essentially conceding to the entire world that America is no longer a reliable ally, that America can no longer be trusted, that America no longer has the will to fight**!

This I know is simply not true, I know that we Americans stand ready to fight for what we believe in, that we Americans uphold and fulfill our promises, we are a proud nation and should never apologize for that - We the people must end this feckless incompetent leadership.

Democrats have embarrassed us all.

Remember this when you vote.

For America
John Castorani
[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=b2e564bab9e54941a4d270104f3cd313&_e=Cf7BlArb39QU5uyc4o_ojmaAfuKpqwWa6Ee1p7eztLrqBy9L2oS80SEVUm8TlE7O7dR5XmC06mutrlEJn-02UONliQWe61vByW0eyJrZY86cXCRS41qh1WKLdD9ha_szeXJgOswT-BuSO_uQSrYCwtrR8T80x4tfNKBjfwCQV7a2QEinQ52ehJS1N8vExLdITtZUq29QsAVACH-fLrKZwHQISN1jT8i2v7nLsrWHfhltJiePp2H9x7ym9olNhGz4LXSXgqa-P9UtUp9tA9SwOVXPnRniOyh7eRwD0B_ffwhP_L30GnxtgQiuUHuyYbUvRqt02TfDQDe9x-NMDUND3bZLFPXmgr4nbMfUPV2S76HP5nOd4ko8kC0bYe_4CueEhStiMt1ZRYMQSL4eCNC0imk0KHyH7b8zvV_CUTzzO0ExQRYgg3I-TCHQid5WI1JXLd1FrSV7KqfXZXZp3Pyn4puGBBjvkJOT6dIx03fJJ6Y%3D)
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

P.O. BOX 390
ORANGE, VA 22960

It’s only a matter of time before we’re hit at home again if we don’t do anything to stop terror from taking root in and around Afghanistan. We’ve got to act now, which is why. Unlike my “moderate” Democrat opponent, I won’t be quiet when the going gets tough. I’ve fought for this country on battlefields from Libya to Iraq to Afghanistan – and I promise to take the fight to floor of the U.S. House. If we do not come together for and elect a Republican Congress in 2022, we are essentially conceding to the entire world that America is no longer a reliable ally, that America can no longer be trusted, that America no longer has the will to fight! This I know is simply not true, I know that we Americans stand ready to fight for what we believe in, that we Americans uphold and fulfill our promises, we are a proud nation and should never apologize for that - We the people must end this feckless incompetent leadership. Democrats have embarrassed us all. Remember this when you vote. For America John Castorani Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07 | Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia P.O. BOX 390 ORANGE, VA 22960

body:
CNN rated North Carolina’s Senate seat as one of the three most likely to flip to Democrats in 2022.
#

CNN rated North Carolina’s Senate seat as one of the three most likely to flip to Democrats in 2022.
Their analysis makes clear that Republicans have good reason to be worried too:
**“The open seat created by Burr's retirement is giving Democrats an opening -- potentially with more diverse candidates who could help them drive minority turnout.”**
That’s exactly what our campaign is going to do, but it means we are counting on critical early investments that allow us to organize now.

body:
Late last month, seven Capitol Police officers filed a lawsuit against Trump and far-right organizations for their role in the January 6 insurrection -- including the Proud Boys, Oath Keepers, and Roger Stone. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35487951/305219773/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ5Y2VkZjI1LWEwMTEtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WljMhcPcRlsOu3MPKPujn3r8r0C1MXzvSg4pu-W0S84=&emci=0aeab0cd-8711-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=49cedf25-a011-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=16335001) Team,

The lawsuit claims what we've been saying all along: Trump "worked with white supremacists, violent extremist groups, and campaign supporters to violate the Ku Klux Klan Act, and commit acts of domestic terrorism in an unlawful effort to stay in power."

These brave officers put their lives on the line that day and faced physical and verbal abuse from the white supremacist mob. Now, they're working to hold Trump and his allies accountable for their attacks on our democracy.

We're standing with the Capitol Police officers as they fight for justice and work to ensure an event like January 6 never happens again. Are you with us?

body:
Please consider joining me as we discuss how to win back CD 13 and take back Congress! | | | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=5deac51f2c&e=c2296cffff)

| | | Friend,

I want to personally thank you for being one of the most important supporters of my campaign.

Your help enabled me to be one of the top candidates in the country last year, with over $1 million in contributions to my campaign for Congress!

Given that Charlie Crist is vacating this Congressional seat to run for Governor, we now have an OPEN seat. The Republican legislature will redraw the lines as the district is short almost 50,000 voters.

This gives us a fantastic opportunity to take back this seat to the days of the late Rep. Bill Young.

**JOIN ME at one of my upcoming campaign events in Pinellas County:**

**Wednesday, September 15, 5-7 pm**
[St. Petersburg Yacht Club](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=f961f26e5e&e=c2296cffff)

Host: Belleair Shore Mayor Bob Schmidt
With Pinellas Mayors: Leslie Waters (Seminole), Bill Queen (North Redington Beach), John Hendricks (Madeira Beach), David Will (Redington Beach)

I hope you are able to make it, as we discuss how we can win back this Pinellas seat and take back Congress!

name: Sen. Raphael Warnock
subject: Raphael here, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friend —
**There’s no other way to put it: Mark Kelly and I are the two most vulnerable senators up for re-election.** While we’ve spent our brief time in office fighting to get pandemic relief to struggling families and get our economy back on track, National Republicans have had their eyes on 2022 and are already smearing our records and attacking us.
Here's why we need your help: **With only one seat standing between Mitch McConnell and the Senate majority, losing either one of these races means losing control of the Senate.** But while GOP megadonors and dark-money groups have millions to spend to try and buy these seats, our people-powered campaigns rely on the grassroots support of people like you.
[**That's why I'm personally asking for your help, friend: Will you split $5 or more right now between my campaign and Mark Kelly’s to help us defend these seats and hold the Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-warnock-sept21?refcode=em210909-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1288_6688874_TrFvVB&akid=1288%2E6688874%2ETrFvVB)
**Remember: With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to win back control – and we’re their top targets.**
If we fail to defend Georgia and Arizona, Mitch McConnell will retake full control and try to pull us backward.
**Friend – I need you with me to win. Every dollar helps give us the resources we need to fight back against whatever Republicans throw our way. I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support:**

name: Left Action
subject: Petition: Cancel student debt now
body:
Here's a sensible plan to curb this crushing debt
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
# [URGE BIDEN TO TAKE ACTION AGAINST STUDENT DEBT](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfe277ebe-4162-4792-bfb2-7ca9a6d7b15a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Over 44 MILLION Americans carry more than $1.7 trillion of student debt. This crushing burden is preventing millions from buying homes, starting businesses, saving for retirement, or even starting families. **[Here’s the good news: the Biden administration can cancel student debt without Congressional action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b5b6ffa-2534-4860-b7ca-4b4f17df518d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**. And we are joining with the ACLU in urging them to cancel up to $50,000 in student debt per borrower right now, to provide at least some breathing room for all borrowers. We need as many people as possible to show support to make this happen. [SIGN NOW TO STAND WITH THE ACLU AND URGE THE BIDEN ADMIN TO ACT NOW AGAINST STUDENT DEBT → ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T87984444-1805-4d7a-85ad-29be4b5abb34/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T06138c79-afd6-4869-b8ac-29461a440ae9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
## **Want to take action on another front?**
[List of current LeftAction Actions](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b9cbffe-44df-466c-bad4-158334fdb7d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). If you can, make a donation to help us cover expenses.

name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: Tell me what matters most to you in Tennessee’s next governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
Greetings from Centerville, Hickman County, Peter! Today is the first day of my roadtrip to all 95 Tennessee counties in 95 days. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35488867/305222982/-1314262958?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210909survey_JM_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzMzYWRiNS1hMjExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CEyeuJREMwDmiAWgojDs5ysgu5Tvu7FtG1nbIOmo4Y8=)
---
Greetings from Centerville, Hickman County, Peter! Today is the first day of my roadtrip to all 95 Tennessee counties in 95 days. I’m so looking forward to hearing from the people of our great state — from the cities to the mountains to the valleys and everything in between — about what they’re looking for in our next governor. Because it’s time we stop putting politics over people, and start working to make Tennessee a place that supports and uplifts everyone, from cradle to schools to careers. That means we’ve got to start listening again. **That’s why I’m doing this tour: to listen.** To be a governor that can fight for all Tennesseans, I need to hear directly from people in our communities — you! — about what matters most to them. I want to know what keeps you up at night, and what you need from your leaders not just to survive and keep your heads above water, but to thrive. I know it can be tough to make it to one of our in-person events, especially with busy work schedules, kids to care for, and the surge in COVID-19 cases (my staff and I are taking extra precautions to mitigate this risk). **But I wanted to make sure you have the opportunity to make your voice heard, so I had my team create a survey that’ll let you do just that.** [_**Can you take our issues survey to help me be a governor who fully understands what Tennesseans care about?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35488868/305222984/-740490373?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzMzYWRiNS1hMjExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CEyeuJREMwDmiAWgojDs5ysgu5Tvu7FtG1nbIOmo4Y8=&emci=f533adb5-a211-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=f733adb5-a211-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=9304149) [**__**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35488869/305222986/-740490373?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzMzYWRiNS1hMjExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CEyeuJREMwDmiAWgojDs5ysgu5Tvu7FtG1nbIOmo4Y8=&emci=f533adb5-a211-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=f733adb5-a211-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=9304149) | [Take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35488870/305222988/-740490373?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzMzYWRiNS1hMjExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CEyeuJREMwDmiAWgojDs5ysgu5Tvu7FtG1nbIOmo4Y8=&emci=f533adb5-a211-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=f733adb5-a211-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=9304149)
---
I’ve said this a hundred times already since we jumped into this race last week, but it’s always worth repeating: This is _**our**_ campaign. It’s a collective movement for the people of Tennessee to stop the division plaguing our politics and start working to meet the needs of everyone who lives here.
Let’s get to work.
Dr. Jason Martin

[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35488871/305222991/-1314262958?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210909survey_JM_all_xx_ftr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzMzYWRiNS1hMjExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CEyeuJREMwDmiAWgojDs5ysgu5Tvu7FtG1nbIOmo4Y8=)

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Exciting news
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
I have some exciting news to share with you today. I’m honored to have received the endorsement of one of Anne Arundel County’s very best leaders, Delegate J. Sandy Bartlett, and I’m delighted to share with you our newly-released video!
As Delegate for House District 32 in Anne Arundel County, Sandy has been an ardent champion for Maryland’s working families, and has played a leading role in the fight to reform our criminal justice system and keep our communities safer.
You can learn more about why she’s endorsing me by checking out our newly released video below:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sandybartlettendorsement?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sandybartlettendorsement?amount=20.22]This is a big moment for our campaign -- and we’re just getting started. Because every week for the next 2 months, we’ll be sharing with you a new video featuring a major endorsement from elected officials from all across the state.
From Mountain Maryland to the Eastern Shore, our people-powered movement is growing stronger by the day. The enthusiasm and energy that I’m seeing from Marylanders on the campaign trail has been truly heartwarming. But here’s the truth: we still need your help if we’re going to win this. This is a highly competitive race, and we’re going to need all hands on deck to stay ahead and get to the finish line.
That’s why I am humbly asking for your support today. If you are able, will you chip in to help us maintain our momentum and win this race?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sandybartlettendorsement?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sandybartlettendorsement?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sandybartlettendorsement?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sandybartlettendorsement?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sandybartlettendorsement]I can’t thank you enough for your continued support of my campaign. Together, we’re going to change the way that government does business, and deliver on the concrete points of progress that will lift all of Maryland’s working families into the quality of life that they deserve.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sandybartlettendorsement?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/7abf9871-b910-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/9909dabb-a211-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTA5ZGFiYi1hMjExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sjjwgfPnjtzfE9xQn2RWuZ5KEB3ndhjw1LYE5veFoZ0=&id=136194660 .

name: Team Palmer
subject: This is incredible!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palmer for Illinois
body:
We are excited to announce that we just secured the endorsement of the Collective PAC! They are an incredible group working to fix the issue of under-representation of the Black community in government. This is a longer email, friend, but I hope you'll read it. Right-wing billionaire and Donald Trump's former Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos, just came to New Hampshire to rally Trump's far-right base. She is just one of the many Trump allies trying to unseat me and flip the Senate red. During Betsy DeVos' confirmation hearing for Secretary of Education back in 2017, she demonstrated a complete lack of understanding and support for the public education system – and it was clear that she was unqualified to serve as secretary of education. **At her confirmation hearing, I specifically questioned Ms. DeVos on whether she would enforce the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act. Not only did she refuse to say she would, but she also demonstrated that she was unaware that this landmark civil rights law was a federal law.** Unfortunately, she didn’t improve upon that disastrous confirmation hearing during her tenure in the Trump administration – pursuing policies that undermined public schools in New Hampshire and across the country. From proposed funding cuts to her efforts to implement a voucher system, **DeVos ignored the needs of both educators and students in an attempt to dismantle our public education system.** I’m writing today because it has been my honor to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate, and I’m not done fighting for a more robust public education system. I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, and New Hampshire’s State Senate and State House both flipped from blue to red last year. Republicans know this, and DeVos' visit was a clear attempt to unseat me by rallying Trump's far-right base. **If we lose in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of holding our narrow majority.** Having Donald Trump and his allies fully invested in this race is bad news. **I hate asking for money, but my campaign is falling behind our monthly goal, and we need the funds to fight back against Republican attacks. She is just one of the many Trump allies trying to unseat me and flip the Senate red. During Betsy DeVos' confirmation hearing for Secretary of Education back in 2017, she demonstrated a complete lack of understanding and support for the public education system – and it was clear that she was unqualified to serve as secretary of education. At her confirmation hearing, I specifically questioned Ms. DeVos on whether she would enforce the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act. Not only did she refuse to say she would, but she also demonstrated that she was unaware that this landmark civil rights law was a federal law. Unfortunately, she didn’t improve upon that disastrous confirmation hearing during her tenure in the Trump administration – pursuing policies that undermined public schools in New Hampshire and across the country. From proposed funding cuts to her efforts to implement a voucher system, DeVos ignored the needs of both educators and students in an attempt to dismantle our public education system. I’m writing today because it has been my honor to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate, and I’m not done fighting for a more robust public education system. I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, and New Hampshire’s State Senate and State House both flipped from blue to red last year. Republicans know this, and DeVos' visit was a clear attempt to unseat me by rallying Trump's far-right base. If we lose in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of holding our narrow majority. Having Donald Trump and his allies fully invested in this race is bad news. I hate asking for money, but my campaign is falling behind our monthly goal, and we need the funds to fight back against Republican attacks. Will you please split a donation between my campaign and Martin Heinrich’s to help us win in New Hampshire and protect our vulnerable Senate majority? If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Martin Heinrich and Maggie Hassan: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I'm fighting to give New Hampshire families a brighter future by strengthening public education, expanding the Child Tax Credit, protecting health care, and more. But there's still much work ahead – and if Republicans regain control of the Senate, they will undo all of the progress we've made so far. So please, consider making a $10 or more donation today. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Martin Heinrich and Maggie Hassan: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you so much. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan U.S. Senator from New Hampshire | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, . If you would like to unsubscribe from emails altogether, . Martin Heinrich for Senate PO Box 25763 Albuquerque, NM 87125 United States

| | Derek, what’s happening in Texas is devastating.

Texas Republicans essentially ended access to legal abortion, and the Supreme Court of the United States just stood by and let it happen.

Here’s what I am worried about now, Derek — this could only be the beginning.

Derek — this isn’t the news we were hoping to share, especially after the amazing month we just had, but Common Good VA said we could reach out because you might want to see this. CNN released an article titled **"The 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022"** ... and we are on the list. Here’s a paragraph from the article on our race: _“Republicans are no longer without candidates to take on Democratic Sen. Mark Kelly, who is running for a full six-year term after winning last fall.”_ We made Arizona history when we won in 2020, but now Mark needs your help to hold this seat and fend off attacks from National Republicans. This is not the list we wanted to be on as we head into the election next year. So we’re reaching out for your help to raise $10,000 today in response to this news so we can stay ahead of the Republicans who want to defeat us. **** [**This is where you come in, Derek: if you are able, will you split a $15 donation between our people-powered campaign and Common Good? Articles like this make us a top target of Mitch McConnell and we need your help to prepare for the next wave of attack ads.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FsSKDjE4VZO4HRWo2-yKnCQP_yD7Rd65QPHS3UA9CCz6F87yQ3_3c6ULfxKWoM0rz9aYHZqTAFv_EwCM0fI-S6_L8QoZmP53Mjmw8QZaDz1IMfTk1PSGnqQqkHdX8QiGsj6JezPJ7Prn8P2CWtGNnAtDIjsEXlAOSDrxrLx_q-P4H7Br7G1vX2mUuT0f7G01NKnm_IUAFjYQkQWQtZLeTtt9I9iqXjRdeZ5ZNVCadOrjXck1M1YcImBqb3uS9ITaXBrbAw0OHCaJBEnKJY6A9l4/3f6/wK0wvBPbQvOL4za-8LzyFQ/h1/EcUOxBkgOaFPT92FDlCAeana1I902i5brjMV0ew9LWY) You can bet that reports like this will only increase the attacks against us by National Republicans because they know if they can flip this seat they can take back the Senate. However, we know that with your help we can run another successful campaign in 2022 and hold this Arizona seat. So thank you in advance for pitching in and for having Mark’s back. Team Kelly

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m calling for fair, nonpartisan redistricting in North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
This is about upholding our democracy. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35491158/305233800/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDlmMWFlYy1hOTExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G4kVg3LkM3O0sFD17oU4__8tVO4Wv-aI0D6Ai32_DHM=&emci=179a3716-a811-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=b49f1aec-a911-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=1049176)
Peter, **In 2020, Republicans proved that they will go to any lengths to win power. Now, our very democracy is at stake in elections to come.** North Carolina’s General Assembly recently started the process of drawing new congressional and legislative district lines, and we all need it to go better than last time. After Republicans drew districts to consolidate their own power, the blatant gerrymandering was so egregious that the GOP’s maps got _thrown out._ Our voters deserve fair, nonpartisan maps from the start — they deserve to know that their voices _will_ be heard at the ballot box. **[I’m calling on our Republican elected officials to take the process of redistricting seriously, responsibly, and fairly. Add your name beside mine to demand the legislature draw nonpartisan district lines in North Carolina>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35491159/305233803/1735308700?source=em_RC_PET_redistricting2_090921_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDlmMWFlYy1hOTExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G4kVg3LkM3O0sFD17oU4__8tVO4Wv-aI0D6Ai32_DHM=&emci=179a3716-a811-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=b49f1aec-a911-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=1049176)** | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35491160/305233814/1735308700?source=em_RC_PET_redistricting2_090921_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDlmMWFlYy1hOTExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G4kVg3LkM3O0sFD17oU4__8tVO4Wv-aI0D6Ai32_DHM=&emci=179a3716-a811-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=b49f1aec-a911-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=1049176)**
---
Every district that Republicans gerrymander in their favor is one more roadblock to moving forward for North Carolina. From repairing our infrastructure to expanding Medicaid access, Republicans are dead set against improving the lives of people in our communities.
**But most importantly, this is about our democracy, Peter.** This is about making sure that each North Carolinian is able to have an equal say in our government — rather than allowing some voters to have more power than others.
**[If you’re with me, please sign on and tell the legislature to draw fair district maps this year>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35491161/305233816/1735308700?source=em_RC_PET_redistricting2_090921_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDlmMWFlYy1hOTExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G4kVg3LkM3O0sFD17oU4__8tVO4Wv-aI0D6Ai32_DHM=&emci=179a3716-a811-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=b49f1aec-a911-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=1049176)**
Thank you,
Roy

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: I owe you an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
In a few moments, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin before our FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline at the end of this month. This is an all-important test of our momentum, which is why I’m reaching out. Will you let me explain?

Every three months, candidates for federal office must report their fundraising details to the Federal Election Commission. It’s a way of ensuring transparency in our elections. Our FEC report will show the amount of money we have raised and most importantly, the number of people who have chipped in to help.

Democrats have a 50/50 majority in the Senate right now. We need to protect and expand our majority, and that starts by flipping Wisconsin’s Senate seat and defeating Ron Johnson. That starts with _you._

It’s going to be a steep climb to raise as much as we can in the next few weeks, but I believe we can do it if enough of us come together before we close out the quarter. That’s why I have to ask:

**[Will you add a contribution of $5 to my campaign for the United States Senate in Wisconsin? We need to have a strong FEC report if we’re going to flip this seat blue and defeat Ron Johnson in 2022. clean_body: In a few moments, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin before our FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline at the end of this month. This is an all-important test of our momentum, which is why I’m reaching out. Will you let me explain? Every three months, candidates for federal office must report their fundraising details to the Federal Election Commission. It’s a way of ensuring transparency in our elections. Our FEC report will show the amount of money we have raised and most importantly, the number of people who have chipped in to help. Democrats have a 50/50 majority in the Senate right now. We need to protect and expand our majority, and that starts by flipping Wisconsin’s Senate seat and defeating Ron Johnson. That starts with you. It’s going to be a steep climb to raise as much as we can in the next few weeks, but I believe we can do it if enough of us come together before we close out the quarter. Friend,
I stand in support of reproductive freedom across the country. All people should be able to make their own decisions about their health and their bodies -- including abortion.
We've seen the horror that is Texas’s abortion ban, which criminalizes abortions after six weeks, even in the case of rape and incest. The law effectively turns anti-choice activists into vigilantes -- not only giving them the ability to report and sue anyone involved in an abortion, but offering a $10,000 reward for doing so.
Now, anti-choice zealots are using the Texas ban as a blueprint for equally extreme policies here in Arizona and across the country.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35492370/305237055/41694283?refcode=X_090921_AccessToAbortion&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjNkOWRiOC1hYzExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qnZAdp_HdBmyddETQn5VnoF8xu0WqmGnvDvbF7fp7QE=)
---
No one should have their most personal medical decisions controlled by politicians, neighbors, complete strangers, or anyone else. **Abortion is healthcare, and healthcare is a human right.**
Criminalizing abortion care is not only unconstitutional, it hurts people and families.
**Abortion shouldn't be a crime. It's a reproductive health decision a person should have the right to make with their doctor.**
Together, we will stand up for access to safe and legal abortion and reject these attempts to strip us of our health and our rights.
Thank you,
Kirsten
---

| | Hi Peter!

With less than a week left until election day, we wanted to make sure you saw this important email from Mike!

If you haven’t cast your ballot yet and would like some more information about voting, please click here → [**_https://www.sos.ca.gov/elections/upcoming-elections/2021-ca-gov-recall/newsom-recall-faqs_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35492665/305238003/-732795384?refcode=MT_EM_EN_6MO_210909_1_2&refcode2=91fb4dd2-ad11-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWZiNGRkMi1hZDExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eeyvZsZHcAgcg2bb3VSRn6dSzzkHAc6rDGZp6DzFd4Y=&emci=655f48c4-ab11-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=91fb4dd2-ad11-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2678920)

Thanks so much for taking this election seriously,

Team Thompson

**_\--- Begin Forwarded Message ---_**

Peter,

In just five days, Californians will cast their ballots in a recall election designed to remove Governor Gavin Newsom from office.

This process was put into place 110 years ago to hold corrupt politicians accountable — and today, it’s become an abuse of power. That’s why I’m voting NO to recall Governor Newsom — and I’m personally asking you to make a plan to vote next Tuesday, September 14th. [**_If you have questions about how to cast your ballot, click here._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35492670/305238006/-732795384?refcode=MT_EM_EN_6MO_210909_1_2&refcode2=91fb4dd2-ad11-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWZiNGRkMi1hZDExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eeyvZsZHcAgcg2bb3VSRn6dSzzkHAc6rDGZp6DzFd4Y=&emci=655f48c4-ab11-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=91fb4dd2-ad11-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2678920)

**I plan on voting NO on election day and I hope you do the same.**

Thanks for understanding the seriousness of this, Peter. Don’t forget to vote!

Thank you,

Mike Thompson

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities
_Sponsored message_
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu26biqk28cp3brvrjtj146n7627ootoaep8bnc8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9i69ob1c1h2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo8t22896jnomt8vfjc1hkuidk0fumo8qeiq9lo8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9i69ob1c1h2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4ldhl8ngb1finsm1ij6nsc4hsacibmbts5c7ag0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9i69ob1c1h2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk0di6ra8us2rumkt57c6fno7ip3uj9nc03f5k18_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9i69ob1c1h2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znjphbnolrdef4ogu4hmah5khui9b2o3mnputt30_rp22sh2s8i66pj4c9i69ob1c1h2bs) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
This year, i'm aiming to be the first candidate to qualify for the NRCC's "Young Guns" program. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=47b4ed9ef3284058a0363c94a4119466&_e=Fp9uqo45kISMO4XGAclvv3vpP3-HDXYbt7XhFt6wiB_-cIato3W2f-GMMx1IHaXfD3zfDNzJOtFlZL5z7prOx3duBqLk6i_hvGoiVJOH-53Htm2U_Dr_GpnakTrEUBXtTJKn4TUR5wPYq6STjOul233pkRKWLBNOTOz_vs7QhkCPE_EcUBXIrMI_CxGhBYEEYEK3L4lWhDBMr5j_cyuPx8639-MLXuU35LuaYeOb-_oUYn3bRo78j2TFNZTC9fBWTqtSoK8c1KhM9ww9zmIgZf_6X3Z_b5SvVzonKeAUHnXkX0L6rE_-62OCpuypPonplkz7vLuJ-b5SgbsheW3Pyr4x5Fy0itfyRowYmrd4ScgS2KxLk7beudsHzm0TQzJtoXnhpMFhRJoaoPDHdrSqfSzn2DTSEA_5X2oC7J_kevzewJSVcaIC4ZMBwTuLBa6QWneQJVrXXL8ols9rUsB_ww%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

Have you heard of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s “**Young Gun’s Program?** ” I hadn’t either until my first campaign for Congress last year.

I’d like to give you an explanation as to what the purpose of the program is and **[why I need your financial assistance to gain acceptance.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=47b4ed9ef3284058a0363c94a4119466&_e=Fp9uqo45kISMO4XGAclvv3vpP3-HDXYbt7XhFt6wiB_-cIato3W2f-GMMx1IHaXfD3zfDNzJOtFlZL5z7prOx3duBqLk6i_hvGoiVJOH-53Htm2U_Dr_GpnakTrEUBXtTJKn4TUR5wPYq6STjOul233pkRKWLBNOTOz_vs7QhkCPE_EcUBXIrMI_CxGhBYEEYEK3L4lWhDBMr5j_cyuPx8639-MLXuU35LuaYeOb-_oUYn3bRo78j2TFNZTC9fBWMr-1OE9avWF1SaVHR0-3MU3wGU6umfgCUm94i3J36w_tl6QINfaFHzmJERndxiKEkzHB771y0l7xna5Q5cCoBwWZACs_PkQPdoWMYkN17fXkgcPxmq5YFmL9qY4KLzOy6d1uJ-oC0yxF2XxoajLHft2Ci3AKfM6eBMRPv1zC5Ybgm-Eh7y2stFiDGHekbGAYE5Ak2I8C5yrSaclxLzUqUA%3D%3D) **

The Young Guns program serves to help Republican candidates running in some of the most competitive districts around the country with a playbook on how to vanquish Democrat opposition, along with providing strategic support on everything from polling, fundraising, advertising and grassroots outreach. **Membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C.** – and prove they can WIN.

**[If you’re a frequent flyer, you might equate it to elite-level status. Only the entrance fee for this program isn’t flying hundreds of thousands of miles per year, it’s raising $250,000 in one fundraising quarter.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=47b4ed9ef3284058a0363c94a4119466&_e=Fp9uqo45kISMO4XGAclvv3vpP3-HDXYbt7XhFt6wiB_-cIato3W2f-GMMx1IHaXfD3zfDNzJOtFlZL5z7prOx3duBqLk6i_hvGoiVJOH-53Htm2U_Dr_GpnakTrEUBXtTJKn4TUR5wPYq6STjOul233pkRKWLBNOTOz_vs7QhkCPE_EcUBXIrMI_CxGhBYEEYEK3L4lWhDBMr5j_cyuPx8639-MLXuU35LuaYeOb-_oUYn3bRo78j2TFNZTC9fBWXxIQ2AoXVZVaD9fis6UqncX1wEQjUhWTik67GnjUU8B7goe-aZUMPrH-fu1vY31cPdpUlCKZO7cU5xWfVxugEnieZcW_y0OcN20OdauQumxYxZxQTe9EJPKNSAvhYccv68Dz7q2jJzre3lbF96wP5n6pDnYfOCdhdY3b4uLmLXAlVT2tgEyg0kkHgSBXp6XeOkPQxnvu0zSb6xXdVYCTkQ%3D%3D)**

This year, I’m aiming to be one of the first candidates to qualify for the program because with my race expected to be one of the closest in the nation for a second year in a row, **[I sincerely need all of the help I can get. But, with the deadline arriving fast at the end of this month my campaign is still short of hitting the threshold for entry by $88,524](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=47b4ed9ef3284058a0363c94a4119466&_e=Fp9uqo45kISMO4XGAclvv3vpP3-HDXYbt7XhFt6wiB_-cIato3W2f-GMMx1IHaXfD3zfDNzJOtFlZL5z7prOx3duBqLk6i_hvGoiVJOH-53Htm2U_Dr_GpnakTrEUBXtTJKn4TUR5wPYq6STjOul233pkRKWLBNOTOz_vs7QhkCPE_EcUBXIrMI_CxGhBYEEYEK3L4lWhDBMr5j_cyuPx8639-MLXuU35LuaYeOb-_oUYn3bRo78j2TFNZTC9fBWGqe9CSSVv4ufoPbotgLnxZtMkOx0u3qn-h4t9cDHHNtEyJlDEzIsHAzBkuRRpIcZN2cGpnq3yxz_4MG3t-TmJ6umYxYlHs_IjLFZzQrymnxwP7S7mNV9jPkCeyE12IKmySTNmLqRMBXuTZatyybcijIc1pqKFTpHvR4G3zEVlxrG7LVLrqIzvprxj6W8O4IlQLS8V8XcZImq2Cp6P32rcA%3D%3D)**.

If you’re interested in making an investment in flipping the House Republican, you needn’t look further than this email. I’m asking you to help me secure ‘**Young Gun’** status this month with a **[contribution of $4 or more](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=47b4ed9ef3284058a0363c94a4119466&_e=Fp9uqo45kISMO4XGAclvv3vpP3-HDXYbt7XhFt6wiB_-cIato3W2f-GMMx1IHaXfD3zfDNzJOtFlZL5z7prOx3duBqLk6i_hvGoiVJOH-53Htm2U_Dr_GpnakTrEUBXtTJKn4TUR5wPYq6STjOul233pkRKWLBNOTOz_vs7QhkCPE_EcUBXIrMI_CxGhBYEEYEK3L4lWhDBMr5j_cyuPx8639-MLXuU35LuaYeOb-_oUYn3bRo78j2TFNZTC9fBW0P200b0o0L71xnOLsTySFKUg51gaIKqmB-7L14S1HfcDZojp6z5VRlxHTnLUQ_8OVqnq4ByNu5DkcPDJ5s6y8Br1YPLC32gHXqC_nNM0q0_t_fKQD64UaruL0iE1e4KksS2a8WwDf-ISVPdH3nK3cr-xImrrNqkl-eDxKkXQSCsGb1XmqrJmXzCFE94QmYClOXZTnVoDr2aF0dDy2FPa9A%3D%3D)** to my campaign right now.

May I please count on your help right now?

clean_body: This year, i'm aiming to be the first candidate to qualify for the NRCC's "Young Guns" program. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, Have you heard of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s “Young Gun’s Program? ” I hadn’t either until my first campaign for Congress last year. I’d like to give you an explanation as to what the purpose of the program is and The Young Guns program serves to help Republican candidates running in some of the most competitive districts around the country with a playbook on how to vanquish Democrat opposition, along with providing strategic support on everything from polling, fundraising, advertising and grassroots outreach. Membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C. – and prove they can WIN. This year, I’m aiming to be one of the first candidates to qualify for the program because with my race expected to be one of the closest in the nation for a second year in a row, . If you’re interested in making an investment in flipping the House Republican, you needn’t look further than this email. I’m asking you to help me secure ‘Young Gun’ status this month with a to my campaign right now. May I please count on your help right now? | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | With sincere thanks, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. name: Derek Marshall
subject: The California Recall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
In a few days, a very important election will take place here in California. On September 14th, we will know whether Gavin Newsom will remain Governor or whether he will be recalled. **The recall process is a disingenuous way for Republicans to grab power without truly having a majority.**

When Governor Gavin Newsom was elected in 2018, he won with 62% of the vote, more than any other Democratic candidate in state history. He is quite literally the most popular Democrat in state history. But Republicans want to try and take the post away from him by subverting the will of the majority in this sham recall election. **We are not having it. **

Here on our campaign, we’re hard at work helping California Democrats get out the vote within California’s 8th district. I believe in supporting Democrats up and down the ballot, which is why I’ve worked on so many Democratic campaigns, large and small.**I want to make sure that local voters right here in my district will vote and vote NO on the California recall.**
**[We’re spending time focusing on the recall election, which means we’ve been spending less time on our own fundraising efforts. Can you pitch in to close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35493702/305241938/1381966051?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjBkYTJlOS1iMDExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z4BwJ_bWtYGtY7FhQs4OQtWvhYE4yYytSSgvafx9Eyw=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35493717/305241951/1381966051?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjBkYTJlOS1iMDExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z4BwJ_bWtYGtY7FhQs4OQtWvhYE4yYytSSgvafx9Eyw=)

It’s incredibly important to me to work with Democrats at all levels to strengthen our governance. It’s crucial that we keep our Democratic governor.**A Republican occupying our highest state office in the middle of a pandemic is a nightmare waiting to happen.** That’s why I’m spending my time getting out the vote.

But my own race is also important for Democrats. **Here in California’s 8th, we have a real opportunity to flip a red district blue.** We’ve already started registering voters who are disenchanted with failing Republican leadership, and we aim to register tens of thousands more. That’s why I’m asking you to support me today. **[With your donation, I can build the war chest I need to win this district and flip a new seat for Democrats.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35493736/305241970/1381966051?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjBkYTJlOS1iMDExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z4BwJ_bWtYGtY7FhQs4OQtWvhYE4yYytSSgvafx9Eyw=)**

Can I count on you?
In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**

clean_body: Peter, In a few days, a very important election will take place here in California. On September 14th, we will know whether Gavin Newsom will remain Governor or whether he will be recalled. The recall process is a disingenuous way for Republicans to grab power without truly having a majority. When Governor Gavin Newsom was elected in 2018, he won with 62% of the vote, more than any other Democratic candidate in state history. He is quite literally the most popular Democrat in state history. But Republicans want to try and take the post away from him by subverting the will of the majority in this sham recall election. We are not having it. Here on our campaign, we’re hard at work helping California Democrats get out the vote within California’s 8th district. I believe in supporting Democrats up and down the ballot, which is why I’ve worked on so many Democratic campaigns, large and small.I want to make sure that local voters right here in my district will vote and vote NO on the California recall. = = It’s incredibly important to me to work with Democrats at all levels to strengthen our governance. It’s crucial that we keep our Democratic governor.A Republican occupying our highest state office in the middle of a pandemic is a nightmare waiting to happen. That’s why I’m spending my time getting out the vote. But my own race is also important for Democrats. Here in California’s 8th, we have a real opportunity to flip a red district blue. We’ve already started registering voters who are disenchanted with failing Republican leadership, and we aim to register tens of thousands more. That’s why I’m asking you to support me today. = Can I count on you? In Solidarity, Derek Marshall * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

body:
We can’t wait to address climate change any longer. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35494519/305244223/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWFhYzRkNi1iMjExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lV2FFjjPjdl9EvccgNwBXmt3eMj4buimo0CsQapgLhU=)
**“I have never felt more urgent about climate change than I did this summer... It is happening right now, it is affecting our health here in Colorado today, it is affecting our economy here.” ** —Michael Bennet Climate change is taking its toll on Colorado and all across our country. Hurricanes, heat waves, and wildfires have displaced families, destroyed homes, and threatened our infrastructure. And it will only continue to get worse if we don’t take action. That’s why Michael is fighting to include the Outdoor Restoration Partnership Act that he sponsored with fellow Coloradan Rep. Jason Crow in the Build Back Better budget. The bill will dedicate $60 billion to restore forests and watersheds, mitigate the risk of wildfire and create millions of jobs. Because our health, safety, and economy is so reliant on our forests, water, and environment, we have no time to lose. That’s why we’re asking you to make a $3 contribution to Michael's re-election campaign right now. Protecting and expanding our Democratic Senate majority is absolutely necessary if we have any hope of fighting climate change. If Mitch McConnell and his allies come back into power, we’ll slide back into the science-denial and deregulation that led us here in the first place. **Every dollar helps, especially when we’re up against the national Republican money machine and all their attacks. clean_body: We can’t wait to address climate change any longer. | = “I have never felt more urgent about climate change than I did this summer... It is happening right now, it is affecting our health here in Colorado today, it is affecting our economy here.” —Michael Bennet Climate change is taking its toll on Colorado and all across our country. Hurricanes, heat waves, and wildfires have displaced families, destroyed homes, and threatened our infrastructure. And it will only continue to get worse if we don’t take action. That’s why Michael is fighting to include the Outdoor Restoration Partnership Act that he sponsored with fellow Coloradan Rep. Jason Crow in the Build Back Better budget. The bill will dedicate $60 billion to restore forests and watersheds, mitigate the risk of wildfire and create millions of jobs. Because our health, safety, and economy is so reliant on our forests, water, and environment, we have no time to lose. That’s why we’re asking you to make a $3 contribution to Michael's re-election campaign right now. Protecting and expanding our Democratic Senate majority is absolutely necessary if we have any hope of fighting climate change. If Mitch McConnell and his allies come back into power, we’ll slide back into the science-denial and deregulation that led us here in the first place. Every dollar helps, especially when we’re up against the national Republican money machine and all their attacks. Can Michael count on you to have his back in the fight against climate change? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Our thoughts are with the many Coloradans and Americans nationwide affected by natural disasters fueled by climate change this summer. Michael is leading the charge on protecting Colorado’s environment and communities and your support today will help him continue that work in the Senate in the years to come. Thanks for listening and being part of this team, Team Bennet Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Great America Update
subject: You can help restore hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c324%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=RxP%2bERoWL6vLJAGVhJJHyw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65412%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4Jsp6RqDVuJUrBRA4UgRFg&sysid=1) Fellow American, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65412%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4Jsp6RqDVuJUrBRA4UgRFg&sysid=1) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65413%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=864%2b%2bncA0MRhaDdPMDKrjQ&sysid=1) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism --especially among our young people--that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65413%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=864%2b%2bncA0MRhaDdPMDKrjQ&sysid=1) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65414%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AiOehxlv%2fPO9knBWq7VGEw&sysid=1) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c324%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=RxP%2bERoWL6vLJAGVhJJHyw&sysid=1)_

name: Team NextGen
subject: Protect voting rights: Pass the John Lewis VRA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; https://nextgenamerica
body:
It’s time for the Senate to protect our right to vote.
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35495146/305246933/1335475295?refcode=em_fr_210909voting_n_ng_90do_4_ng_testb_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWEzNzIxYS1iNTExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJx5xp0po8EdMpx_QPMBJAT-nAWwngmAv_Nw5BK-RgY=) Team, The House has passed the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. **Now it’s time for the Senate to protect our voting rights.** With more than a dozen Republican-led states enacting restrictive new voting laws and the redistricting process underway, **we need the John Lewis Voting Rights Act to empower the federal government to block discriminatory state election rules.** In 2020, young people and people of color cast the deciding votes to elect President Biden and the Democratic majority in Congress. NextGen is committed to electing leaders who will fight for our right to vote. [**_Help us continue to protect our right to vote and elect leaders who will prioritize voting rights by donating $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can afford today!_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35495147/305246934/354837068?refcode=em_fr_210909voting_n_ng_90do_4_ng_testb_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWEzNzIxYS1iNTExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJx5xp0po8EdMpx_QPMBJAT-nAWwngmAv_Nw5BK-RgY=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35495148/305246936/1335475295?refcode=em_fr_210909voting_n_ng_90do_4_ng_testb_EL5&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWEzNzIxYS1iNTExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJx5xp0po8EdMpx_QPMBJAT-nAWwngmAv_Nw5BK-RgY=)**

clean_body: It’s time for the Senate to protect our right to vote. | | = Team, The House has passed the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. Now it’s time for the Senate to protect our voting rights. With more than a dozen Republican-led states enacting restrictive new voting laws and the redistricting process underway, we need the John Lewis Voting Rights Act to empower the federal government to block discriminatory state election rules. In 2020, young people and people of color cast the deciding votes to elect President Biden and the Democratic majority in Congress. NextGen is committed to electing leaders who will fight for our right to vote. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Together, Team NextGen | | At NextGen, we Identify, Engage and Mobilize the #YouthVote by meeting young communities where they're at with issues that are directly affecting them. Will you help us make it happen? NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503

He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

Securing the right to vote has always been a top priority for Gov. Sisolak, and we’re glad to see that the majority of Nevadans agree with him.

name: Team Malcolm
subject: Conducting a focus group (please respond)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We want our movement to reflect the diverse voices that make up our big coalition
#

Hey friend —
From time to time, campaigns run focus groups so they can stay in touch with folks on the ground and hear what issues are important to them.
Now frankly, it’s pretty expensive to do this kind of thing. Campaigns end up spending thousands of dollars to pay big polling firms in D.C. to reach their voters.
But our campaign is different, so we want to do this our way and hear directly from YOU, our grassroots supporters.
[Will you answer a few quick questions as part of our September Focus Group? We need to hear from at least 1,000 Pennsylvanians, and as one of Malcolm’s top supporters, your feedback is extremely valuable.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35495916/305249023/263217549?refcode2=85342e85-b711-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210909-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTM0MmU4NS1iNzExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=imiS0HDqQyQhLyiaEGe7Y2foVwm9F9_szKZHleeEJwM=&emci=6df2587d-b711-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=85342e85-b711-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18034979)
**[Enter the Focus Group>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35495917/305249024/263217549?refcode2=85342e85-b711-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210909-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTM0MmU4NS1iNzExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=imiS0HDqQyQhLyiaEGe7Y2foVwm9F9_szKZHleeEJwM=&emci=6df2587d-b711-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=85342e85-b711-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18034979)**
Our campaign is powered by working people, for working people, in every corner of our beautiful commonwealth — and we want our movement to reflect the diverse voices that make up our big coalition.
So before we finalize our campaign strategy for the coming months, it’s important for us to hear directly from you about your priorities.
**The more people who weigh in as a part of our September Focus Group, the better we will be able to shape our campaign around the issues that matter most to working folks.**
[Please take two minutes to complete our September Focus Group survey and share your priorities with the team.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35495918/305249025/263217549?refcode2=85342e85-b711-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210909-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTM0MmU4NS1iNzExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=imiS0HDqQyQhLyiaEGe7Y2foVwm9F9_szKZHleeEJwM=&emci=6df2587d-b711-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=85342e85-b711-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18034979)

Now frankly, it’s pretty expensive to do this kind of thing. Campaigns end up spending thousands of dollars to pay big polling firms in D.C. to reach their voters. But our campaign is different, so we want to do this our way and hear directly from YOU, our grassroots supporters. Our campaign is powered by working people, for working people, in every corner of our beautiful commonwealth — and we want our movement to reflect the diverse voices that make up our big coalition. So before we finalize our campaign strategy for the coming months, it’s important for us to hear directly from you about your priorities. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: 3 things for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35496130/305249502/1927938479?refcode=20210909_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWFlMzllNS1iNzExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qtX9YSA9uXQBltEXUMJRvQFBdi50zvhhMnfMqcmoli0=)
Friends — we have three very important pieces of information to share with you. 1\. CNN has again named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
2\. Donald Trump flew to Arizona to attend a rally where he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
3\. So now we need your help! Our goal in August is to get 50,000 donations to help fuel this campaign to keep Mark in the Senate. And it’s going to be crucial we hit this goal, because with the Senate again up for grabs, this is already a multimillion-dollar race. **We still have time left this month to dig deep and knock this goal out of the park. So with our deadline approaching, we have to ask:** [**If you are able, will you split a donation between Seth Moulton and our people-powered campaign? Team, About one week after signing the most restrictive anti-choice law in the country, **Texas Governor Greg Abbott just signed an extreme voter suppression bill into law** that bans 24-hour early voting and drive-thru voting, adds new restrictions to mail-in ballots, and allows partisan poll-watchers to intimidate voters at the polls. This law is part of a GOP-led attack on voting rights across the country, and it isn’t new. **In fact, Governor Kim Reynolds already signed a law making it harder for Iowans to vote last March.** The Iowa law, which I voted against in the state legislature, shortens the early voting period and closes polling places an hour earlier. After seeing historic voter turnout in 2020, Gov. Reynolds and other extremists in her party would rather suppress the vote in order to win than make it easier for Iowans and Americans everywhere to make their voices heard in our democratic process. It’s not right, and it’s just one of many reasons why we need a new governor here in Iowa. I promise to make it easier — not harder — to vote across our state. **[If you’re with me and want to see voting rights strengthened instead of suppressed, make a grassroots contribution of $10 or more to support my campaign for governor today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35497117/305252982/975127612?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210909voting_rs_active_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWRkODM0Yi1iYTExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VixZfXCdRxYVNsASnHMUHpADdeyr2DourPVagpk0i1g=)** **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Team, About one week after signing the most restrictive anti-choice law in the country, Texas Governor Greg Abbott just signed an extreme voter suppression bill into law that bans 24-hour early voting and drive-thru voting, adds new restrictions to mail-in ballots, and allows partisan poll-watchers to intimidate voters at the polls. This law is part of a GOP-led attack on voting rights across the country, and it isn’t new. In fact, Governor Kim Reynolds already signed a law making it harder for Iowans to vote last March. The Iowa law, which I voted against in the state legislature, shortens the early voting period and closes polling places an hour earlier. After seeing historic voter turnout in 2020, Gov. Reynolds and other extremists in her party would rather suppress the vote in order to win than make it easier for Iowans and Americans everywhere to make their voices heard in our democratic process. It’s not right, and it’s just one of many reasons why we need a new governor here in Iowa. I promise to make it easier — not harder — to vote across our state. = ** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = It’s time our government starts working for the people. Let’s fix this broken system together, and make it easier for every Iowan to exercise their right to vote. — Ras | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. O.
