name: Alex Padilla for Senate
subject: We need a Green New Deal, and we need it immediately.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
we don’t have time to spare
#

The climate crisis is one of the single largest threats facing California and our entire country. We need a massive investment to transition to an inclusive, thriving clean energy future.
We can’t wait to tackle the climate crisis head-on, create new jobs, and deliver justice for communities on the frontlines of climate change.
**We need a Green New Deal, and we need it immediately.**
Because the truth is, we don’t have time to spare. From flooding in Louisiana and New York, to heatwaves in the Pacific Northwest, to a wildfire season here in California that gets worse and worse every year — it’s become undeniably clear that addressing climate change cannot wait.
It’s also become undeniably clear that the only way we can hope to mitigate this will be through bold steps to reduce carbon emissions.
**That’s why Alex is a cosponsor of the Green New Deal, and why we are asking for your support today to keep him in the Senate.
[**Can you please make a contribution to help Alex win reelection so he can continue to fight for the Green New Deal in the Senate? Every donation sends a powerful message that NOW is the time to take bold action on climate change to protect our planet.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210909-1-15&t=1&refcode2=296_159979_CDRFMk&akid=296%2E159979%2ECDRFMk)
Thank you for chipping in to keep Alex in the Senate. As long as we stand together, we will pass the Green New Deal and preserve our land, air, and water for generations to come.
\- Team Padilla
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210909-1-15&t=2&refcode2=296_159979_CDRFMk&akid=296%2E159979%2ECDRFMk)**

clean_body: Nancy Pelosi has been able to rely on our state for their votes, but not for much longer | Peter - For far too long, when Speaker Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats are pushing their radical agenda, they've been able to count on the lockstep support of Connecticut's five liberal House members. That’s truly a shame, and it's exactly why I'm running to break that Democrat stranglehold on Connecticut and Washington D.C. - Peter, together, we're going to flip the House of Representatives and take another vote away from Nancy Pelosi's disastrous agenda. The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) is already targeting Connecticut's 5th Congressional District, because they know winning here wins the House of Representatives. | The NRCC knows what I know - that I've won in "blue" districts before - that I'm the perfect rebuke against the Democrats' divisive identity politics and prove that the American Dream is alive and well. That our conservative principles of hard work, personal responsibility, and opportunity are the right way forward for all Americans - not "Critical Race Theory" and socialism. My opponent has been a loyal member of Nancy Pelosi's squad, voting with her 100% of the time, after running on a campaign promise not to vote her in as Speaker. The NRCC knows stopping Pelosi starts in Connecticut, but that takes resources. Thank you, Peter. It will be a true honor to serve you in 2022. Sincerely, George S. name: Farah Melendez
subject: Strategy memo for you
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

I’m Farah, Nikki’s new campaign manager. Today, I want to touch base about why and how Nikki can win this race.

Ron DeSantis is vulnerable. For months, he’s put lives on the line in order to score political points with Trump’s base. It’s no wonder that every poll from the past two months has shown his approval rating suffering because of his disastrous response to COVID-19.

Nikki is the only candidate who can defeat Ron DeSantis next year. She’s the only Democrat to win statewide in Florida since 2012. Right now, we’re building on our winning strategy from 2018 to grow our movement and stop DeSantis.

To win, we’ll need the resources to build a broad coalition from the Panhandle to Key West. Democrats can’t rely on the same names, faces, and failed strategies to defeat DeSantis next year.

We’ll need to try something new and build a massive movement of Floridians who are fed up with our state’s broken system.

Team, we have a plan to win this race, but we need your help. DeSantis will spend $150 million on his re-election, so every dollar we raise will be critical. Please click here to chip in whatever you can spare to help fund our winning strategy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-alicia-sept?refcode=farah]

Thanks for fighting by our side on this. I know that Nikki can win this race with the help of our grassroots team.

Warmly,

Farah Melendez
Campaign Manager

So here are a few things to know as we enter the final stretch:

**ONE:** This is a historic campaign. If elected, Hala will be Virginia’s first woman and first Afro-Latina Lt. Governor! _And Hala has the leadership and experience to continue the work of our Democratic majority._

**TWO:** Hala’s extreme Republican opponent, Winsome Sears, is launching attacks on our Commonwealth every day. _She has committed to passing a Texas-style near ban on abortion care and is crawling up in the polls._

**THREE:** We’re coming up on the end of our fundraising quarter at the end of September. _This is when our numbers go public, and we need to reach our $20,000 goal to show Virginians that Hala is supported!_

body:
Some folks write off the rural areas of Virginia, claiming Democrats can’t win there.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35498282/305256385/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTJjNWRjMy1iZDExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VFzoAWYor-7ZM9LgJKkCnsgVyVpZOkGjhpOjSRu8mCY=&emci=80a2fdba-bd11-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=852c5dc3-bd11-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Some folks write off the rural areas of Virginia, claiming Democrats can’t win there. But in all of his campaigns, Mark Warner has worked hard to win votes across the Commonwealth. That’s why Mark is supporting rural Democrats like Bill Helsley and Blakely Lockhart who are fighting to make inroads in Republican districts and expand our House of Delegates majority. **_[Will you make a $5 contribution now to help elect Democrats all across Virginia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35498283/305256386/-155334969?refcode=mw_em_210909_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTJjNWRjMy1iZDExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VFzoAWYor-7ZM9LgJKkCnsgVyVpZOkGjhpOjSRu8mCY=)_** **Bill Helsley** understands the experience of the working class in a way many candidates can’t. Armed with a strong work ethic instilled by his parents -- a police officer and a sewing factory worker -- Bill became a distinguished attorney known for providing a large volume of legal services free of charge for the less fortunate in his rural community. He’s running to represent the Valley on a platform of expanding affordable health care and investing in our infrastructure. **Blakely Lockhart** was born and raised in Henrico County -- and she thinks the hardworking people where she’s from deserve a real leader on their side, not another partisan politician. The daughter of a frontline worker and a recent graduate in the medical field, Blakely is uniquely qualified to stand up for her community on issues like health care, education, and more. Winning these races won’t be easy. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: supporting Afghan refugees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
As Americans, we have a duty to support these refugees in any way we can.

---
| Friend,

These past several weeks have been challenging for so many in our community as we have watched the end of the US military engagement in Afghanistan and the millions of Afghan refugees who have fled their homes under threat of Taliban control.

As Americans, we have a duty to support these refugees in any way we can. The International Rescue Committee is working around the clock to provide services to refugees, asylees, and asylum seekers in San Diego and across the country, as well as those Afghan evacuees and newcomer refugees anticipated to arrive. They are assisting Afghan families and individuals with medical care, legal assistance and welcome kits with essential supplies.

The IRC is doing crucial work to help resettle Afghan refugees who have experienced extreme turmoil, tragedy, and violence. [_**That’s why I’m asking you to contribute any amount to the San Diego IRC today to support their work.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35498626/305257138/817142072?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzA2ZjQ2Zi1iZjExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RT7K2YWOd2HUxmDdUBulN79q06jhdOHRosuQQ8liBME=&emci=4fcc804e-d210-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2c06f46f-bf11-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=14239920)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35498628/305257140/817142072?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzA2ZjQ2Zi1iZjExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RT7K2YWOd2HUxmDdUBulN79q06jhdOHRosuQQ8liBME=&emci=4fcc804e-d210-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2c06f46f-bf11-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=14239920)
---
There will be time to do the needed oversight to learn the lessons of the United States’ efforts in Afghanistan over the past few months and the past twenty months. For now, it is our responsibility to help those Afghan refugees who are coming to the United States. **I am proud to support the San Diego IRC as they resettle refugees and am so glad to be part of a community that is welcoming those in need with open arms.[_If you are able, I hope you will consider making a contribution today to the San Diego International Rescue Committee._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35498631/305257142/817142072?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzA2ZjQ2Zi1iZjExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RT7K2YWOd2HUxmDdUBulN79q06jhdOHRosuQQ8liBME=&emci=4fcc804e-d210-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2c06f46f-bf11-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=14239920)**
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35498634/305257144/817142072?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzA2ZjQ2Zi1iZjExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RT7K2YWOd2HUxmDdUBulN79q06jhdOHRosuQQ8liBME=&emci=4fcc804e-d210-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2c06f46f-bf11-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=14239920)
---
Thank you,
Sara Jacobs

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: back to school🎒
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZcQjqsIqRmYbaN21RcnAXgHVdXcu1YlaxqypcKsZjoM=/SYarPyVJtSe8bvCcr4Trl0wTU6wCP1SZysjIn9Emuj0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210909-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

Students around the country have returned to their classrooms, including my three daughters who started 2nd, 5th, and 8th grades yesterday. It is an exciting, yet challenging and worrisome time as we contend with the ongoing pandemic and delta variant.

What happens in our schools matters to me deeply. **As a proud public school graduate and parent, I believe wholeheartedly in the value and purpose of public education.**

In Congress, I have advocated for strengthening our public education system, including our early childhood programs like Head Start. I even introduced bipartisan legislation to allow Head Start programs to receive federal work-study dollars. From the earliest days of schooling, young children should have high-quality educational opportunities, as Head Start provides.

I also understand the value of adequately funding our schools. With enough resources, our teachers and administrators are empowered to make a positive difference in the next generation. I am committed to advocating for Central Virginia's children to have the best possible educational opportunities, which requires sufficient funding.

**I 'm proud to be a tireless advocate in Congress for our nation's students from the day they enter school to the day they graduate.** Central Virginia families who want to see their children learn and thrive have an ally in Congress as long as I serve.

[_**To help me continue working on issues that matter, like education, will you contribute to my re-election campaign today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZcQjqsIqRmYbaN21RcnAXgHVdXcu1YlaxqypcKsZjoM=/SYarPyVJtSe8bvCcr4Trl0wTU6wCP1SZysjIn9Emuj0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210909-1-EM&amount=25)

clean_body: | | Peter, Students around the country have returned to their classrooms, including my three daughters who started 2nd, 5th, and 8th grades yesterday. It is an exciting, yet challenging and worrisome time as we contend with the ongoing pandemic and delta variant. What happens in our schools matters to me deeply. As a proud public school graduate and parent, I believe wholeheartedly in the value and purpose of public education. In Congress, I have advocated for strengthening our public education system, including our early childhood programs like Head Start. I even introduced bipartisan legislation to allow Head Start programs to receive federal work-study dollars. From the earliest days of schooling, young children should have high-quality educational opportunities, as Head Start provides. I also understand the value of adequately funding our schools. With enough resources, our teachers and administrators are empowered to make a positive difference in the next generation. I am committed to advocating for Central Virginia's children to have the best possible educational opportunities, which requires sufficient funding. I 'm proud to be a tireless advocate in Congress for our nation's students from the day they enter school to the day they graduate. Central Virginia families who want to see their children learn and thrive have an ally in Congress as long as I serve. | Have a safe, healthy, and meaningful school year ahead, Abigail * | | | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress PO Box 3121 Glen Allen VA 23058 United States Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. name: Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
subject: our BORDER IS IN TATTERS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
We have literally opened our back door and have no idea who is coming in | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3a994fa446094fbeb9a1de37ea835ef0&_e=vAsQhqtN0cM6Oib1DIx_Qvz3IVx60AJEshc7bKJacPekgEbGicj-Ug1h4amKL9oKZRfRlpbCyCyBZURMpvNkiuzEMQKY4NTtJ17W0nMFjCXlYw-BbV4zvKo-L2K049DA68hFDQhCdDUUiXzbK3Wx3gqrUhnMtvsra1Xg-HNWic4Frx5SAJ6t8iWzsJadYpZGwprB6468aeT84qI6pbNz0UfuPvptercpLGwH0Q5BRvz0go0hnNX5SJdl2O5eNB4XvDyeORO4-rnhzPK66SvkhW_YsXweR2kiKTewOvCK5RascfvQOvcPvu5FAFocbV9MZRuCQxAZe74bwJ-vGqSHF52ZH44VxEYRSS9xjM3DV7KeyUoKYZQokomU1nKEVEugHvWN4F3giuh3xAxp0BVf-1-J6oq-f32IGEKtPsNIIQCRRVceyiQLqlnBQz0TSxhLvCcHCuB_-SSyL8YDhR9Y4N6nAwkOnsIzv9oIS9e8K4c1iFvHVuKdja18S8GeOa8R)
---
Fellow Conservative

Apparently, we’re not a nation of laws anymore.

Recently one morning over coffee I was reading an article with the title “ _In McAllen, Texas, Migrant Shelters Struggle as COVID-19 Containment Falls to Them_.”

McAllen, in Hidalgo County, Texas is an eleven-minute drive from my home. These Texas border communities are where hundreds of thousands of Americans call home. Hidalgo County is on the front lines of the border fiasco that President Biden and Democrats in Congress are refusing to address, much less fix.

The entire article gave me a profound anxiety - **our BORDER IS IN TATTERS** , but what incensed me the most was a quote from an undocumented Honduran migrant who flat out thanked President Biden for opening our borders to her and her family.

“ _We are so grateful for this country that opened up its doors_.”
**We have literally opened our back door and have no idea who is coming in**. As a mother who lives in a border community, I find myself thinking how much longer it’s going to be safe to let my kids play outsider after school. Will there be a terror attack at our neighborhood grocery store?

These are the problems Democrats want to sweep under a rug and forget about. But for those of us living on the border our plight is real.

I firmly believe we need people in Congress who are committed to solving the border crisis - I’m firmly committed to giving the border crisis the attention it deserves, but I’m not yet in Congress. **[So, if you’re as upset as I am with the lack of action to stop illegal migrants from coming in our back door, would you help send me to Congress with a donation of $5 or more today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3a994fa446094fbeb9a1de37ea835ef0&_e=vAsQhqtN0cM6Oib1DIx_Qvz3IVx60AJEshc7bKJacPekgEbGicj-Ug1h4amKL9oKZRfRlpbCyCyBZURMpvNkiuzEMQKY4NTtJ17W0nMFjCXlYw-BbV4zvKo-L2K049DA68hFDQhCdDUUiXzbK3Wx3gqrUhnMtvsra1Xg-HNWic4Frx5SAJ6t8iWzsJadYpZGwprB6468aeT84qI6pbNz0UfuPvptercpLGwH0Q5BRvz0go0hnNX5SJdl2O5eNB4XvDyeORO4-rnhzPK66SvkhW_YsXweR2kiKTewOvCK5RYWV7o4oXaQY9NgT7F7nprQfV0Bfnz8ZusgLKh6N9UXqkRM3v53h3sZ3k-zpRGcG93yOSH_M7FAgs_sDe1WGx4WuyB3zt7TdEziPWrN9ymCs2vYJpIucJs6XV_Zqv66zUtJL8pXxFTqB1qk_QHJogqHyhXCn55PWhzb9DPR_KvedGubea7Ti-XBfg4DF0oNiOGGrGupl6SggJo5lARqrRoy)**

[** ‹‹ HELP ME SOLVE THE BORDER CRISIS
CHIP IN TODAY››**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3a994fa446094fbeb9a1de37ea835ef0&_e=vAsQhqtN0cM6Oib1DIx_Qvz3IVx60AJEshc7bKJacPekgEbGicj-Ug1h4amKL9oKZRfRlpbCyCyBZURMpvNkiuzEMQKY4NTtJ17W0nMFjCXlYw-BbV4zvKo-L2K049DA68hFDQhCdDUUiXzbK3Wx3gqrUhnMtvsra1Xg-HNWic4Frx5SAJ6t8iWzsJadYpZGwprB6468aeT84qI6pbNz0UfuPvptercpLGwH0Q5BRvz0go0hnNX5SJdl2O5eNB4XvDyeORO4-rnhzPK66SvkhW_YsXweR2kiKTewOvCK5RbUCjhGBXvn4tYcHbnoVsjImFo9O20zc2Ebc6NJo6oSOWjYdROkVMuYwCSIXXx9nB1NRUFoql91n5A875hlh1FYbAaU5hhUyPNfdb_89aMqFkVbv2gAFfU6pFC9ua0bl5jvoLAj8655qURe0C-8rklX17q5_ILQEdYEGktn62eCVpQhuSDiwAn6kYOPF0o9njyUJXpdF3WaCbVscZBCbuiA)
Now, I’m a proponent of _legal_ immigration - I wouldn’t be here today if our country was closed off completely to immigrants. What _I am opposed to_ is a nation that no longer abides by the rule of law.

**WHERE ELSE ON THE PLANET** can migrants go and enter into a country freely without any documentation?

If migrants from all over central America are entering the country via caravans without penalty, **what’s going to stop members of the Taliban or ISIS from hopping over the border along with people who really are just looking for a better way of life?**

Meanwhile at the White House, President Biden is hosting receptions for sports teams. Nancy Pelosi is hosting fundraisers in Napa Valley.

My hometown in Texas’ Rio Grande Valley is being overrun and no one cares - not even the Democrat I’m running against.

Thank you for your consideration,
Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
Republican for Congress

[** ‹‹ HELP ME SOLVE THE BORDER CRISIS
CHIP IN TODAY››**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3a994fa446094fbeb9a1de37ea835ef0&_e=vAsQhqtN0cM6Oib1DIx_Qvz3IVx60AJEshc7bKJacPekgEbGicj-Ug1h4amKL9oKZRfRlpbCyCyBZURMpvNkiuzEMQKY4NTtJ17W0nMFjCXlYw-BbV4zvKo-L2K049DA68hFDQhCdDUUiXzbK3Wx3gqrUhnMtvsra1Xg-HNWic4Frx5SAJ6t8iWzsJadYpZGwprB6468aeT84qI6pbNz0UfuPvptercpLGwH0Q5BRvz0go0hnNX5SJdl2O5eNB4XvDyeORO4-rnhzPK66SvkhW_YsXweR2kiKTewOvCK5RZHJUnP1vwYxxGVjoJyACEElCAXnGfdGKZ3KP_UEHTzEXeiyJ03az9ch290kKeiYV7nyj8AxdtaSSganiC8B2vW6PjRdGMaU7b3y3om0ZHjPOjlw0TeK1YZhKMMWVkKZpcyaccMv02SmXUAvaqgAWtngtj9XoLsRv2oyRF_s7_UZVI9VJNbbSo-K-zkR-xLBQEn-iwl19gbg_6IP18Ww0A5)

name: Lopez, Marco
subject: need you you to speak out with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
the Arizona GOP's sham election audit is out of control

---
Friend, I'm reaching out because I urgently need your help: **We're still 12 responses short of what we need to fight back against the Arizona GOP's sham election audit. Before our midnight deadline, I have to ask:[Will you stand with me to condemn the Arizona GOP's attempt to overturn the 2020 election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35499382/305259811/-926655812?email=&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk202-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODE4YzI1Yi1jMjExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d2eYArhpEiqBPRx-_S8pQUXo1CooKvsxyHvc5cSzdrk=&emci=1b44ba19-7711-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=8818c25b-c211-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6085109)**
The Arizona GOP refuses to accept the truth: that Joe Biden won the 2020 election because the voters wanted him to become president. Now, Republican extremists from Marjorie Taylor Greene to Donald Trump himself are forcing a bogus recount of millions of ballots – and **they know that if they're successful here, extremists across the country can follow their example and take this anti-democratic crusade nationwide.**

name: Rebecca Rodriguez
subject: We’d love to hear what inspired you to support our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
As someone who has helped grow our movement, we’d love to hear what inspired you to give our campaign.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210909-2499-header&t=1&akid=2499%2E2526796%2EzwPR7Q)
My name is Rebecca, and I’m Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s campaign manager. On behalf of our entire team, we want to extend our deep gratitude to you for being a dedicated supporter of our movement.
Your support during this past year — whether that’s volunteering, amplifying our messages on social media, or voicing your support for our legislative priorities — has helped strengthen our movement, and we’ve accomplished so much with your help.
Thank you, thank you, _thank you_ for being here.
[We’d love to hear what inspired you to join our campaign. Can you please fill in this quick survey to share the reasons why you support Alexandria and our movement?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/sept-supporter-survey/?source=em20210909-2499-P_ENG_SUR_GFM&t=2&akid=2499%2E2526796%2EzwPR7Q)
**[Start Your Supporter Survey](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/sept-supporter-survey/?source=em20210909-2499-P_ENG_SUR_GFM&t=3&akid=2499%2E2526796%2EzwPR7Q)**
Together our movement is fighting for a livable climate, health care for all, making the rich pay their fair share, dignity for working people, and so much more — and we couldn’t do this without you.
We’re grateful to have you in this fight,
Rebecca Rodriguez
Campaign Manager
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210909-2499-P_ENG_SUR_GFM&t=4&refcode2=2499_2526796_zwPR7Q&akid=2499%2E2526796%2EzwPR7Q)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210909-2499-P_ENG_SUR_GFM&t=5&akid=2499%2E2526796%2EzwPR7Q)**
---|---

---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Did you see Gavin Newsom’s final message before the recall?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek — We have 5 days to tell every Californian to **Vote NO** on the Republican-led recall. Trump says the recall is "probably rigged." The leading Republican is _still_ spreading election lies about 2020, and even anti-vaccine messages. This is serious — everything is on the line right now. Stopping this virus. Protecting our health. **Repairing our democracy.** All of our progress. _This is it._ **[Please rush a $10 donation to Gov. Newsom's campaign and ours to help defeat the recall before midnight. These resources really matter right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35500125/305261425/-1514558366?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20210909_PM2_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGNjZDZhNy1jNDExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dITUYlcYJVlLXym_YKgqR0sQ1cN_NYyDYyuTC8Te5ss=)** Let's defeat this recall. — Adam
* * *
Derek — In just a moment, and for the last time, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to help me defeat this Republican-led recall attempt in California. Please give me a chance to explain why this request – especially today – is so important. Here is the truth: 6 days from now this recall will be over, but we still have a lot of work to do. Our job over the course of the next 6 days is to make sure that everyone who wants to **vote no** on this recall does so before it's too late. That takes financial resources. So we are hoping for as many donations as we can possibly get between now and Thursday, which is the last chance for us to put our money to work over the final weekend and through Election Day. So here is the part where I ask...for the last time: **Can I count on you to make a contribution to our campaigns to help defeat this partisan, Republican-led recall before it is too late? name: Kristin Davison & Ethan Zorfas, Lead Strategists (via Team Josh)
subject: Mandel leads Vance by 18 and Timken by 23
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc
body:
To: Interested Parties
From: Kristin Davison & Ethan Zorfas, Lead Strategists - Josh Mandel for US Senate
Date: September 9, 2021
Subj: Mandel leads Vance by 18 and Timken by 23

We thought you’d want to see the most recent polling in the race for US Senate in Ohio. The full results of the poll are below. **Josh Mandel beating JD Vance by 18 points and Jane Timken by 23 points**

**_Mandel maintains consistent and large double-digit lead as
Vance calling Trump voters Racists continues to haunt him._**
A new poll conducted by leading Republican polling firm Remington Research Group shows that Marine Corps veteran Josh Mandel holds a commanding lead in the race for Ohio’s Senate seat. JD Vance is in a distant second place, 18 points behind Mandel, and Jane Timken has dropped significantly since Remington’s last poll. The full results released September 8th are: **Mandel’s Consistent and Large Double Digit Lead**

Mandel is the clear and wide frontrunner in the U.S. Senate race, in large part due to his full-throated, consistent and unwavering support of President Trump and the Trump America First agenda. As Ohio’s largest newspaper The Cleveland Plain Dealer recently said, “Unlike other major Senate candidates, Mandel has no public history of criticizing or distancing himself from Trump.” Vance and Timken will never be able to overcome their anti-Trump history and Mandel’s lead is consistent despite other candidates spending millions in advertising.

**Vance’s Never-Trump History**

JD Vance’s poor showing in the poll is a result of a botched campaign rollout where it was revealed that he called Trump supporters “racists” and gave dozens of interviews to the left-wing media where he said he was a “Never Trumper” and that he thinks Trump is “noxious and reprehensible”. Vance even said he was strongly considering voting for Hillary Clinton before he eventually voted for Evan McMullin over Donald Trump. Then last month, after announcing his candidacy, Vance told Time Magazine that in order to support Trump at this point he would have to “suck it up.”

In an attempt to overcome Vance’s Never-Trump background, his super PAC has already spent over $2 million, but his candidacy is not gaining momentum as he is widely known as a “Never Trumper” in Ohio.

**Timken’s Depressed Numbers**

Jane Timken has spent over $700,000 on television and radio ads, only to see her polling numbers plummet. Republican voters will never forgive her for defending Anthony Gonzalez’s vote to impeach President Trump and that she called the impeachment “rational” and that she “didn’t know” how she would vote on impeachment. Timken was then booed at President Trump’s recent rally in Ohio when the President polled the crowd on the Ohio Senate race.

**METHODOLOGY**

Survey conducted September 6 through September 7, 2021. 980 likely 2022 Republican Primary voters participated in the survey. Survey weighted to match expected turnout demographics for the 2022 Republican Primary Election. Margin of Error is +/-3% with a 95% level of confidence. Totals do not always equal 100% due to rounding.

The methodology utilized in this survey is the same methodology that allowed RRG to be one of the only pollsters in the country to predict the 2016 Presidential election and be rated a top 5 GOP polling firm by a national study of political polling ([Link](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=4770e2d108144b1e8a6817065c04b372&_e=eTpDxY3nVx3rMejvincRAsOI0SvMh4Mvk_vDC0kI4T9iEs1K96kHa90vAFRnY7GLL29pc9Olux5wPox7nbncBuwfnqYNwwXQ1O54-ainES67ZoJKgDAWmSd9_feQUYeDf70UyFM-8BhhFpyg141VWqnKNnuTljQNamdnDZYDtfVcJP-Zfi7DdJQ_V0dgtk2eWna6XTC3EAie-aHV1dSMwGkihabGgl4vua8OYl9XF6-VyM-A3-7ereWZsTghcEsu7uu2dSDUuFjqCbgYxLl9tJQ1sKgAvVgab0h4iRcF5NkdVFO9clZyl_TcMoil0IPwWxTW8ChEiGf2-ICBfEUmvw%3D%3D)).

clean_body: To: Interested Parties From: Kristin Davison & Ethan Zorfas, Lead Strategists - Josh Mandel for US Senate Date: September 9, 2021 Subj: Mandel leads Vance by 18 and Timken by 23 We thought you’d want to see the most recent polling in the race for US Senate in Ohio. The full results of the poll are below. Josh Mandel beating JD Vance by 18 points and Jane Timken by 23 points Mandel maintains consistent and large double-digit lead as Vance calling Trump voters Racists continues to haunt him. A new poll conducted by leading Republican polling firm Remington Research Group shows that Marine Corps veteran Josh Mandel holds a commanding lead in the race for Ohio’s Senate seat. JD Vance is in a distant second place, 18 points behind Mandel, and Jane Timken has dropped significantly since Remington’s last poll. The full results released September 8th are: Mandel’s Consistent and Large Double Digit Lead Mandel is the clear and wide frontrunner in the U.S. Senate race, in large part due to his full-throated, consistent and unwavering support of President Trump and the Trump America First agenda. As Ohio’s largest newspaper The Cleveland Plain Dealer recently said, “Unlike other major Senate candidates, Mandel has no public history of criticizing or distancing himself from Trump.” Vance and Timken will never be able to overcome their anti-Trump history and Mandel’s lead is consistent despite other candidates spending millions in advertising. Vance’s Never-Trump History JD Vance’s poor showing in the poll is a result of a botched campaign rollout where it was revealed that he called Trump supporters “racists” and gave dozens of interviews to the left-wing media where he said he was a “Never Trumper” and that he thinks Trump is “noxious and reprehensible”. Vance even said he was strongly considering voting for Hillary Clinton before he eventually voted for Evan McMullin over Donald Trump. Then last month, after announcing his candidacy, Vance told Time Magazine that in order to support Trump at this point he would have to “suck it up.” In an attempt to overcome Vance’s Never-Trump background, his super PAC has already spent over $2 million, but his candidacy is not gaining momentum as he is widely known as a “Never Trumper” in Ohio. Timken’s Depressed Numbers Jane Timken has spent over $700,000 on television and radio ads, only to see her polling numbers plummet. Republican voters will never forgive her for defending Anthony Gonzalez’s vote to impeach President Trump and that she called the impeachment “rational” and that she “didn’t know” how she would vote on impeachment. Timken was then booed at President Trump’s recent rally in Ohio when the President polled the crowd on the Ohio Senate race. METHODOLOGY Survey conducted September 6 through September 7, 2021. 980 likely 2022 Republican Primary voters participated in the survey. Survey weighted to match expected turnout demographics for the 2022 Republican Primary Election. Margin of Error is +/-3% with a 95% level of confidence. Totals do not always equal 100% due to rounding. The methodology utilized in this survey is the same methodology that allowed RRG to be one of the only pollsters in the country to predict the 2016 Presidential election and be rated a top 5 GOP polling firm by a national study of political polling (). Full poll . name: Giffords.org
subject: Bad News
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

We have bad news:
**Gun safety advocate David Chipman’s nomination for ATF Director was just pulled. And our nation’s safety is worse off for it.**
How did this happen? The National Shooting Sports Foundation led an effort to smear Chipman’s reputation by launching a bad-faith misinformation campaign spreading lies about Chipman, the ATF, and President Biden’s efforts to reduce gun violence. They got many Republican senators to believe their conspiracy theories and oppose David’s nomination, even though he was the most qualified nominee in the agency’s history.
**So it’s clear the NSSF is stepping up as the new NRA and we have to be ready to go up against them. That’s why today, we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you chip in $3 today to help us go head-to-head with the NSSF? This is a setback, but we are still so close to enacting change — real change — for our communities and we can’t afford to lose that opportunity now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210909-1-15&t=1&refcode2=844_3935704_gDp51h&akid=844%2E3935704%2EgDp51h)

name: Team Schrier
subject: One way Congress can protect reproductive rights:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Republicans across the country are working overtime to prevent people from accessing the reproductive health care they need. Just last week, Texas' extreme six-week abortion ban went into effect after the Supreme Court refused to block it. It's only a matter of time before we see similar extreme anti-choice laws introduced in states across the country. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35501472/305265886/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDQyOTQwZi1jYTExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFCBZlPuC8ayFu725Z6fhABN5wvW6KcIGmjp8p7DbeA=&emci=0f7857b9-9811-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=0d42940f-ca11-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Republicans across the country are working overtime to prevent people from accessing the reproductive health care they need. Just last week, Texas' extreme six-week abortion ban went into effect after the Supreme Court refused to block it. It's only a matter of time before we see similar extreme anti-choice laws introduced in states across the country.

**We need to take action to protect reproductive rights before it's too late -- and one thing Congress can do right now is repeal the Hyde Amendment.**

The Hyde Amendment is discriminatory language which bans abortion coverage under government-funded health plans. This amendment has been included in every spending bill passed by Congress in recent history and has affected people across the country's ability to make their own reproductive health care decisions.

Earlier this year, Kim helped pass the first spending bill in 45 years that didn't include the Hyde Amendment. But after passing the House, **every Republican in the Senate voted to restore it.**

**[We need to end discrimination in women's reproductive health care decisions and that starts with repealing the Hyde Amendment. Add your name if you agree>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35501473/305265893/123300065?gpsid=8_30_20395&ms=em21_210909_hyde1_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&refcode=em21_210909_hyde1_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210909_hyde1_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDQyOTQwZi1jYTExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFCBZlPuC8ayFu725Z6fhABN5wvW6KcIGmjp8p7DbeA=&emci=0f7857b9-9811-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=0d42940f-ca11-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35501477/305265894/123300065?gpsid=8_30_20395&ms=em21_210909_hyde1_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&refcode=em21_210909_hyde1_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210909_hyde1_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDQyOTQwZi1jYTExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFCBZlPuC8ayFu725Z6fhABN5wvW6KcIGmjp8p7DbeA=&emci=0f7857b9-9811-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=0d42940f-ca11-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=15820338)
---

Every person deserves the right to make their own reproductive health care decisions, but for more than four decades, the Hyde Amendment has affected this right -- particularly for BIPOC and low-income people.

As the only Democratic female doctor in Congress, Kim will always fight to ensure that every person has access to the reproductive health care they need. That's why she's taking a stand and demanding the repeal of the Hyde Amendment.

**[Are you with her? Add your name to stand with Kim and demand Congress repeal the Hyde Amendment now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35501480/305265896/123300065?gpsid=8_30_20395&ms=em21_210909_hyde1_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&refcode=em21_210909_hyde1_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210909_hyde1_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDQyOTQwZi1jYTExLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFCBZlPuC8ayFu725Z6fhABN5wvW6KcIGmjp8p7DbeA=&emci=0f7857b9-9811-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=0d42940f-ca11-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=15820338)**

Team Schrier

name: Andrew Garbarino
subject: Tell Biden: ‘Get Americans out of Afghanistan’
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS |
body:
Joe Biden and his administration promised for weeks that... [](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=96b2f46ac4914076958f69fe9f320cd5&_e=sDYCcQA-T0G4nqgRo4P9OA_-PS9TLAV6ziTc37p0MEbE-kmTZXQMhkQ4-rBNqW9IZ057fIOb_zsW8BtLNf8PttEr9EtEJ7DYG2yMn1qKEIGmtHUXT69MjagLIOrEJA7E7gqgTR-seXy8sW26_TxY1i2lrBEzEe_8gKk5tVnqwG5np02SeR69SWb37Ip8JB98RV8ycBgbSaO48QvzyLWa8f_wc2A1Y89nvTIvCfn2uGJWIu5FsJWbK214erzYqFvSO8W0tjhCo_Ha_O6cYzOENrC2l-QJtvDRDvHZDgWOdU5mLpn-3qirAa3zBU-UHn764cshPQpHXxadbtGOo_z9JqRCYN2tcRo-FD13GGIynX2HFZPjLG2-6JLQqxvffbhLoKjhNsij2oTUzSkzd3X2kM_GpkIC88avpXPfMLpjKPi54KGy_K_7y3NNHmPWlAH2-Cd2EAtI6ldoJ5SSwnsJdZZrsk4ZJpXtQVh8jnnFqOVfAQqc27QFHD_VfmCZsnBz) | |

Peter, I’m completely disgusted by this administration.

Joe Biden and his administration promised for weeks that we wouldn’t leave Americans behind in Afghanistan. _**But now I’m hearing reports and from my colleagues who went over there that there are Americans still stranded!**_

[](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=96b2f46ac4914076958f69fe9f320cd5&_e=sDYCcQA-T0G4nqgRo4P9OA_-PS9TLAV6ziTc37p0MEbE-kmTZXQMhkQ4-rBNqW9IZ057fIOb_zsW8BtLNf8PttEr9EtEJ7DYG2yMn1qKEIGmtHUXT69MjagLIOrEJA7E7gqgTR-seXy8sW26_TxY1i2lrBEzEe_8gKk5tVnqwG5np02SeR69SWb37Ip8JB98RV8ycBgbSaO48QvzyLWa8f_wc2A1Y89nvTIvCfn2uGJWIu5FsJWbK214erzYqFvSO8W0tjhCo_Ha_O6cYzOENrC2l-QJtvDRDvHZDgWOdU5c3DB7XVeFU4DIow_fltnksMgAlGPJt_WdeBM8q_QE-gmHC9iVhjBB0T_RSsNp15OKVZkNMtalgySFO0umElBi9pr8feXe8dUBYH9gooUEmVGvvZPJFA2CoI39HGQA5FtLO0wEPUfx6VjQZesOo8XFkoUeRdSxXPWYHkfZ4yKdBQJ0Rz6-U-XI2RZD4sg9cjQJQJ6Gtj4vYE0CImCh9WCT)

[**Demand Biden: ‘Get Americans out of Afghanistan’**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=96b2f46ac4914076958f69fe9f320cd5&_e=sDYCcQA-T0G4nqgRo4P9OA_-PS9TLAV6ziTc37p0MEbE-kmTZXQMhkQ4-rBNqW9IZ057fIOb_zsW8BtLNf8PttEr9EtEJ7DYG2yMn1qKEIGmtHUXT69MjagLIOrEJA7E7gqgTR-seXy8sW26_TxY1i2lrBEzEe_8gKk5tVnqwG5np02SeR69SWb37Ip8JB98RV8ycBgbSaO48QvzyLWa8f_wc2A1Y89nvTIvCfn2uGJWIu5FsJWbK214erzYqFvSO8W0tjhCo_Ha_O6cYzOENrC2l-QJtvDRDvHZDgWOdU4y6V_B22Y22SgSsJiShzAWZUnNDmDQ-lg5mcxrPjTKzYB3k_vw7R5kKN4jAbv1o9mr0yDKYxYQLQsPVBnAYtPUxe1GVVXFCB7FW4UMMw5lHsGnsbF9t3eU6Het-kFiza6sWGXtJMLuEANRHfKAyTTaJmc8F_U-BGtl2x-uiiLEFemxPibXojTG83jcIF7_k4AmGyxUN8tCbMip4zH0EoAr)
How this administration botched this exit is horrible, but it is completely UNACCEPTABLE that he left Americans behind enemy lines.

Even worse, the Biden State Department refused to help get Americans out and then took credit for it when a private group of veterans got Americans out.

**It’s clear this administration is more concerned about safeguarding Biden’s legacy than saving American lives.**

This administration deserves to face consequences for their actions, and THEY WILL, but first, we need to demand every day that they get the remaining Americans out of Afghanistan!

[_**Sign your name now to join my call to Demand Biden: ‘Get Americans out of Afghanistan’ >>**_](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=96b2f46ac4914076958f69fe9f320cd5&_e=sDYCcQA-T0G4nqgRo4P9OA_-PS9TLAV6ziTc37p0MEbE-kmTZXQMhkQ4-rBNqW9IZ057fIOb_zsW8BtLNf8PttEr9EtEJ7DYG2yMn1qKEIGmtHUXT69MjagLIOrEJA7E7gqgTR-seXy8sW26_TxY1i2lrBEzEe_8gKk5tVnqwG5np02SeR69SWb37Ip8JB98RV8ycBgbSaO48QvzyLWa8f_wc2A1Y89nvTIvCfn2uGJWIu5FsJWbK214erzYqFvSO8W0tjhCo_Ha_O6cYzOENrC2l-QJtvDRDvHZDgWOdU4DRaWO8WUqMMdTE-iUw4ZV23iverAoe6N7bGKfdjMIlIXQp1c3r0pC9fwderKk_yV2nSMHDYyEyU8UTDgpaZkDEM_VG6GC4zprdFYAnWUXq4X9d4FmTXTADSUytq8wPFRiro_ihy3DDmYJvDnZvlaFIMzN8N96N-s2aMiY_WeH0pUculKcP_A_aJDGn1Bo8sTqMHZghq6zL6r-QUi8l2nH)

Thank you,
Andrew Garbarino

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: 📰Two Op-Eds
body:
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=0a4df7a9e4894ee0924333d5ed1473e0&_e=HjipK-ANJqeiN0gEbqC5pYdE4kwKOGdiV9yL8_LVWfTTkmmYjRYMuj5yPR2wvRBRbuRATYQwCbNj4LzaWMBTrNLWh_ETYqxyqtgSDap4zHr6PBvOJkscX55QMqs4aF34ZF6BVEibOwNUuNdiIyZQp21ygM96bZchKqpFnTlgOu6d3mdO3P92W9iDL4bcvwiLNHvf16CWoQrv4j-nuzI07jDmyBQRDpQeKlFV0y7lD29Z52PwsfdP4ArxIU8_xANXrS4YMqHXaX-WQ1Tu9Ax_cA%3D%3D) [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=0a4df7a9e4894ee0924333d5ed1473e0&_e=HjipK-ANJqeiN0gEbqC5pUqO-GhvCuqBncrJNov1k8spEyyo0athd_7zHmOy0eKuEUOJLfmJKBiDXsHoIVQGkgLNRRt41ZIw4LMgYEQU8mWtrFGVJwEOzCpBFVkttjaQ5JRflM4P76NZRq0U-0l-GGZnQuuupNYDeKnVvzKaatv3Zszk4emRxBFGqv5tjFAHbPE99D79--rVtRmkITmc66iT3Dwt_37-lYEtNnSJtV6bF1wjFYMtX95UTxnrNFpnDD3N1USPBJoOY7Cu6aziGY6VIwwsf5N7cMk0lACuRIgUvIw1-oHybYZbIIFNldszkTJMtZUtBktJcvaFflf2PBbkE9F7pGt0aVo5FHZiu90_ymYY3DrKiABxGk-juvFiLGCfYmWbUDg2kSpZGXglUw%3D%3D) **The Danger of Expanding Medicare** By Bobby Jindal It would reduce the quality of care and strain the program’s finances. | |
---
Moderate Democrats like Sens. John Breaux of Louisiana and Bob Kerrey of Nebraska once favored gradually raising the Medicare eligibility age to help ensure the program’s financial sustainability. But few of them are left in Congress. Today the “moderate” Democratic position is that the eligibility age should be _lowered_ as an alternative to establishing a single-payer system. Senate Finance Committee Chairman Bernie Sanders also favors opening Medicare to everyone over 60, but as a step toward single payer...
_Read more_**[HERE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=0a4df7a9e4894ee0924333d5ed1473e0&_e=HjipK-ANJqeiN0gEbqC5pUqO-GhvCuqBncrJNov1k8spEyyo0athd_7zHmOy0eKuEUOJLfmJKBiDXsHoIVQGkgLNRRt41ZIw4LMgYEQU8mWtrFGVJwEOzCpBFVkttjaQ5JRflM4P76NZRq0U-0l-GGZnQuuupNYDeKnVvzKaatv3Zszk4emRxBFGqv5tjFAHkpdYj91x15QKZ_Gv0QaWNOmpnmF22M9FJaN2-L6rNv4k51KG6UGiSwFS1fywImgEqmfs-fMhxX24pTKBhJlIwdqjUzSDwUt3MX2mp3F7dxe10wM6_isjeQnCYKxqBwgs4_I91v2Tt-nLrgtXzvnF60p6MoJq7JorMoNDktve1xlaCQJ1iFL1qB6mF-EmjJRGLq4gS3-TrpxFU7treS-vng%3D%3D)**.
|
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=0a4df7a9e4894ee0924333d5ed1473e0&_e=HjipK-ANJqeiN0gEbqC5pQ58Ictc8z26dmoUNhoPtewTz1-lgpX9CLTuZ-iuXxmCOFuKVRHVmft0XLBIxCVVa1typr3Gbj-V_oWORxsVR7SixC-SdsN-0JEPIAH0PxPhK1CUR_QEstofVTwqsky_t0aoSXJ2rRfIPrp4Oia5fOqRe-K5GOQWMGpY7pF4rnPeAplJx-I_S49ql30uB5oQMruqP3L4donasgFhaBC8btJ3mf8IC5y2jrqKrMNHrJUUaDX3M0Em3NDLBXsQSgNV3unCukm7kggFD0PHqD-liVfBEgR7aeezk_thcj_Cx6oizrTRdTBIQsVJK2XU9N7VWmNc4OMtCKIEq8z7N1CBS5mmVoFz_3-KsDJ1vHlKXb_u)
**Lawmakers’ Latest ‘Infrastructure’ Scheme Is a Takeover of American Health Care**

By Bobby Jindal and Tim Philips
Lawmakers need to pay attention to what’s actually going on in Senator Sanders’s proposal and the harm it would do to health-care outcomes.
|
---
By this point, it should surprise no one that, when lawmakers in Washington propose one spending item, they are speaking about another — and often several — entirely.

So it was with the last few iterations of the so-called “infrastructure” package, which had markedly little to do with infrastructure and much to do with lawmakers’ partisan pet projects...
_Read more_**[HERE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=0a4df7a9e4894ee0924333d5ed1473e0&_e=HjipK-ANJqeiN0gEbqC5pQ58Ictc8z26dmoUNhoPtewTz1-lgpX9CLTuZ-iuXxmCOFuKVRHVmft0XLBIxCVVa1typr3Gbj-V_oWORxsVR7SixC-SdsN-0JEPIAH0PxPhK1CUR_QEstofVTwqsky_t0aoSXJ2rRfIPrp4Oia5fOqNzeIiYLSPSeF-DRlAicc4CA3oJmah69DzZgqlrfPXwng2KvpzUg49hYgsSTTjKXu9xznsBBuHEO4E1dKpYYsfCQMmmtFsNtVMkv43hPV70WNTKB9E7yWcsIHggp8Zn39JbZjDB0lDe66EYaKimeUjBv-_DW74IRidBgA7JH9Y25IIhBU7M1LGtdkvQ5Gqx6RUxtI60uVvTbaQRfAPEr51)**.

**It 's time to FIRE FAUCI!** _**[Chip in if you agree! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58295459:JM7Wnr2NN:m:1:3253819041:84FEE5D05840404A89E25A92A2333B9D:r)**_ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58295459:JM7Wnr2NN:m:1:3253819041:84FEE5D05840404A89E25A92A2333B9D:r) | |
---
Peter, I've been saying it for months: Fauci is a complete fraud.

He lied about masks. He lied about school closures. Now he's lying about whether or not he funded the gain of function research that led to the COVID-19.

HINT: He did.

Thousands of documents were already available to the public when I called Fauci out in a July hearing, but as of today, 900 more documents have been released to PROVE Dr. Fauci approved funding for gain of function research at the Wuhan Virology Lab. _(Yes, that one.)_
[**FIRE FAUCI: CHIP IN NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58295459:JM7Wnr2NN:m:1:3253819041:84FEE5D05840404A89E25A92A2333B9D:r)
The truth is Fauci has been lying straight to our faces.

He came to the Senate and told us that the NIH absolutely did not fund gain of function research.

He refused to retract his lies.

He didn't even bother to cover up the paper trail that proved him wrong!

And we know why: Dr. Fauci believes he's invisible. He believes our strong bureaucracy and his corrupt allies in Congress will defend him till the end. He thinks he can avoid accountability completely.

_I'm doing everything to prove him wrong. _

I'm leading the charge to #FIREFAUCI and hold him accountable for lying to Congress, misleading the public, and for his well-documented role in providing funds to the Wuhan Lab in China so they can create bioweapons like COVID-19.

Will you join my fight by chipping in now?

Dr. Fauci has proven time and time again that he has no idea what he's doing.

He's not an expert in COVID. He's an expert in political theater!

Even the media-approved "experts" in microbiology are agreeing with ME now that Fauci was behind this whole pandemic. Richard Ebright, a molecular biologist at Rutgers, read the grants revealed this week and he says there's no DOUBT that Fauci was "untruthful" about his role in funding COVID-19.

_There you have it._

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. It's time for Fauci TO GO.

**I'm putting my foot down and if you agree I hope you'll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2842554/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58295459:JM7Wnr2NN:m:1:3253819041:84FEE5D05840404A89E25A92A2333B9D:r)**

name: Pramila Jayapal HQ
subject: "Manchin lays out long list of demands" (CNN)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The people have a list of demands, too: paid leave, child care, action on climate change, health care, and more.
#
Peter,
So-called “moderates” like Senator Joe Manchin remain an obstacle to long-overdue investments in working people, families, and our communities.
First, Manchin said we need to pause on delivering for the people.
Then, we pushed back to keep these investments moving forward.
Now, he wants to severely weaken provisions of the historic $3.5 trillion spending bill. That means taking funding away from universal pre-K, free community college, investments in home health care, fighting climate change, and more. He even wants to cut the DEMOCRATIC bill all the way down to $1.5 trillion.
**Pramila has been clear in saying that there’s no flexibility on the price tag, because she cares about delivering on ALL of the popular, necessary, and urgent benefits in the spending bill — from paid leave to Medicare expansion.[Can you chip in $3 to support Pramila’s fight for child care, paid leave, Medicare expansion, action on climate change, investments in education, and more? We need to step up now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210909?refcode=em20210909-618&t=20&refcode2=618_420207__3uuKC&akid=618%2E420207%2E_3uuKC)**
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210909?refcode=em20210909-618&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=618_420207__3uuKC&akid=618%2E420207%2E_3uuKC)**
Voters elected a Democratic House and Senate. They sent Joe Biden to the White House. And they overwhelmingly backed progressive policies for the working people of this country. Corporations are spending massive amounts to stop the $3.5 trillion bill because they don’t want their taxes to go up (meanwhile, the Treasury Department just reported that the top 1 percent skip out on paying $163 billion in taxes PER YEAR).
We must pass the Democratic agenda and deliver economic and social justice. We cannot listen to the corporate lobbyists and billionaire donors who want to keep the status quo — one where climate change worsens and people can’t afford child care, health care, and education.
**[This is Pramila’s fight but it is also OUR fight. And we need to be in this together. Can you contribute $3 today to support Pramila’s work? She doesn’t take a cent from the corporations trying to stop our investments in the people.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210909?refcode=em20210909-618&t=22&refcode2=618_420207__3uuKC&akid=618%2E420207%2E_3uuKC)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210909-618-footer&t=23&refcode2=618_420207__3uuKC&akid=618%2E420207%2E_3uuKC)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=618%2E420207%2E_3uuKC)

name: John Fetterman
subject: I don't think Trump should choose PA's next senator…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
If former president Donald Trump gives something his "complete and total endorsement," that's an automatic red flag in my book.
#
Peter, if former president Donald Trump gives something his "complete and total endorsement," that's an automatic red flag in my book.
**Just last week, Trump decided to wade into Pennsylvania politics and give his "complete and total endorsement" to one of my GOP opponents.**
Look, Peter, I don't think I have to tell you not to take Trump's advice here. His horrible judgement along with his terrible + cruel policies completely failed working Pennsylvanians for four years — and that was four years too long. _Which is exactly why working Pennsylvanians voted him out of office and delivered the presidency for Joe Biden in 2020._
**Our Senate race has already been named the #1 most likely to flip by CNN, and with Trump declaring his support in this race, the stakes are now higher than ever.**[**_Will you donate your first $5 right now to make sure we can defeat Trump's handpicked choice and flip this seat from red to blue?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29853?refcode=em20210909-2580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2580%2E434096%2E5aryct)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29853?refcode=em20210909-2580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2580%2E434096%2E5aryct)**
If you ask me, Donald Trump shouldn't get to decide what kind of leadership is best for the working men and women who build our country. We should. Working families should. **And it will take all of us working together to replace Pat Toomey with a Democratic senator (one who will actually vote like a Democrat btw).**
Because Pennsylvania could use a lot less of this: 👇
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29853?refcode=em20210909-2580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2580%2E434096%2E5aryct)
[**_So, I've gotta ask: Will you rush a donation of $5 or more right now so we can defeat Trump's endorsed GOP candidate and deliver Pennsylvania to our Democratic Senate majority? With Donald Trump officially involved in this highly-competitive election, it’s critical that we build the resources now to fight back._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29853?refcode=em20210909-2580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2580%2E434096%2E5aryct)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29853?refcode=em20210909-2580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=41&akid=2580%2E434096%2E5aryct)**
THANK YOU for all that you do.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails-footer-test?refcode=em20210909-2580-footer-test-ctrl&t=46&refcode2=2580_434096_5aryct&akid=2580%2E434096%2E5aryct)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chris=20Christie?=
subject: TONIGHT: Governor Christie to Speak at Ronald Reagan Library
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
### WATCH TONIGHT: Onstage At The Reagan Library With
Governor Chris Christie – In-Person and Live Stream
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=d52f16dfad&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**This evening at 6:00 PM PST/9:00 PM EDT Governor Chris Christie will speak at The Ronald Reagan Presidential Foundation & Institute** as the fourth speaker in its Time For Choosing Speaker Series, a new forum for leading voices in the conservative movement to address critical questions facing the future of the Republican Party. The event will be held in-person at the Reagan Library campus and will be available for streaming [online](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=6642633e03&e=65ae29fa7e).

_From the Ronald Reagan Presidential Foundation and Institute:_

During the Time for Choosing Speaker Series, formal speeches will be delivered at the Reagan Library leading intellectuals, U.S. representatives, U.S. senators, governors and emerging 2024 presidential candidates. Speeches will specifically address fundamental questions, such as “Why are you a Republican?,” “What should the Republican Party stand for?,” and “What are the Republican philosophies we can all agree on?”

The series derives its name from the iconic 1964 address Ronald Reagan delivered to support Senator Barry Goldwater’s presidential campaign. A political newcomer at the time, Ronald Reagan presented the country with a choice between "man's old-aged dream, the ultimate in individual freedom consistent with law and order" and "the ant heap of totalitarianism."

Learn more about The Time for Choosing Speaker Series, including a list of all confirmed speaker’s names, at [www.thetimeforchoosing.com](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=fcaa48ea94&e=65ae29fa7e).

| [WATCH HERE](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=325194dd4e&e=65ae29fa7e "WATCH HERE")
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=c79bb1298c&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
| | [](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=52ae2b509b&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
| | [](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=013275cf77&e=65ae29fa7e)
---

You can [update your preferences](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=a88f03c1eb&e=65ae29fa7e&c=fd6031d06f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=a88f03c1eb&e=65ae29fa7e&c=fd6031d06f).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Hillsdale=20College=20via=20Backing=20America?=
subject: Your 2021 Second Amendment Survey
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment.
_A message from our sponsor_
---
[](https://wordpress.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=55b501715e4df20b70dd65dd5&id=24c095bff1&e=b30812a643) Dear Friend of the Constitution,
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment.
Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty.
We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding.
Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below?
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://wordpress.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=55b501715e4df20b70dd65dd5&id=ad43e03028&e=b30812a643 "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")**
Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment.
There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**.
Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844.
Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment.
As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.”
This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom.
This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example...
Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day.
Why?
The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body.
Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America.
**But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.**
That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.
And this work continues today.
That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://wordpress.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=55b501715e4df20b70dd65dd5&id=51221ecd5c&e=b30812a643)**
We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.”
Do you agree? I hope so.
This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today.
As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.
Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
It also means your gift really matters.
**Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.**
After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today.
And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you.
This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited!
Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.**

Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you!
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://wordpress.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=55b501715e4df20b70dd65dd5&id=ae8b0f37ac&e=b30812a643)**
---

subject: Block the Biden Administration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
We’re only 8 months in... Read more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470814?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=332e01b2ed&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republican,

The trajectory of our country has changed drastically since Joe Biden and his handlers took office in January.

Just 8 months into his administration, he has taken our country into a downward spiral; making our economy weaker, damaging our international reputation, and hurting American families with skyrocketing inflation.

His leftist policies have led to:
* **A disaster in Afghanistan**. In a stunning series of events, this administration handed over control of the country to the Taliban and abandoned Americans and our allies.
* **A failing economy**. Just go to the grocery store or fill up your gas tank, and you’ll feel the pain of Biden’s inflation.
* **A major border crisis**. Illegal immigrants continue to stream across the border, overwhelming our border patrol and ICE agents.
* **A sustained attack on our energy independence**. Biden scrapped plans to build a pipeline that would have given Americans more control over our energy resources.
* **A spineless response to Communist China**. The Biden Administration refuses to stand up to a regime that caused COVID-19 and the deaths of more than 600,000 Americans.

---
| [STOP THE BIDEN ADMINISTRATION >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ba191cbf13&e=1acd9bb3d6 "STOP THE BIDEN ADMINISTRATION >>")
---
| **It couldn’t be clearer, Hoosier Republican. Joe Biden is one of the most hapless presidents in our nation’s history, and he must be stopped**.

That’s why it’s so imperative that we TAKE BACK the House in 2022. We need a Republican majority to block the left’s radical policies ruining our country.

[We’re only 8 months into his four-year term, and if we continue at this pace there’s no telling how bad it could get.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d39fe0b76d&e=1acd9bb3d6)

With your help, we can TAKE BACK the House and end Nancy Pelosi’s iron grip on Congress.

_Joe Biden’s administration is taking our country down a dangerous path, and THIS is our opportunity to hold them accountable for the damage they are doing._

It won’t be easy, but with your support for our Indiana delegation, we can get the job done.

\- Team IN GOP
---

body:
I have President Trump’s endorsement, but I want to know: do I have yours? I have President Trump's endorsement, but I want to know: do I have yours? |
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a988c3534e9d4f188fa7b069fdc4a19d&_e=El_byihiS7GAcT0WVcBHXNI51YZk-XJEI3BpGrMH9wEe13j6oMzhtXz9FS-JbmSyk2SB9Yx57zjxbkYZgFGegbcRacH2Cu1UtLfqshXGwfWq7T7Enntlw9kgjxy9qWHT5mwon_v1WdFdAM3xQ1tmeilLurBD1GdOsd3LYQti5HBI_PWOZzrSaIg8AON8coYpq-ywHYo9Ueo7MttZYTfdM9Ah7E_kcW5B98E_FT5jP4DCDhlqf4kvSojKd7rjabdwzUKXB-9y-YAg1ugQoSUuxxIV_OBDTnBwKZRTuckxiuLKOaQ2aRun-7dUyVBAkFFqGp_FHv3W8_z9DYje6LQg4uRCeGXSn7kGeB-3_umZeJWwK7LtuxMtTM50Z8PNpHVXn66siJIaWkq3aUuuI6yg22bH62fy0wllIaAft0SgYEO6utWMDQJDXBB2XAc1N8WzShvrH98ZXQzpajWyDwlEDgvUIxqJR_0hOgvdaVNRSKPiyUQGV-dlRo9tcALgKe-7GHoFKC0reQlLtpoHmIt7PlE9C1Yw6H_Q4zXzvrJ4MRwey8Ry1u2e2TF2MsamIFZShDpSV2tJbTgejnleS7Z8rQ%3D%3D)

Peter,

By now, you may have heard the news that President Trump has formally endorsed my campaign for the United States Senate! I've known the President for a long time, and I'm proud to call him my friend.

In case you missed my email announcing the President's support, let me quickly recap for you what he had to say in his endorsement release:

| _"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."_ - President Donald J. Trump
---

Now, while I'm very grateful for President Trump's support of my campaign, the truth of the matter is that I won't get anywhere on my own. clean_body: | | | Derek, not enough supporters have become Florida Defenders, and I'm facing an all too important midnight deadline in just hours. I'll remind you of this number one more time: 10,033 votes (0.12%). That's what decided Florida's last Senate race. If I don't hit this goal, I'm looking at a fundraising gap of $11,347. I can't have an under-resourced campaign when Marco Rubio hauled in $4 million. Because, if I don't have the resources, I won't be able to compete. And if I can't compete, I risk losing out on a meaningful win for Floridians and our country. Plain and simple. Thank you, Congresswoman Val Demings | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Erica could be the deciding YES vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We have a golden opportunity to elect a progressive Democrat like Erica to the U.S. Senate.
#
Did you know that Erica could be the deciding YES vote on a lot of important legislation?
Democrats have a razor-thin majority in the U.S. Senate. And we know that we can’t count on Senator Manchin and Senator Sinema when it comes to abolishing the filibuster, guaranteeing voting rights for Black people, or even raising the minimum wage.
**The great news is that we have a golden opportunity to elect a progressive Democrat like Erica to the U.S. Senate in 2022, where she could be the deciding YES vote on:**
🏥 Expanding Medicare and lowering prescription drug prices
🗳️ Passing the For the People Act
💵 Raising the national minimum wage to at least $15 an hour
❌ Abolishing the Jim Crow filibuster
🌎 Passing bold climate legislation like the Green New Deal
🌈 Passing the Equality Act
🏛️ Defending reproductive rights enshrined under Roe v. Wade
CNN says our race is one of Democrats’ best chances to flip a Senate seat in 2022 — **that means your $5 donation today could make this ALL possible.**
[**So if you think electing a progressive Democrat like Erica and expanding our majority in the U.S. Senate is worth a $5 donation to our campaign, please take a moment to chip in today.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14035?refcode=em20210909-other-427&t=1&akid=427%2E3698%2EXR5nQY)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14035?refcode=em20210909-427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=427%2E3698%2EXR5nQY)**
Thanks!
Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210909-427-footer&t=21&refcode2=427_3698_XR5nQY&akid=427%2E3698%2EXR5nQY)**

clean_body: Montana Conservation Voters Action Fund announced that they will be ENDORSING Wilmot Collins in his reelection campaign! We could not be more thrilled | | | Folks, Have you heard the news? Montana Conservation Voters Action Fund announced that they will be ENDORSING Wilmot Collins in his reelection campaign! We could not be more thrilled to have the support of such a powerful eco-conscious organization. According to the committee, Mayor Collins is among some of the best conservation leaders in Montana and is committed to “what makes Montana towns great - clean air, clean water and access to our incredible open space.” If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | We know how important Montana is to you. Wilmot knows it too and is proud to be on the side of science. He is committed to working every single day to protect our public lands, water, and trails. MCV does a lot of great work that helps us get closer to that goal and having their support means a lot. Thank you for having Wilmot’s back. -Team Wilmot Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins

name: Heidi St. John for Congress
subject: A Voice For The Voiceless
body:

| | | | | |

|

| | |
---|---
|
Friends and Neighbors,

While incumbent Jaime Hererra-Buetler has been focused on impersonating a Republican and impeaching former President Trump, I have spent the past twenty years rallying American patriots to stand tirelessly for our individual liberties and supporting an America-first agenda.

Help is on the way!

Voters have a clear choice whether to re-elect a RINO, one who has grown tired and ineffective, or send me, someone who is ready to be your voice and work tirelessly for you, to Congress.

When candidates become comfortable thinking of "home" as Washington DC instead of Washington state, the very people who they promised to represent are left without a voice. I have been a "voice for the voiceless" year after year, decade after decade, fighting for the rights of parents, small businesses, law enforcement, children, churches, veterans, and the elderly.

Join me on my weekly podcast "America's Town Hall with Heidi St John" to stay informed on the critical issues facing Washington's 3rd Congressional District and the nation we love. [https://anchor.fm/hsjcongress](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-rjrZbDzMa0W1rgsZ8VGCZQ2UHgqEvk7v6x8KPremTUdY7q-OVycLcwmhUhsqcEUB2tPeyqkJNAibV9R4hPLMUXSTkJMRJIp_qHOzWm2oAp7MMfAZZEND-rg4dP20P9wIcA8WngCCELDWhVVljIObQVW7LGS_i0Lwkj1Qvd-HbvLwkrPtComWpnlgyNAzXKejTDsn8b9nCpZpOX6TyTn1g5qbMMRaiiEajWBKXVSd059AEOGpCpxWQ==&c=EfV6Pr7r752xalpbE2FY6fW8Y8E_GvXprzAnveeW1RGE35EVLDX0DQ==&ch=CxIfA6EtHvH0t3QUTnohBnZ5gry1hrh_5bZOo7dNuvgRe8ycFIxGqg==)

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Legislature Passes CRT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [What's at Stake](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqyWfc_RIrqjH5r582GN6YZiTacsYwg_t9v-2H6ORVn8w&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_9&n=1) Two days before adjourning, the Legislature has passed a bill to make CRT a graduation requirement. You can see my Floor Speech against the bill [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqeF4S63jWs3cr12IHKL9uZI6vMws0FqsV0J0J6odgkYw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_9&n=2). Meanwhile, LA Unified is proposing mandatory student vaccinations. Why should a district that can’t manage to teach reading or stay solvent be deciding anything about vaccinating kids? This is why I would terminate the State of Emergency. In better news, we’ve stopped AB 1102 along with stopping AB 455’s chilling passport scheme. Now, we have to stop Newsom from imposing them by fiat. That’s what’s at stake in the Recall. Newsom also appears to be plotting another school shutdown and his allies in the Legislature are saying they plan “to rip apart the recall process” after the election. We have other plans. I’ve traveled to all parts of California, and I’m seeing enthusiasm unlike anything I’ve ever seen in politics. Please make sure to vote and tell your friends to do the same! [Help us turn out pro-Recall voters](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7PyukeanaPVVByy4cGnphLXxOEH1CWIcHtuMj2-9EAmrlzX4&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_9&n=3) [Share this post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAwJo3VEbRluvzr4XfnrKF5A23GMdbuQ2P3F3oT60buu2w&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_9&n=4) Kevin Kiley
[KileyForCalifornia.com](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_9&n=5)
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States

Fellow patriot

**We’re writing to today to put a few things into perspective for you as the Senate prepares to come back to D.C. next week.**

Despite having the narrowest majority in more than two decades, Senate Democrats, **led by Mr. Socialism himself, Bernie Sanders** , are attempting to push through a new round of multi-trillion-dollar spending (**$5.5 trillion is said to be the true cost**) that would ensure the federal government is present from the birth to death of every American.

If you think that the heavy-hand of government during the COVID-19 pandemic has been oppressive, just imagine a continuance of the same for the rest of your life if Bernie’s bill passes the Senate.

Democrats say that they’d fund this bill by taxing Billionaires. The only thing is that there are just 700 of them in the U.S. Eventually, there won’t be any billionaires left to tax and then who do you think is going to pick up the tab? The middle class.

Folks, this is why there is no more important task right now than taking power away from Senate Democrats. They’re going to bankrupt every one of us.

**[Today and every day through September 30th we need to raise $20k from donors such as yourself if we’re going to hit our end-of-quarter goal. Democrats may not pass the bill this year or next, but make no mistake, they are playing the long game. Before Biden leaves the White House, passing legislation would turn the United States into a socialist nanny state is their only goal.
