name: DONALD TRUMP ALERT (via DCCC)
subject: disgusting;
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Will you add your name before midnight to CONDEMN Trump for his outrageous, racist statements?!
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME: Do you CONDEMN Trump's racist comments PRAISING Robert E. Lee?](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Donald Trump just released a DISGUSTING statement PRAISING Robert E. Lee and the Confederacy.

_These kinds of statements are disqualifying for ANYONE seeking to hold elected office -- especially someone exploring a**THIRD** campaign for the White House. _

_**So it 's on us to rise up and hold Trump accountable for his words and actions.**_

[**Quickly -- will you add your name before midnight to CONDEMN Trump for his outrageous, racist statements?!**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/2WXVQrVPxmC~)

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Petition Signature: [SIGN ON >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-)
| [Sign Your Name >> ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_8wc6m0~4t-)
---

We're sick to our stomachs.

In a move LONG overdue, the city of Richmond, VA, just removed its statue honoring Confederate General Robert E. Lee.

And what did Donald Trump do in the aftermath? _He released a DISGUSTING statement CONDEMNING its removal!_

He called the statue **BEAUTIFUL**.

He called Lee a **GENIUS**.

And he pushed **RACIST** talking points about American history.

We're horrified at this latest Trump outburst.

**And even worse, Trump appears to be actively exploring a****THIRD****campaign for the White House -- where he 'd be able to push his racist agenda once again.**

These kinds of statements are disqualifying for anyone seeking to hold elected office at ANY level --_let alone the presidency._

So it's on us to rise up and call out Trump for his actions.

**[That's why we're calling on 10,000 grassroots Democrats to sign on and let us know they CONDEMN Trump for his outrageous, racist statements PRAISING Robert E. Lee!](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)**

---
[ADD YOUR NAME: Do you CONDEMN Trump's racist comments?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-)
---

Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority \-- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45594954&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4MjE3MDQzOAS2&l=13964227&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Gosar endorses Finchem AZ SOS
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Election integrity train rolls forward |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=84e4049aa2&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

The Election Integrity Movement is gaining huge momentum as America First patriots gather for the cause. Starting last Fall, President Trump said:

**_”Mark Finchem is a real leader in Arizona.”_**

And this weekend, we gained a critical endorsement in my campaign for Secretary of State. But more on that in a moment.

My name is Mark Finchem, and I am the America First Patriot who first paid for the Election integrity hearings in Arizona out-of-pocket. I listened when everyone else covered their ears.

**_I spoke when the rest were silent._**

And now we are leading what is the greatest grassroots movement of a generation, a movement to restore integrity to American elections, and to restore the soul of America.

**_[Are you with me? Can you help our cause with a donation today of $25, $50, $100, or more?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c72b263411&e=44b8c466b0)_**

That brings me to today. After a valiant effort where we have fought numerous legal attacks on America’s audit in Maricopa County, where we have established indisputable evidence of fraud in Arizona elections, and where we have ignited an election integrity movement that has spread all the way from California to Georgia, we are seeing even more proud patriots join our cause.

**_This is why I am proud to announce the endorsement of Representative Paul Gosar._**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=149376c806&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **_My campaign has secured the endorsement of Representative Paul Gosar, a staunch defender of Conservative values. He knows that I am a fighter. He knows that I won’t back down to the thieving, radical Left._**
---
|
---
|
---
| Representative Paul Gosar supports me “without hesitation” to be our next Secretary of State in Arizona. This is huge.

**Words cannot describe how big this is for our campaign to be next Secretary of State in Arizona.**

[And this is where you come in.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6220a56c9e&e=44b8c466b0)

_No matter how many endorsements we get from proud America first Patriots who are joining our case, at the end of the day it is your support that matters._

**We are up against a wall. Every day it becomes harder to get the word out about election integrity as the main stream media REFUSES to cover the good work that we are doing in Maricopa County.**

_We are preparing for more legal attacks from the Department of Justice’s Merrick Garland and others, who have been targeting us because they are scared of the work that we have done._

**Right now, we have the Democrats in a corner, and they are scared, and they will fight back.**

_[And this is why I need your support today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a7d65952f7&e=44b8c466b0). We need to build a war chest to fight back against the ongoing and inevitable attacks by the mainstream media, the Department of Justice, and phony Radical Leftist Legal groups._

_[Please support my campaign for Secretary of State in Arizona today. We are bolstering our defenses and building our war chest, and our campaign desperately needs your help.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=42e0d0bb78&e=44b8c466b0)_

_[*Make a Statement with Dr. Paul Gosar*](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b185ca06f6&e=44b8c466b0)_

My name is Mark Finchem. I am a proud America-First Arizonan, former paramedic, policeman, and first responder, and proud member of the business community.

**I have directed my life-long passion to helping others to helping Americans protect the soul of their Constitution – Election Integrity.**

This is personal to me. We all know that President Trump should STILL be President.

_Instead, we have a demented President incapable of leading the Union, and now American blood is on Afghanistan soil._

**All America First Patriots need to join together. [_Join me, President Trump, Bernard Kerik, and Dr. Paul Gosar with a donation today!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8f05aca830&e=44b8c466b0)**
[_Please donate TODAY to make a stand against the Democrats, and stand up for our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=58c39422dd&e=44b8c466b0)

[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8ec490ceba&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e703bc6a75&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=4b1d09afc4) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=4b1d09afc4).
---

name: Doyle Canning
subject: Friday Action Alert: Oregon Re-districting
body:
The redistricting committee wants to hear from you tomorrow - Friday at 5:30 PM - or via email. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDKIWPcJl1fRqgCa2JPTEKaIB-gW2divyXMsvnN-l96-tDpZutcKIsCMnH4dAp0OI3e9aYa2BGDjJQc4HojGKA20jkzNoeco1HS59zd6VgQMGXs1CQWxSTjXnqtoh_dG4RwkU6wXenOob_cYOP2Am3QloF2LiAuEDAp9sPQ6Qq7_EUY8Uvf29MSOgKWuRc3hxqCFiBIVzl8HKCbL7G8L36CMIJOHfihC2XLn3NdLUsXKDQCLu1ixDMfzxdxGpZa9zeEk3g7fNxAVIE_aYZYEgmWJPEQiIG-a62_GGXqtMEbUXZhbdHm9r99Cnzion62552Q/3f6/ooMdqf8ZR5GulOtfZ1S4zQ/h0/6CcpKfDEORcDNb5L1_aE9jg1_aHKIgumft4QMG8esds)
---
Hi Freinds,
---
Exciting news: Oregon has grown, and will now have another seat in in the US Congress, _and_ more state house Reps! Where? Well...that's where you come in! **The redistricting committee is considering testimony by Congressional District 4 residents, tomorrow - Friday at 5:30 PM - and via email.** I strongly encourage you to make your voice heard, and:
* Support Congressional Map A: keep Lane County together and connected to Corvallis and the Coast
* Support State Map C: keep West Eugene and UO Campus communities together

---
|
---
[ Click Here to Send Email to the Redistricting Commitee ](mailto:Oregon.Redistricting@Oregonlegislature.gov?subject=CD 4 testimony &body=)
---
[ Click here to sign up to testify by Zoom, Friday at 5:30 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTAU0t62Pop1e5_YYTy0T9YNiQDth-hWyFRInLBpppwfxisWYVe47cJp6ciavjKlcjkyYj0upIotK-j3ue7bHB7fhmc0kD12-zfz19IIEz7QL-bLNVONWAazwdOTnGjL08CvIsOBu5XaEDuLvNLtKBZn4JtyCz4-YGIv53Hb4IUmFyy4BGNsR4KHkMTUKdLQCxeusjnjcBACmVtr_lt53I_M8ksq5bP8YEV-VsXpqAdr8jMZvPsJJjVsKN0LjnmmsqGdOD_Xu7Cf3xkhecqqnimdzARcVQGKlailTBQc4sdorX-TeK7vLCwWJG6MtpQbQTkaUdCf_KFVg_bqtOQq0dA0/3f6/ooMdqf8ZR5GulOtfZ1S4zQ/h1/YGOQEY_6GF7Zbc2n6iQ8eR3T7MKhVsG9gGkWr46bKHo)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
In my view, **Congressional Map A** keeps Lane County whole in one congressional district, and keeps Eugene connected with Corvallis, a similar community of common interests, as well as with our Cascades and Coast, home to our many natural assets and climate solutions.
**State Map C** is a good start! A final map should ensure two important communities of interest are not divided: \- **The environmental justice community of West Eugene** , which extends both north and south of West 11th, and has a strong common interest in clean air policy, as this working class area is disproportionately burdened by the industrial air pollution concentrated in West Eugene. \- **The UO Campus Community** and surrounds share a common character and interest, with higher concentrations of students, young families, renters, and people who work around the campus.
---
|
---
This is an exciting time for Oregon! The lines that are drawn this month will define the boundaries of our political communities **until 2032**. The stakes are high, and time is short: Your voice does matter! The deadline to submit written testimony for these public hearings is **September 13th at 8:30 PM.** [E](mailto:Oregon.Redistricting@Oregonlegislature.gov?subject=CD 4 Testimony &body=)[mail your comments!](mailto:Oregon.Redistricting@Oregonlegislature.gov?subject=CD 4 Testimony &body=) Sign up to testify via Zoom: [Friday at 5:30 PM](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTAU0t62Pop1e5_YYTy0T9YNiQDth-hWyFRInLBpppwfxisWYVe47cJp6ciavjKlcjnsWTMI_up8_s0c9FFONBvPJWg3HLancvxWTCif7nrCaWDG8O1E7D7UeB3OGtXYrAo9YXDvB126QqD4ByiyJKr4ToLn8hPMhNh1qsKf2mNBxBYngg8dqZbmoBdx1RmotriCet0V_njiTIjUvpxlI_LouHRGiQZe1eRwQbDKYSjuvoDTvFV8NPy3UWXGC0EGc-Bu3X4ovaxdF8I1aB10LX-4Z23axjU2ve6KfQKt14zB_Zgxvcy743cjprygBgwRIbAZ-ESk_glM7KgeVlcfwDKE/3f6/ooMdqf8ZR5GulOtfZ1S4zQ/h2/UOsZm33ry7PPtZbXdPp9msSnftYkzL0uPeUskBXJNn0) [Monday at 1 PM](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTAU0t62Pop1e5_YYTy0T9YNiQDth-hWyFRInLBpppwfxYiaxP9zM5ET8ywTGFx0QRM3rIfhcbCGtxh4Lls0YBtTKBMZk4M-UJViSCCrf7DcujD7OZmYqYr_a4MvD5pakIek4CRvCkW0srqr-gE4rFoWor_Kzbvz9MNnkvCH04jv7H1WmzeYYJtQb9q44XH14WDc_Yh1pQTt0laR3jCLck-IznZPCMMiqesTlshCzOjR_QNmNqelaNJc7-LVs1qSU0dVrnogAOPYO1yh-4abxfbTTNw3YGx2TVrqmB9SIIbbdn7phImM7o8tfqM3SsumC56HuOZl24hNBW9b8F7cac1c/3f6/ooMdqf8ZR5GulOtfZ1S4zQ/h3/96wKEwAyPj2iey_nA9-I6N0g63qJJvTpRRm4xpjwvJA) [Monday at 5:30 PM](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTAU0t62Pop1e5_YYTy0T9YNiQDth-hWyFRInLBpppwfxt_oNgfHXzdPvmuphSxkzPXg7CJiB_C7nTCniktteKjnwJ73Dp863GZw1zirPiz_hSu44j-09zmbLGZrg1z-Bvugo9ONLnW0hS-AqdoavBDbLI1vmmzXqMP2F41q65ZqB8BhADmD_FDXfwQD4c0ne-RUpTRl02f5Fw25uk3FXudYcRdiHNTdkg0riR6cxEOPVVHAtDHLkVg3Vyfb8Ah_bTrXlWnMTk1EEvT37AK-4DztUWaemBBrRCevRpiRY7SMWdRX1zpix_n76H6Y8a24asaXP0G64EIeDSSx_6q-2YqpeWAUODp6-Q8AOutT4l57n/3f6/ooMdqf8ZR5GulOtfZ1S4zQ/h4/noYMvywIcrqLI2HQ1bwn5PnsHOWf_0di8mQOVY-YTpE) What to learn more and check out the proposed maps? clean_body: The redistricting committee wants to hear from you tomorrow - Friday at 5:30 PM - or via email. | | Hi Freinds, Exciting news: Oregon has grown, and will now have another seat in in the US Congress, and more state house Reps! Where? Well...that's where you come in! The redistricting committee is considering testimony by Congressional District 4 residents, tomorrow - Friday at 5:30 PM - and via email. I strongly encourage you to make your voice heard, and: Support Congressional Map A: keep Lane County together and connected to Corvallis and the Coast Support State Map C: keep West Eugene and UO Campus communities together | mailto:Oregon.Redistricting@Oregonlegislature.gov?subject=CD 4 testimony &body= | | | In my view, Congressional Map A keeps Lane County whole in one congressional district, and keeps Eugene connected with Corvallis, a similar community of common interests, as well as with our Cascades and Coast, home to our many natural assets and climate solutions. State Map C is a good start! A final map should ensure two important communities of interest are not divided: \- The environmental justice community of West Eugene , which extends both north and south of West 11th, and has a strong common interest in clean air policy, as this working class area is disproportionately burdened by the industrial air pollution concentrated in West Eugene. \- The UO Campus Community and surrounds share a common character and interest, with higher concentrations of students, young families, renters, and people who work around the campus. | This is an exciting time for Oregon! The lines that are drawn this month will define the boundaries of our political communities until 2032. The stakes are high, and time is short: Your voice does matter! The deadline to submit written testimony for these public hearings is September 13th at 8:30 PM. mailto:Oregon.Redistricting@Oregonlegislature.gov?subject=CD 4 Testimony &body=mailto:Oregon.Redistricting@Oregonlegislature.gov?subject=CD 4 Testimony &body= Sign up to testify via Zoom: What to learn more and check out the proposed maps? Visit Questions? Please feel free to reach out to me by email, phone, or text, I will do whatever I can to support you in understanding the proposals, and making your voice heard. 541-357-1206 Yours for change, Doyle | | | | Sent via .
